Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(*********************************************************************************************

 The double category of coalgebras for a lax double functor

 Let `F` be a lax double endofunctor on a double category `C`. We define the double category of
 coalgebras as follows:
 - Objects: objects `x` in `C` together with a vertical morphism `x -->v F x`
 - Vertical morphisms from `fx : x -->v F x` to `fy : y -->v F y`: vertical morphisms
   `v : x -->v y` making the usual diagram commute (`fx · #v F v = v · fy`)
 - Horizontal morphisms from `fx : x -->v F x` to `fy : y -->v F y`: horizontal morphisms
   `h : x -->h y` together with a square with horizontal sides `h` and `#h F h` and vertical
   sides `fx` and `fy`.
 Squares are defined to be squares in `C` satisfying an additional commutativity requirement.
 We define this double category in this file, and we prove that it is univalent.

 Note that this construction does not necessarily work for oplax double functors. For oplax
 double functors however, one can define the double category of algebras. This is similar to
 the situation for monoidal categories.

 This construction is based on the talk "On the double category of coalgebras" by Hofmann.
 The difference is that in that talk, it is assumed that squares in `C` are unique, which we
 do not assume in this file. In addition, different conventions on what are the horizontal
 and the vertical morphisms.

 References
 - "On the double category of coalgebras", Dirk Hofmann
   https://www.mat.uc.pt/~tacl2022/slides/slidesDHofmann.pdf

 Content
 1. Basic definitions
 2. The 2-sided displayed category
 3. Builders and accessors for horizontal morphisms
 4. Builders and accessors for squares
 5. Horizontal identities
 6. Horizontal composition
 7. Globular isomorphism squares
 8. The left unitor
 9. The right unitor
 10. The associator
 11. The coherences
 12. The double category of coalgebras of a lax double functor
 13. The univalence of the double category of coalgebra
 14. The univalent double category of coalgebras of a lax double functor
 15. Flatness of the double category of coalgebras

 *********************************************************************************************)

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.FunctorCoalgebras.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Total.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.TwoSidedDisplayedCats.TwoSidedDispCat.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.TwoSidedDisplayedCats.DisplayedFunctor.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.TwoSidedDisplayedCats.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.TwoSidedDisplayedCats.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.TwoSidedDisplayedCats.Total.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.TwoSidedDisplayedCats.Examples.DispCatOnTwoSidedDispCat.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.TwoSidedDisplayedCats.Examples.TwoSidedDispCatOnDispCat.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Bicat.
Import Bicat.Notations.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DoubleCategories.Basics.DoubleCategoryBasics.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DoubleCategories.Core.DoubleFunctor.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DoubleCategories.Core.DoubleCats.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DoubleCategories.Core.UnivalentDoubleCats.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DoubleCategories.DerivedLaws.

Local Open Scope cat.
Local Open Scope double_cat.

(** * 1. Basic definitions *)
Definition double_coalg
           {C : univalent_double_cat}
           (F : lax_double_functor C C)
  : UU
  := coalgebra_ob F.


C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
X: double_coalg F
C


C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
X: double_coalg F
C

  exact (coalg_carrier F X).
Defined.

Definition double_coalg_map
           {C : univalent_double_cat}
           {F : lax_double_functor C C}
           (X : double_coalg F)
  : X -->v F X
  := coalg_map F X.

Definition double_coalg_ver
           {C : univalent_double_cat}
           {F : lax_double_functor C C}
           (X Y : double_coalg F)
  : UU
  := X --> Y.


C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
X, Y: double_coalg F
v: double_coalg_ver X Y
X -->v Y


C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
X, Y: double_coalg F
v: double_coalg_ver X Y
X -->v Y

  exact (pr1 v).
Defined.


C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
X, Y: double_coalg F
v: double_coalg_ver X Y
double_coalg_map X ·v #v F v = v ·v double_coalg_map Y


C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
X, Y: double_coalg F
v: double_coalg_ver X Y
double_coalg_map X ·v #v F v = v ·v double_coalg_map Y

  exact (pr2 v).
Defined.

Definition double_coalg_hor_struct
           {C : univalent_double_cat}
           {F : lax_double_functor C C}
           (X Y : double_coalg F)
           (f : X -->h Y)
  : UU
  := square (double_coalg_map X) (double_coalg_map Y) f (#h F f).

Definition is_double_coalg_sqr
           {C : univalent_double_cat}
           {F : lax_double_functor C C}
           {X₁ : double_coalg F}
           {Y₁ : double_coalg F}
           {f₁ : X₁ -->h Y₁}
           (s₁ : square
                   (double_coalg_map X₁)
                   (double_coalg_map Y₁)
                   f₁ (#h F f₁))
           {X₂ : double_coalg F}
           {Y₂ : double_coalg F}
           {f₂ : X₂ -->h Y₂}
           (s₂ : square
                   (double_coalg_map X₂)
                   (double_coalg_map Y₂)
                   f₂ (#h F f₂))
           (v : double_coalg_ver X₁ X₂)
           (w : double_coalg_ver Y₁ Y₂)
           (r : square v w f₁ f₂)
  : UU
  := transportf_square
       (double_coalg_ver_comm v)
       (double_coalg_ver_comm w)
       (s₁ ⋆v #s F r)
     =
     r ⋆v s₂.

Arguments double_coalg_hor_struct {C F} X Y f /.
Arguments is_double_coalg_sqr {C F X₁ Y₁ f₁} s₁ {X₂ Y₂ f₂} s₂ v w r /.

Section CoalegbraDoubleCat.
  Context {C : univalent_double_cat}
          (F : lax_double_functor C C).

  Let E : category := total_twosided_disp_category
                        (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
                           (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
                           (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
                           (hor_mor C)).

  (** * 2. The 2-sided displayed category *)
  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
disp_cat_ob_mor E

  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
disp_cat_ob_mor E

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
E → UU
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
(λ obd : E → UU,
 ∏ x y : E, obd x → obd y → E ⟦ x, y ⟧ → UU) ?pr1

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
E → UU
 exact (λ XYf,
             double_coalg_hor_struct (pr1 XYf) (pr12 XYf) (pr22 XYf)).
    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
(λ obd : E → UU,
 ∏ x y : E, obd x → obd y → E ⟦ x, y ⟧ → UU)
  (λ XYf : E,
   double_coalg_hor_struct (pr1 XYf) (pr12 XYf)
     (pr22 XYf))
 exact (λ XYf₁ XYf₂ s₁ s₂ vwr,
             is_double_coalg_sqr s₁ s₂ _ _ (pr22 vwr)).
  Defined.

  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
disp_cat_id_comp E
  double_coalg_disp_cat_ob_mor_on_twosided_disp_cat

  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
disp_cat_id_comp E
  double_coalg_disp_cat_ob_mor_on_twosided_disp_cat

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
∏ (x : E)
(xx : double_coalg_disp_cat_ob_mor_on_twosided_disp_cat
        x), xx -->[ id₁ x] xx
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
∏ (x y z : E) (f : E ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : E ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(xx : double_coalg_disp_cat_ob_mor_on_twosided_disp_cat
        x)
(yy : double_coalg_disp_cat_ob_mor_on_twosided_disp_cat
        y)
(zz : double_coalg_disp_cat_ob_mor_on_twosided_disp_cat
        z),
xx -->[ f] yy → yy -->[ g] zz → xx -->[ f · g] zz

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
∏ (x : E)
(xx : double_coalg_disp_cat_ob_mor_on_twosided_disp_cat
        x), xx -->[ id₁ x] xx
 
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X: E
s: double_coalg_disp_cat_ob_mor_on_twosided_disp_cat
  X
s -->[ id₁ X] s

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X: E
s: double_coalg_disp_cat_ob_mor_on_twosided_disp_cat
  X
transportf_square (id_disp (pr21 X))
  (id_disp (pr212 X))
  (s ⋆v #s F (id_two_disp (pr22 X))) =
id_two_disp (pr22 X) ⋆v s

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X: E
s: double_coalg_disp_cat_ob_mor_on_twosided_disp_cat
  X
transportf_square (id_disp (pr21 X))
  (id_disp (pr212 X))
  (s ⋆v #s F (id_two_disp (pr22 X))) = ?b
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X: E
s: double_coalg_disp_cat_ob_mor_on_twosided_disp_cat
  X
?b = id_two_disp (pr22 X) ⋆v s

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X: E
s: double_coalg_disp_cat_ob_mor_on_twosided_disp_cat
  X
transportf_square (id_disp (pr21 X))
  (id_disp (pr212 X))
  (s ⋆v #s F (id_two_disp (pr22 X))) = ?b

        
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X: E
s: double_coalg_disp_cat_ob_mor_on_twosided_disp_cat
  X
#s F (id_two_disp (pr22 X)) = ?t2

        apply lax_double_functor_id_square.
      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X: E
s: double_coalg_disp_cat_ob_mor_on_twosided_disp_cat
  X
transportf_square (id_disp (pr21 X))
  (id_disp (pr212 X))
  (s
   ⋆v transportb_square
        (lax_double_functor_id_v F (pr11 X))
        (lax_double_functor_id_v F (pr112 X))
        (id_v_square (#h F (pr22 X)))) =
id_two_disp (pr22 X) ⋆v s

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X: E
s: double_coalg_disp_cat_ob_mor_on_twosided_disp_cat
  X
transportf_square (id_disp (pr21 X))
  (id_disp (pr212 X))
  (s
   ⋆v transportf_square
        (! lax_double_functor_id_v F (pr11 X))
        (! lax_double_functor_id_v F (pr112 X))
        (id_v_square (#h F (pr22 X)))) =
id_two_disp (pr22 X) ⋆v s

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X: E
s: double_coalg_disp_cat_ob_mor_on_twosided_disp_cat
  X
transportf_square (id_disp (pr21 X))
  (id_disp (pr212 X))
  (transportf_square
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : F (pr1 X) -->v F (pr1 X),
         double_coalg_map (pr1 X) ·v z)
        (! lax_double_functor_id_v F (pr11 X)))
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : F (pr12 X) -->v F (pr12 X),
         double_coalg_map (pr12 X) ·v z)
        (! lax_double_functor_id_v F (pr112 X)))
     (s ⋆v id_v_square (#h F (pr22 X)))) =
id_two_disp (pr22 X) ⋆v s

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X: E
s: double_coalg_disp_cat_ob_mor_on_twosided_disp_cat
  X
transportf_square
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : F (pr1 X) -->v F (pr1 X),
      double_coalg_map (pr1 X) ·v z)
     (! lax_double_functor_id_v F (pr11 X)) @
   id_disp (pr21 X))
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : F (pr12 X) -->v F (pr12 X),
      double_coalg_map (pr12 X) ·v z)
     (! lax_double_functor_id_v F (pr112 X)) @
   id_disp (pr212 X))
  (s ⋆v id_v_square (#h F (pr22 X))) =
id_two_disp (pr22 X) ⋆v s

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X: E
s: double_coalg_disp_cat_ob_mor_on_twosided_disp_cat
  X
transportf_square
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : F (pr1 X) -->v F (pr1 X),
      double_coalg_map (pr1 X) ·v z)
     (! lax_double_functor_id_v F (pr11 X)) @
   id_disp (pr21 X))
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : F (pr12 X) -->v F (pr12 X),
      double_coalg_map (pr12 X) ·v z)
     (! lax_double_functor_id_v F (pr112 X)) @
   id_disp (pr212 X))
  (transportb_square
     (id_right (double_coalg_map (pr1 X)))
     (id_right (double_coalg_map (pr12 X))) s) =
id_two_disp (pr22 X) ⋆v s

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X: E
s: double_coalg_disp_cat_ob_mor_on_twosided_disp_cat
  X
transportf_square
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : F (pr1 X) -->v F (pr1 X),
      double_coalg_map (pr1 X) ·v z)
     (! lax_double_functor_id_v F (pr11 X)) @
   id_disp (pr21 X))
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : F (pr12 X) -->v F (pr12 X),
      double_coalg_map (pr12 X) ·v z)
     (! lax_double_functor_id_v F (pr112 X)) @
   id_disp (pr212 X))
  (transportf_square
     (! id_right (double_coalg_map (pr1 X)))
     (! id_right (double_coalg_map (pr12 X))) s) =
id_two_disp (pr22 X) ⋆v s

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X: E
s: double_coalg_disp_cat_ob_mor_on_twosided_disp_cat
  X
transportf_square
  (! id_right (double_coalg_map (pr1 X)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : F (pr1 X) -->v F (pr1 X),
      double_coalg_map (pr1 X) ·v z)
     (! lax_double_functor_id_v F (pr11 X)) @
   id_disp (pr21 X))
  (! id_right (double_coalg_map (pr12 X)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : F (pr12 X) -->v F (pr12 X),
      double_coalg_map (pr12 X) ·v z)
     (! lax_double_functor_id_v F (pr112 X)) @
   id_disp (pr212 X)) s = id_two_disp (pr22 X) ⋆v s

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X: E
s: double_coalg_disp_cat_ob_mor_on_twosided_disp_cat
  X
transportf_square
  (! id_right (double_coalg_map (pr1 X)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : F (pr1 X) -->v F (pr1 X),
      double_coalg_map (pr1 X) ·v z)
     (! lax_double_functor_id_v F (pr11 X)) @
   id_disp (pr21 X))
  (! id_right (double_coalg_map (pr12 X)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : F (pr12 X) -->v F (pr12 X),
      double_coalg_map (pr12 X) ·v z)
     (! lax_double_functor_id_v F (pr112 X)) @
   id_disp (pr212 X)) s =
transportb_square (id_left (double_coalg_map (pr1 X)))
  (id_left (double_coalg_map (pr12 X))) s

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X: E
s: double_coalg_disp_cat_ob_mor_on_twosided_disp_cat
  X
transportf_square
  (! id_right (double_coalg_map (pr1 X)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : F (pr1 X) -->v F (pr1 X),
      double_coalg_map (pr1 X) ·v z)
     (! lax_double_functor_id_v F (pr11 X)) @
   id_disp (pr21 X))
  (! id_right (double_coalg_map (pr12 X)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : F (pr12 X) -->v F (pr12 X),
      double_coalg_map (pr12 X) ·v z)
     (! lax_double_functor_id_v F (pr112 X)) @
   id_disp (pr212 X)) s =
transportf_square
  (! id_left (double_coalg_map (pr1 X)))
  (! id_left (double_coalg_map (pr12 X))) s

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X: E
s: double_coalg_disp_cat_ob_mor_on_twosided_disp_cat
  X
s = s

      apply idpath.
    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
∏ (x y z : E) (f : E ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : E ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(xx : double_coalg_disp_cat_ob_mor_on_twosided_disp_cat
        x)
(yy : double_coalg_disp_cat_ob_mor_on_twosided_disp_cat
        y)
(zz : double_coalg_disp_cat_ob_mor_on_twosided_disp_cat
        z),
xx -->[ f] yy → yy -->[ g] zz → xx -->[ f · g] zz
 
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y, Z: E
f: E ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: E ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
h₁: double_coalg_disp_cat_ob_mor_on_twosided_disp_cat
  X
h₂: double_coalg_disp_cat_ob_mor_on_twosided_disp_cat
  Y
h₃: double_coalg_disp_cat_ob_mor_on_twosided_disp_cat
  Z
s₁: h₁ -->[ f] h₂
s₂: h₂ -->[ g] h₃
h₁ -->[ f · g] h₃

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y, Z: E
f: E ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: E ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
h₁: double_coalg_disp_cat_ob_mor_on_twosided_disp_cat
  X
h₂: double_coalg_disp_cat_ob_mor_on_twosided_disp_cat
  Y
h₃: double_coalg_disp_cat_ob_mor_on_twosided_disp_cat
  Z
s₁: transportf_square (double_coalg_ver_comm (pr1 f))
  (double_coalg_ver_comm (pr12 f))
  (h₁ ⋆v #s F (pr22 f)) = pr22 f ⋆v h₂
s₂: transportf_square (double_coalg_ver_comm (pr1 g))
  (double_coalg_ver_comm (pr12 g))
  (h₂ ⋆v #s F (pr22 g)) = pr22 g ⋆v h₃
transportf_square (pr21 f ;; pr21 g)%mor_disp
  (pr212 f ;; pr212 g)%mor_disp
  (h₁ ⋆v #s F (pr22 f ;;2 pr22 g)) =
(pr22 f ;;2 pr22 g) ⋆v h₃

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y, Z: E
f: E ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: E ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
h₁: double_coalg_disp_cat_ob_mor_on_twosided_disp_cat
  X
h₂: double_coalg_disp_cat_ob_mor_on_twosided_disp_cat
  Y
h₃: double_coalg_disp_cat_ob_mor_on_twosided_disp_cat
  Z
s₁: transportf_square (double_coalg_ver_comm (pr1 f))
  (double_coalg_ver_comm (pr12 f))
  (h₁ ⋆v #s F (pr22 f)) = pr22 f ⋆v h₂
s₂: transportf_square (double_coalg_ver_comm (pr1 g))
  (double_coalg_ver_comm (pr12 g))
  (h₂ ⋆v #s F (pr22 g)) = pr22 g ⋆v h₃
transportf_square (pr21 f ;; pr21 g)%mor_disp
  (pr212 f ;; pr212 g)%mor_disp
  (h₁ ⋆v #s F (pr22 f ;;2 pr22 g)) =
transportf_square
  (assoc (pr11 f) (pr11 g) (double_coalg_map (pr1 Z)))
  (assoc (pr112 f) (pr112 g)
     (double_coalg_map (pr12 Z)))
  (pr22 f ⋆v (pr22 g ⋆v h₃))

  (double_coalg_ver_comm (pr12 g))
  (h₂ ⋆v #s F (pr22 g)) = pr22 g ⋆v h₃
transportf_square
  (assoc (pr11 f) (pr11 g) (double_coalg_map (pr1 Z)))
  (assoc (pr112 f) (pr112 g)
     (double_coalg_map (pr12 Z)))
  (pr22 f ⋆v (pr22 g ⋆v h₃)) =

  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat

X, Y, Z: E
f: E ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: E ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
h₁: double_coalg_disp_cat_ob_mor_on_twosided_disp_cat
  X

  (h₂ ⋆v #s F (pr22 g)) = pr22 g ⋆v h₃
pr22 g ⋆v h₃ = ?t2

        exact (!s₂).
      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y, Z: E
f: E ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: E ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
h₁: double_coalg_disp_cat_ob_mor_on_twosided_disp_cat
  X
h₂: double_coalg_disp_cat_ob_mor_on_twosided_disp_cat
  Y
h₃: double_coalg_disp_cat_ob_mor_on_twosided_disp_cat
  Z
s₁: transportf_square (double_coalg_ver_comm (pr1 f))
  (double_coalg_ver_comm (pr12 f))
  (h₁ ⋆v #s F (pr22 f)) = pr22 f ⋆v h₂
s₂: transportf_square (double_coalg_ver_comm (pr1 g))
  (double_coalg_ver_comm (pr12 g))
  (h₂ ⋆v #s F (pr22 g)) = pr22 g ⋆v h₃
transportf_square
  (assoc (pr11 f) (pr11 g) (double_coalg_map (pr1 Z)))
  (assoc (pr112 f) (pr112 g)
     (double_coalg_map (pr12 Z)))
  (pr22 f
   ⋆v transportf_square
        (double_coalg_ver_comm (pr1 g))
        (double_coalg_ver_comm (pr12 g))
        (h₂ ⋆v #s F (pr22 g))) =
transportf_square (pr21 f ;; pr21 g)%mor_disp
  (pr212 f ;; pr212 g)%mor_disp
  (h₁ ⋆v #s F (pr22 f ;;2 pr22 g))

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y, Z: E
f: E ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: E ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
h₁: double_coalg_disp_cat_ob_mor_on_twosided_disp_cat
  X
h₂: double_coalg_disp_cat_ob_mor_on_twosided_disp_cat
  Y
h₃: double_coalg_disp_cat_ob_mor_on_twosided_disp_cat
  Z
s₁: transportf_square (double_coalg_ver_comm (pr1 f))
  (double_coalg_ver_comm (pr12 f))
  (h₁ ⋆v #s F (pr22 f)) = pr22 f ⋆v h₂
s₂: transportf_square (double_coalg_ver_comm (pr1 g))
  (double_coalg_ver_comm (pr12 g))
  (h₂ ⋆v #s F (pr22 g)) = pr22 g ⋆v h₃
transportf_square
  (assoc (pr11 f) (pr11 g) (double_coalg_map (pr1 Z)))
  (assoc (pr112 f) (pr112 g)
     (double_coalg_map (pr12 Z)))
  (transportf_square
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr11 Y -->v F (pr1 Z), pr11 f ·v z)
        (double_coalg_ver_comm (pr1 g)))
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr112 Y -->v F (pr12 Z), pr112 f ·v z)
        (double_coalg_ver_comm (pr12 g)))
     (pr22 f ⋆v (h₂ ⋆v #s F (pr22 g)))) =
transportf_square (pr21 f ;; pr21 g)%mor_disp
  (pr212 f ;; pr212 g)%mor_disp
  (h₁ ⋆v #s F (pr22 f ;;2 pr22 g))

  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat

f: E ⟦ X, Y ⟧

  (h₂ ⋆v #s F (pr22 g)) = pr22 g ⋆v h₃
transportf_square
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr11 Y -->v F (pr1 Z), pr11 f ·v z)
     (double_coalg_ver_comm (pr1 g)) @
   assoc (pr11 f) (pr11 g) (double_coalg_map (pr1 Z)))
  (maponpaths

     (double_coalg_ver_comm (pr12 g)) @
   assoc (pr112 f) (pr112 g)
     (double_coalg_map (pr12 Z)))
  (pr22 f ⋆v (h₂ ⋆v #s F (pr22 g))) =
transportf_square (pr21 f ;; pr21 g)%mor_disp
  (pr212 f ;; pr212 g)%mor_disp
  (h₁ ⋆v #s F (pr22 f ;;2 pr22 g))

        apply (square_assoc_v (C := C)).
      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)

X, Y, Z: E
f: E ⟦ X, Y ⟧

h₁: double_coalg_disp_cat_ob_mor_on_twosided_disp_cat
  X
h₂: double_coalg_disp_cat_ob_mor_on_twosided_disp_cat
  Y

  Z

  (double_coalg_ver_comm (pr12 f))
  (h₁ ⋆v #s F (pr22 f)) = pr22 f ⋆v h₂
s₂: transportf_square (double_coalg_ver_comm (pr1 g))
  (double_coalg_ver_comm (pr12 g))
  (h₂ ⋆v #s F (pr22 g)) = pr22 g ⋆v h₃
transportf_square
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr11 Y -->v F (pr1 Z), pr11 f ·v z)
     (double_coalg_ver_comm (pr1 g)) @
   assoc (pr11 f) (pr11 g) (double_coalg_map (pr1 Z)))
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr112 Y -->v F (pr12 Z), pr112 f ·v z)
     (double_coalg_ver_comm (pr12 g)) @
   assoc (pr112 f) (pr112 g)
     (double_coalg_map (pr12 Z)))
  (transportb_square
     (assoc (pr11 f) (double_coalg_map (pr1 Y))
        (#v F (pr1 g)))
     (assoc (pr112 f) (double_coalg_map (pr12 Y))
        (#v F (pr12 g)))
     (pr22 f ⋆v h₂ ⋆v #s F (pr22 g))) =
transportf_square (pr21 f ;; pr21 g)%mor_disp
  (pr212 f ;; pr212 g)%mor_disp
  (h₁ ⋆v #s F (pr22 f ;;2 pr22 g))

  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat

X, Y, Z: E
f: E ⟦ X, Y ⟧

h₁: double_coalg_disp_cat_ob_mor_on_twosided_disp_cat
  X
h₂: double_coalg_disp_cat_ob_mor_on_twosided_disp_cat
  Y
h₃: double_coalg_disp_cat_ob_mor_on_twosided_disp_cat
  Z

  (double_coalg_ver_comm (pr12 f))
  (h₁ ⋆v #s F (pr22 f)) = pr22 f ⋆v h₂

  (double_coalg_ver_comm (pr12 g))
  (h₂ ⋆v #s F (pr22 g)) = pr22 g ⋆v h₃
transportf_square
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr11 Y -->v F (pr1 Z), pr11 f ·v z)
     (double_coalg_ver_comm (pr1 g)) @
   assoc (pr11 f) (pr11 g) (double_coalg_map (pr1 Z)))
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr112 Y -->v F (pr12 Z), pr112 f ·v z)
     (double_coalg_ver_comm (pr12 g)) @
   assoc (pr112 f) (pr112 g)
     (double_coalg_map (pr12 Z)))
  (transportf_square
     (! assoc (pr11 f) (double_coalg_map (pr1 Y))
          (#v F (pr1 g)))
     (! assoc (pr112 f) (double_coalg_map (pr12 Y))
          (#v F (pr12 g)))
     (pr22 f ⋆v h₂ ⋆v #s F (pr22 g))) =
transportf_square (pr21 f ;; pr21 g)%mor_disp
  (pr212 f ;; pr212 g)%mor_disp
  (h₁ ⋆v #s F (pr22 f ;;2 pr22 g))

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y, Z: E
f: E ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: E ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
h₁: double_coalg_disp_cat_ob_mor_on_twosided_disp_cat
  X
h₂: double_coalg_disp_cat_ob_mor_on_twosided_disp_cat
  Y
h₃: double_coalg_disp_cat_ob_mor_on_twosided_disp_cat
  Z
s₁: transportf_square (double_coalg_ver_comm (pr1 f))
  (double_coalg_ver_comm (pr12 f))
  (h₁ ⋆v #s F (pr22 f)) = pr22 f ⋆v h₂
s₂: transportf_square (double_coalg_ver_comm (pr1 g))
  (double_coalg_ver_comm (pr12 g))
  (h₂ ⋆v #s F (pr22 g)) = pr22 g ⋆v h₃
transportf_square
  (! assoc (pr11 f) (double_coalg_map (pr1 Y))
       (#v F (pr1 g)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : pr11 Y -->v F (pr1 Z), pr11 f ·v z)
     (double_coalg_ver_comm (pr1 g)) @
   assoc (pr11 f) (pr11 g) (double_coalg_map (pr1 Z)))
  (! assoc (pr112 f) (double_coalg_map (pr12 Y))
       (#v F (pr12 g)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : pr112 Y -->v F (pr12 Z), pr112 f ·v z)
     (double_coalg_ver_comm (pr12 g)) @
   assoc (pr112 f) (pr112 g)
     (double_coalg_map (pr12 Z)))
  (pr22 f ⋆v h₂ ⋆v #s F (pr22 g)) =
transportf_square (pr21 f ;; pr21 g)%mor_disp
  (pr212 f ;; pr212 g)%mor_disp
  (h₁ ⋆v #s F (pr22 f ;;2 pr22 g))

g: E ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
h₁: double_coalg_disp_cat_ob_mor_on_twosided_disp_cat
  X
h₂: double_coalg_disp_cat_ob_mor_on_twosided_disp_cat
  Y
h₃: double_coalg_disp_cat_ob_mor_on_twosided_disp_cat
  Z
s₁: transportf_square (double_coalg_ver_comm (pr1 f))
  (double_coalg_ver_comm (pr12 f))
  (h₁ ⋆v #s F (pr22 f)) = pr22 f ⋆v h₂
s₂: transportf_square (double_coalg_ver_comm (pr1 g))
  (double_coalg_ver_comm (pr12 g))
  (h₂ ⋆v #s F (pr22 g)) = pr22 g ⋆v h₃
transportf_square
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 X -->v F (pr1 Y), z ·v #v F (pr1 g))
     (double_coalg_ver_comm (pr1 f)) @
   ! assoc (pr11 f) (double_coalg_map (pr1 Y))
       (#v F (pr1 g)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : pr11 Y -->v F (pr1 Z), pr11 f ·v z)
     (double_coalg_ver_comm (pr1 g)) @
   assoc (pr11 f) (pr11 g) (double_coalg_map (pr1 Z)))
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr12 X -->v F (pr12 Y), z ·v #v F (pr12 g))
     (double_coalg_ver_comm (pr12 f)) @
   ! assoc (pr112 f) (double_coalg_map (pr12 Y))
       (#v F (pr12 g)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : pr112 Y -->v F (pr12 Z), pr112 f ·v z)
     (double_coalg_ver_comm (pr12 g)) @
   assoc (pr112 f) (pr112 g)
     (double_coalg_map (pr12 Z)))
  (transportf_square
     (assoc (double_coalg_map (pr1 X)) (#v F (pr1 f))
        (#v F (pr1 g)))
     (assoc (double_coalg_map (pr12 X))
        (#v F (pr12 f)) (#v F (pr12 g)))
     (h₁ ⋆v (#s F (pr22 f) ⋆v #s F (pr22 g)))) =
transportf_square (pr21 f ;; pr21 g)%mor_disp
  (pr212 f ;; pr212 g)%mor_disp
  (h₁ ⋆v #s F (pr22 f ;;2 pr22 g))

  (h₁ ⋆v (#s F (pr22 f) ⋆v #s F (pr22 g))) =

?b =

     (λ z : pr112 Y -->v F (pr12 Z), pr112 f ·v z)

C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y, Z: E
f: E ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: E ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
h₁: double_coalg_disp_cat_ob_mor_on_twosided_disp_cat
  X
h₂: double_coalg_disp_cat_ob_mor_on_twosided_disp_cat
  Y
h₃: double_coalg_disp_cat_ob_mor_on_twosided_disp_cat
  Z
s₁: transportf_square (double_coalg_ver_comm (pr1 f))
  (double_coalg_ver_comm (pr12 f))
  (h₁ ⋆v #s F (pr22 f)) = pr22 f ⋆v h₂
s₂: transportf_square (double_coalg_ver_comm (pr1 g))
  (double_coalg_ver_comm (pr12 g))
  (h₂ ⋆v #s F (pr22 g)) = pr22 g ⋆v h₃
transportf_square (pr21 f ;; pr21 g)%mor_disp
  (pr212 f ;; pr212 g)%mor_disp
  (h₁
   ⋆v transportb_square
        (lax_double_functor_comp_v F (pr11 f) (pr11 g))
        (lax_double_functor_comp_v F (pr112 f)
           (pr112 g)) (#s F (pr22 f) ⋆v #s F (pr22 g))) =
transportf_square
  (assoc (double_coalg_map (pr1 X)) (#v F (pr1 f))
     (#v F (pr1 g)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 X -->v F (pr1 Y), z ·v #v F (pr1 g))
     (double_coalg_ver_comm (pr1 f)) @
   ! assoc (pr11 f) (double_coalg_map (pr1 Y))
       (#v F (pr1 g)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : pr11 Y -->v F (pr1 Z), pr11 f ·v z)
     (double_coalg_ver_comm (pr1 g)) @
   assoc (pr11 f) (pr11 g) (double_coalg_map (pr1 Z)))
  (assoc (double_coalg_map (pr12 X)) (#v F (pr12 f))
     (#v F (pr12 g)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : pr12 X -->v F (pr12 Y), z ·v #v F (pr12 g))
     (double_coalg_ver_comm (pr12 f)) @
   ! assoc (pr112 f) (double_coalg_map (pr12 Y))
       (#v F (pr12 g)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : pr112 Y -->v F (pr12 Z), pr112 f ·v z)
     (double_coalg_ver_comm (pr12 g)) @
   assoc (pr112 f) (pr112 g)
     (double_coalg_map (pr12 Z)))
  (h₁ ⋆v (#s F (pr22 f) ⋆v #s F (pr22 g)))

  (double_coalg_ver_comm (pr12 g))
  (h₂ ⋆v #s F (pr22 g)) = pr22 g ⋆v h₃
transportf_square (pr21 f ;; pr21 g)%mor_disp
  (pr212 f ;; pr212 g)%mor_disp
  (h₁
   ⋆v transportf_square
        (! lax_double_functor_comp_v F (pr11 f)
             (pr11 g))
        (! lax_double_functor_comp_v F (pr112 f)
             (pr112 g))
        (#s F (pr22 f) ⋆v #s F (pr22 g))) =
transportf_square
  (assoc (double_coalg_map (pr1 X)) (#v F (pr1 f))
     (#v F (pr1 g)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 X -->v F (pr1 Y), z ·v #v F (pr1 g))
     (double_coalg_ver_comm (pr1 f)) @
   ! assoc (pr11 f) (double_coalg_map (pr1 Y))
       (#v F (pr1 g)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : pr11 Y -->v F (pr1 Z), pr11 f ·v z)
     (double_coalg_ver_comm (pr1 g)) @
   assoc (pr11 f) (pr11 g) (double_coalg_map (pr1 Z)))
  (assoc (double_coalg_map (pr12 X)) (#v F (pr12 f))
     (#v F (pr12 g)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : pr12 X -->v F (pr12 Y), z ·v #v F (pr12 g))
     (double_coalg_ver_comm (pr12 f)) @
   ! assoc (pr112 f) (double_coalg_map (pr12 Y))
       (#v F (pr12 g)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : pr112 Y -->v F (pr12 Z), pr112 f ·v z)
     (double_coalg_ver_comm (pr12 g)) @
   assoc (pr112 f) (pr112 g)
     (double_coalg_map (pr12 Z)))
  (h₁ ⋆v (#s F (pr22 f) ⋆v #s F (pr22 g)))

F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)

X, Y, Z: E
f: E ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: E ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
h₁: double_coalg_disp_cat_ob_mor_on_twosided_disp_cat
  X
h₂: double_coalg_disp_cat_ob_mor_on_twosided_disp_cat
  Y
h₃: double_coalg_disp_cat_ob_mor_on_twosided_disp_cat
  Z
s₁: transportf_square (double_coalg_ver_comm (pr1 f))
  (double_coalg_ver_comm (pr12 f))
  (h₁ ⋆v #s F (pr22 f)) = pr22 f ⋆v h₂
s₂: transportf_square (double_coalg_ver_comm (pr1 g))
  (double_coalg_ver_comm (pr12 g))
  (h₂ ⋆v #s F (pr22 g)) = pr22 g ⋆v h₃
transportf_square (pr21 f ;; pr21 g)%mor_disp
  (pr212 f ;; pr212 g)%mor_disp
  (transportf_square
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : F (pr1 X) -->v F (pr1 Z),
         double_coalg_map (pr1 X) ·v z)
        (! lax_double_functor_comp_v F (pr11 f)
             (pr11 g)))
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : F (pr12 X) -->v F (pr12 Z),
         double_coalg_map (pr12 X) ·v z)
        (! lax_double_functor_comp_v F (pr112 f)
             (pr112 g)))
     (h₁ ⋆v (#s F (pr22 f) ⋆v #s F (pr22 g)))) =
transportf_square
  (assoc (double_coalg_map (pr1 X)) (#v F (pr1 f))
     (#v F (pr1 g)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 X -->v F (pr1 Y), z ·v #v F (pr1 g))
     (double_coalg_ver_comm (pr1 f)) @
   ! assoc (pr11 f) (double_coalg_map (pr1 Y))
       (#v F (pr1 g)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : pr11 Y -->v F (pr1 Z), pr11 f ·v z)
     (double_coalg_ver_comm (pr1 g)) @
   assoc (pr11 f) (pr11 g) (double_coalg_map (pr1 Z)))
  (assoc (double_coalg_map (pr12 X)) (#v F (pr12 f))
     (#v F (pr12 g)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : pr12 X -->v F (pr12 Y), z ·v #v F (pr12 g))
     (double_coalg_ver_comm (pr12 f)) @
   ! assoc (pr112 f) (double_coalg_map (pr12 Y))
       (#v F (pr12 g)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : pr112 Y -->v F (pr12 Z), pr112 f ·v z)
     (double_coalg_ver_comm (pr12 g)) @
   assoc (pr112 f) (pr112 g)
     (double_coalg_map (pr12 Z)))
  (h₁ ⋆v (#s F (pr22 f) ⋆v #s F (pr22 g)))

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y, Z: E
f: E ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: E ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
h₁: double_coalg_disp_cat_ob_mor_on_twosided_disp_cat
  X
h₂: double_coalg_disp_cat_ob_mor_on_twosided_disp_cat
  Y
h₃: double_coalg_disp_cat_ob_mor_on_twosided_disp_cat
  Z
s₁: transportf_square (double_coalg_ver_comm (pr1 f))
  (double_coalg_ver_comm (pr12 f))
  (h₁ ⋆v #s F (pr22 f)) = pr22 f ⋆v h₂
s₂: transportf_square (double_coalg_ver_comm (pr1 g))
  (double_coalg_ver_comm (pr12 g))
  (h₂ ⋆v #s F (pr22 g)) = pr22 g ⋆v h₃
transportf_square
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : F (pr1 X) -->v F (pr1 Z),
      double_coalg_map (pr1 X) ·v z)
     (! lax_double_functor_comp_v F (pr11 f) (pr11 g)) @
   (pr21 f ;; pr21 g)%mor_disp)
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : F (pr12 X) -->v F (pr12 Z),
      double_coalg_map (pr12 X) ·v z)
     (! lax_double_functor_comp_v F (pr112 f)
          (pr112 g)) @ (pr212 f ;; pr212 g)%mor_disp)
  (h₁ ⋆v (#s F (pr22 f) ⋆v #s F (pr22 g))) =
transportf_square
  (assoc (double_coalg_map (pr1 X)) (#v F (pr1 f))
     (#v F (pr1 g)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 X -->v F (pr1 Y), z ·v #v F (pr1 g))
     (double_coalg_ver_comm (pr1 f)) @
   ! assoc (pr11 f) (double_coalg_map (pr1 Y))
       (#v F (pr1 g)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : pr11 Y -->v F (pr1 Z), pr11 f ·v z)
     (double_coalg_ver_comm (pr1 g)) @
   assoc (pr11 f) (pr11 g) (double_coalg_map (pr1 Z)))
  (assoc (double_coalg_map (pr12 X)) (#v F (pr12 f))
     (#v F (pr12 g)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : pr12 X -->v F (pr12 Y), z ·v #v F (pr12 g))
     (double_coalg_ver_comm (pr12 f)) @
   ! assoc (pr112 f) (double_coalg_map (pr12 Y))
       (#v F (pr12 g)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : pr112 Y -->v F (pr12 Z), pr112 f ·v z)
     (double_coalg_ver_comm (pr12 g)) @
   assoc (pr112 f) (pr112 g)
     (double_coalg_map (pr12 Z)))
  (h₁ ⋆v (#s F (pr22 f) ⋆v #s F (pr22 g)))

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y, Z: E
f: E ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: E ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
h₁: double_coalg_disp_cat_ob_mor_on_twosided_disp_cat
  X
h₂: double_coalg_disp_cat_ob_mor_on_twosided_disp_cat
  Y
h₃: double_coalg_disp_cat_ob_mor_on_twosided_disp_cat
  Z
s₁: transportf_square (double_coalg_ver_comm (pr1 f))
  (double_coalg_ver_comm (pr12 f))
  (h₁ ⋆v #s F (pr22 f)) = pr22 f ⋆v h₂
s₂: transportf_square (double_coalg_ver_comm (pr1 g))
  (double_coalg_ver_comm (pr12 g))
  (h₂ ⋆v #s F (pr22 g)) = pr22 g ⋆v h₃
h₁ ⋆v (#s F (pr22 f) ⋆v #s F (pr22 g)) =
h₁ ⋆v (#s F (pr22 f) ⋆v #s F (pr22 g))

      apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
disp_cat_data E

 exact double_coalg_disp_cat_id_comp_on_twosided_disp_cat.
  Defined.

C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat

C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
x, y: E
f: E ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: double_coalg_disp_cat_data_on_twosided_disp_cat x
yy: pr1
  double_coalg_disp_cat_data_on_twosided_disp_cat
  y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(id_disp xx ;; ff)%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp xx yy) (id_left f) ff
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
x, y: E
f: E ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: double_coalg_disp_cat_data_on_twosided_disp_cat x
yy: pr1
  double_coalg_disp_cat_data_on_twosided_disp_cat
  y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(ff ;; id_disp yy)%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp xx yy) (id_right f) ff
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
x, y, z, w: E
f: E ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: E ⟦ y, z ⟧
h: E ⟦ z, w ⟧
xx: double_coalg_disp_cat_data_on_twosided_disp_cat x
yy: double_coalg_disp_cat_data_on_twosided_disp_cat y
zz: double_coalg_disp_cat_data_on_twosided_disp_cat z
ww: double_coalg_disp_cat_data_on_twosided_disp_cat w
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
hh: zz -->[ h] ww
(ff ;; (gg ;; hh))%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp xx ww) (assoc f g h)
  (ff ;; gg ;; hh)%mor_disp
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
x, y: E
f: E ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: double_coalg_disp_cat_data_on_twosided_disp_cat x
yy: double_coalg_disp_cat_data_on_twosided_disp_cat y
isaset (xx -->[ f] yy)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
x, y: E
f: E ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: double_coalg_disp_cat_data_on_twosided_disp_cat x
yy: pr1
  double_coalg_disp_cat_data_on_twosided_disp_cat
  y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(id_disp xx ;; ff)%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp xx yy) (id_left f) ff
 apply isaset_square.

  y

(ff ;; id_disp yy)%mor_disp =

 apply isaset_square.

  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
x, y, z, w: E
f: E ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: E ⟦ y, z ⟧
h: E ⟦ z, w ⟧

yy: double_coalg_disp_cat_data_on_twosided_disp_cat y
zz: double_coalg_disp_cat_data_on_twosided_disp_cat z
ww: double_coalg_disp_cat_data_on_twosided_disp_cat w

gg: yy -->[ g] zz
hh: zz -->[ h] ww
(ff ;; (gg ;; hh))%mor_disp =

  (ff ;; gg ;; hh)%mor_disp

yy: double_coalg_disp_cat_data_on_twosided_disp_cat y

xx: double_coalg_disp_cat_data_on_twosided_disp_cat x
yy: double_coalg_disp_cat_data_on_twosided_disp_cat y
isaprop (xx -->[ f] yy)

      apply isaset_square.
  Qed.

C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)

 exact double_coalg_disp_cat_data_on_twosided_disp_cat.
    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
disp_cat_axioms E
  double_coalg_disp_cat_data_on_twosided_disp_cat
 exact double_coalg_disp_cat_axioms_on_twosided_disp_cat.
  Defined.

  Definition double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat
    : twosided_disp_cat (CoAlg_category F) (CoAlg_category F)
    := sigma_twosided_disp_cat _ double_coalg_disp_cat_on_twosided_disp_cat.

  (** * 3. Builders and accessors for horizontal morphisms *)
  Definition double_coalg_hor
             (X Y : double_coalg F)
    : UU
    := double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat X Y.

  Definition make_double_coalg_hor
             {X Y : double_coalg F}
             (h : X -->h Y)
             (s : double_coalg_hor_struct X Y h)
    : double_coalg_hor X Y
    := h ,, s.

  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h: double_coalg_hor X Y
X -->h Y

  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h: double_coalg_hor X Y
X -->h Y

    exact (pr1 h).
  Defined.

  (** * 4. Builders and accessors for squares *)
  Definition sqr_of_double_coalg_hor
             {X Y : double_coalg F}
             (h : double_coalg_hor X Y)
    : square (double_coalg_map X) (double_coalg_map Y) h (#h F h)
    := pr2 h.

  Definition double_coalg_sqr
             {X₁ X₂ Y₁ Y₂ : double_coalg F}
             (v : double_coalg_ver X₁ X₂)
             (w : double_coalg_ver Y₁ Y₂)
             (h₁ : double_coalg_hor X₁ Y₁)
             (h₂ : double_coalg_hor X₂ Y₂)
    : UU
    := h₁ -->[ v ][ w ] h₂.

  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂: double_coalg F
v: double_coalg_ver X₁ X₂
w: double_coalg_ver Y₁ Y₂
h₁: double_coalg_hor X₁ Y₁
h₂: double_coalg_hor X₂ Y₂
s: double_coalg_sqr v w h₁ h₂
square v w h₁ h₂

  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂: double_coalg F
v: double_coalg_ver X₁ X₂
w: double_coalg_ver Y₁ Y₂
h₁: double_coalg_hor X₁ Y₁
h₂: double_coalg_hor X₂ Y₂
s: double_coalg_sqr v w h₁ h₂
square v w h₁ h₂

    exact (pr1 s).
  Defined.

  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂: double_coalg F
v: double_coalg_ver X₁ X₂
w: double_coalg_ver Y₁ Y₂
h₁: double_coalg_hor X₁ Y₁
h₂: double_coalg_hor X₂ Y₂
s: double_coalg_sqr v w h₁ h₂
transportf_square (double_coalg_ver_comm v)
  (double_coalg_ver_comm w)
  (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁ ⋆v #s F s) =
s ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂

  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂: double_coalg F
v: double_coalg_ver X₁ X₂
w: double_coalg_ver Y₁ Y₂
h₁: double_coalg_hor X₁ Y₁
h₂: double_coalg_hor X₂ Y₂
s: double_coalg_sqr v w h₁ h₂
transportf_square (double_coalg_ver_comm v)
  (double_coalg_ver_comm w)
  (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁ ⋆v #s F s) =
s ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂

    exact (pr2 s).
  Defined.

  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂: double_coalg F
v: double_coalg_ver X₁ X₂
w: double_coalg_ver Y₁ Y₂
h₁: double_coalg_hor X₁ Y₁
h₂: double_coalg_hor X₂ Y₂
s: double_coalg_sqr v w h₁ h₂
sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁ ⋆v #s F s =
transportb_square (double_coalg_ver_comm v)
  (double_coalg_ver_comm w)
  (s ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂)

  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂: double_coalg F
v: double_coalg_ver X₁ X₂
w: double_coalg_ver Y₁ Y₂
h₁: double_coalg_hor X₁ Y₁
h₂: double_coalg_hor X₂ Y₂
s: double_coalg_sqr v w h₁ h₂
sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁ ⋆v #s F s =
transportb_square (double_coalg_ver_comm v)
  (double_coalg_ver_comm w)
  (s ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂: double_coalg F
v: double_coalg_ver X₁ X₂
w: double_coalg_ver Y₁ Y₂
h₁: double_coalg_hor X₁ Y₁
h₂: double_coalg_hor X₂ Y₂
s: double_coalg_sqr v w h₁ h₂
sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁ ⋆v #s F s =
transportb_square (double_coalg_ver_comm v)
  (double_coalg_ver_comm w)
  (transportf_square (double_coalg_ver_comm v)
     (double_coalg_ver_comm w)
     (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁ ⋆v #s F s))

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂: double_coalg F
v: double_coalg_ver X₁ X₂
w: double_coalg_ver Y₁ Y₂
h₁: double_coalg_hor X₁ Y₁
h₂: double_coalg_hor X₂ Y₂
s: double_coalg_sqr v w h₁ h₂
sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁ ⋆v #s F s =
sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁ ⋆v #s F s

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  Definition make_double_coalg_sqr
             {X₁ X₂ Y₁ Y₂ : double_coalg F}
             {v : double_coalg_ver X₁ X₂}
             {w : double_coalg_ver Y₁ Y₂}
             {h₁ : double_coalg_hor X₁ Y₁}
             {h₂ : double_coalg_hor X₂ Y₂}
             (s : square v w h₁ h₂)
             (p : is_double_coalg_sqr (pr2 h₁) (pr2 h₂) _ _ s)
    : double_coalg_sqr v w h₁ h₂
    := s ,, p.

  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂: double_coalg F
v: double_coalg_ver X₁ X₂
w: double_coalg_ver Y₁ Y₂
h₁: double_coalg_hor X₁ Y₁
h₂: double_coalg_hor X₂ Y₂
s₁, s₂: double_coalg_sqr v w h₁ h₂
p: s₁ = s₂
s₁ = s₂

  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂: double_coalg F
v: double_coalg_ver X₁ X₂
w: double_coalg_ver Y₁ Y₂
h₁: double_coalg_hor X₁ Y₁
h₂: double_coalg_hor X₂ Y₂
s₁, s₂: double_coalg_sqr v w h₁ h₂
p: s₁ = s₂
s₁ = s₂

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂: double_coalg F
v: double_coalg_ver X₁ X₂
w: double_coalg_ver Y₁ Y₂
h₁: double_coalg_hor X₁ Y₁
h₂: double_coalg_hor X₂ Y₂
s₁, s₂: double_coalg_sqr v w h₁ h₂
p: s₁ = s₂
isPredicate
  (λ x : pr1 h₁ -->[ v ][ w] pr1 h₂,
   pr2 h₁ -->[ v,, w,, x] pr2 h₂)
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂: double_coalg F
v: double_coalg_ver X₁ X₂
w: double_coalg_ver Y₁ Y₂
h₁: double_coalg_hor X₁ Y₁
h₂: double_coalg_hor X₂ Y₂
s₁, s₂: double_coalg_sqr v w h₁ h₂
p: s₁ = s₂
pr1 s₁ = pr1 s₂

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂: double_coalg F
v: double_coalg_ver X₁ X₂
w: double_coalg_ver Y₁ Y₂
h₁: double_coalg_hor X₁ Y₁
h₂: double_coalg_hor X₂ Y₂
s₁, s₂: double_coalg_sqr v w h₁ h₂
p: s₁ = s₂
isPredicate
  (λ x : pr1 h₁ -->[ v ][ w] pr1 h₂,
   pr2 h₁ -->[ v,, w,, x] pr2 h₂)

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂: double_coalg F
v: double_coalg_ver X₁ X₂
w: double_coalg_ver Y₁ Y₂
h₁: double_coalg_hor X₁ Y₁
h₂: double_coalg_hor X₂ Y₂
s₁, s₂: double_coalg_sqr v w h₁ h₂
p: s₁ = s₂
x: pr1 h₁ -->[ v ][ w] pr1 h₂
isaprop (pr2 h₁ -->[ v,, w,, x] pr2 h₂)

      apply isaset_square.
    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂: double_coalg F
v: double_coalg_ver X₁ X₂
w: double_coalg_ver Y₁ Y₂
h₁: double_coalg_hor X₁ Y₁
h₂: double_coalg_hor X₂ Y₂
s₁, s₂: double_coalg_sqr v w h₁ h₂
p: s₁ = s₂
pr1 s₁ = pr1 s₂

    exact p.
  Qed.

  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂: double_coalg F
v, v': double_coalg_ver X₁ X₂
p: v = v'
w, w': double_coalg_ver Y₁ Y₂
q: w = w'
h₁: double_coalg_hor X₁ Y₁
h₂: double_coalg_hor X₂ Y₂
s: double_coalg_sqr v w h₁ h₂
pr1 (trf₂ s) =
transportf_square
  (maponpaths double_coalg_ver_to_mor p)
  (maponpaths double_coalg_ver_to_mor q) s

  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂: double_coalg F
v, v': double_coalg_ver X₁ X₂
p: v = v'
w, w': double_coalg_ver Y₁ Y₂
q: w = w'
h₁: double_coalg_hor X₁ Y₁
h₂: double_coalg_hor X₂ Y₂
s: double_coalg_sqr v w h₁ h₂
pr1 (trf₂ s) =
transportf_square
  (maponpaths double_coalg_ver_to_mor p)
  (maponpaths double_coalg_ver_to_mor q) s

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂: double_coalg F
v: double_coalg_ver X₁ X₂
w: double_coalg_ver Y₁ Y₂
h₁: double_coalg_hor X₁ Y₁
h₂: double_coalg_hor X₂ Y₂
s: double_coalg_sqr v w h₁ h₂
pr1 s = s

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂: double_coalg F
v, v': double_coalg_ver X₁ X₂
p: v' = v
w, w': double_coalg_ver Y₁ Y₂
q: w' = w
h₁: double_coalg_hor X₁ Y₁
h₂: double_coalg_hor X₂ Y₂
s: double_coalg_sqr v w h₁ h₂
pr1 (trb₂ s) =
transportb_square
  (maponpaths double_coalg_ver_to_mor p)
  (maponpaths double_coalg_ver_to_mor q) s

  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂: double_coalg F
v, v': double_coalg_ver X₁ X₂
p: v' = v
w, w': double_coalg_ver Y₁ Y₂
q: w' = w
h₁: double_coalg_hor X₁ Y₁
h₂: double_coalg_hor X₂ Y₂
s: double_coalg_sqr v w h₁ h₂
pr1 (trb₂ s) =
transportb_square
  (maponpaths double_coalg_ver_to_mor p)
  (maponpaths double_coalg_ver_to_mor q) s

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂: double_coalg F
v': double_coalg_ver X₁ X₂
w': double_coalg_ver Y₁ Y₂
h₁: double_coalg_hor X₁ Y₁
h₂: double_coalg_hor X₂ Y₂
s: double_coalg_sqr v' w' h₁ h₂
pr1 s = s

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  (** * 5. Horizontal identities *)
  Definition double_coalg_id_hor_struct
             (X : double_coalg F)
    : double_coalg_hor_struct X X (identity_h (coalg_carrier F X))
    := transportf_square
         (id_right _) (id_right _)
         (id_h_square _ ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F (pr1 X)).

  Arguments double_coalg_id_hor_struct X /.

  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X: double_coalg F
double_coalg_hor X X

  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X: double_coalg F
double_coalg_hor X X

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X: double_coalg F
X -->h X
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X: double_coalg F
double_coalg_hor_struct X X ?h

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X: double_coalg F
X -->h X
 exact (identity_h _).
    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X: double_coalg F
double_coalg_hor_struct X X (identity_h X)
 exact (double_coalg_id_hor_struct X).
  Defined.

  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
v: double_coalg_ver X Y
is_double_coalg_sqr (double_coalg_id_hor_struct X)
  (double_coalg_id_hor_struct Y) v v (id_h_square v)

  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
v: double_coalg_ver X Y
is_double_coalg_sqr (double_coalg_id_hor_struct X)
  (double_coalg_id_hor_struct Y) v v (id_h_square v)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
v: double_coalg_ver X Y
transportf_square (double_coalg_ver_comm v)
  (double_coalg_ver_comm v)
  (transportf_square (id_right (double_coalg_map X))
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X))
     (id_h_square (double_coalg_map X)
      ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F (pr1 X))
   ⋆v #s F (id_h_square v)) =
id_h_square v
⋆v transportf_square (id_right (double_coalg_map Y))
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Y))
     (id_h_square (double_coalg_map Y)
      ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F (pr1 Y))

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
v: double_coalg_ver X Y
transportf_square (double_coalg_ver_comm v)
  (double_coalg_ver_comm v)
  (transportf_square (id_right (double_coalg_map X))
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X))
     (id_h_square (double_coalg_map X)
      ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F (pr1 X))
   ⋆v #s F (id_h_square v)) =
transportf_square
  (maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, v ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Y)))
  (maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, v ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Y)))
  (id_h_square v
   ⋆v (id_h_square (double_coalg_map Y)
       ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F (pr1 Y)))

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
v: double_coalg_ver X Y
transportf_square (double_coalg_ver_comm v)
  (double_coalg_ver_comm v)
  (transportf_square
     (maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, z ·v #v F v)
        (id_right (double_coalg_map X)))
     (maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, z ·v #v F v)
        (id_right (double_coalg_map X)))
     (id_h_square (double_coalg_map X)
      ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F (pr1 X)
      ⋆v #s F (id_h_square v))) =
transportf_square
  (maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, v ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Y)))
  (maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, v ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Y)))
  (id_h_square v
   ⋆v (id_h_square (double_coalg_map Y)
       ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F (pr1 Y)))

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
v: double_coalg_ver X Y
transportf_square
  (maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, z ·v #v F v)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v)
  (maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, z ·v #v F v)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v)
  (id_h_square (double_coalg_map X)
   ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F (pr1 X)
   ⋆v #s F (id_h_square v)) =
transportf_square
  (maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, v ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Y)))
  (maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, v ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Y)))
  (id_h_square v
   ⋆v (id_h_square (double_coalg_map Y)
       ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F (pr1 Y)))

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
v: double_coalg_ver X Y
transportf_square
  (maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, z ·v #v F v)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v)
  (maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, z ·v #v F v)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v)
  (id_h_square (double_coalg_map X)
   ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F (pr1 X)
   ⋆v #s F (id_h_square v)) = ?b
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
v: double_coalg_ver X Y
?b =
transportf_square
  (maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, v ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Y)))
  (maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, v ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Y)))
  (id_h_square v
   ⋆v (id_h_square (double_coalg_map Y)
       ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F (pr1 Y)))

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
v: double_coalg_ver X Y
transportf_square
  (maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, z ·v #v F v)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v)
  (maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, z ·v #v F v)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v)
  (id_h_square (double_coalg_map X)
   ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F (pr1 X)
   ⋆v #s F (id_h_square v)) = ?b

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
v: double_coalg_ver X Y
id_h_square (double_coalg_map X)
⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F (pr1 X)
⋆v #s F (id_h_square v) = ?t2

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
v: double_coalg_ver X Y
?t2 =
id_h_square (double_coalg_map X)
⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F (pr1 X)
⋆v #s F (id_h_square v)

      apply (square_assoc_v' (C := C)).
    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
v: double_coalg_ver X Y
transportf_square
  (maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, z ·v #v F v)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v)
  (maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, z ·v #v F v)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v)
  (transportf_square
     (assoc (double_coalg_map X) (id₁ (F (pr1 X)))
        (#v F v))
     (assoc (double_coalg_map X) (id₁ (F (pr1 X)))
        (#v F v))
     (id_h_square (double_coalg_map X)
      ⋆v (lax_double_functor_id_h F (pr1 X)
          ⋆v #s F (id_h_square v)))) =
transportf_square
  (maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, v ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Y)))
  (maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, v ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Y)))
  (id_h_square v
   ⋆v (id_h_square (double_coalg_map Y)
       ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F (pr1 Y)))

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
v: double_coalg_ver X Y
transportf_square
  (assoc (double_coalg_map X) (id₁ (F (pr1 X)))
     (#v F v) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, z ·v #v F v)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v)
  (assoc (double_coalg_map X) (id₁ (F (pr1 X)))
     (#v F v) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, z ·v #v F v)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v)
  (id_h_square (double_coalg_map X)
   ⋆v (lax_double_functor_id_h F (pr1 X)
       ⋆v #s F (id_h_square v))) =
transportf_square
  (maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, v ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Y)))
  (maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, v ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Y)))
  (id_h_square v
   ⋆v (id_h_square (double_coalg_map Y)
       ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F (pr1 Y)))

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
v: double_coalg_ver X Y
transportf_square
  (assoc (double_coalg_map X) (id₁ (F (pr1 X)))
     (#v F v) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, z ·v #v F v)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v)
  (assoc (double_coalg_map X) (id₁ (F (pr1 X)))
     (#v F v) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, z ·v #v F v)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v)
  (id_h_square (double_coalg_map X)
   ⋆v (lax_double_functor_id_h F (pr1 X)
       ⋆v #s F (id_h_square v))) = ?b
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
v: double_coalg_ver X Y
?b =
transportf_square
  (maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, v ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Y)))
  (maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, v ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Y)))
  (id_h_square v
   ⋆v (id_h_square (double_coalg_map Y)
       ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F (pr1 Y)))

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
v: double_coalg_ver X Y
transportf_square
  (assoc (double_coalg_map X) (id₁ (F (pr1 X)))
     (#v F v) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, z ·v #v F v)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v)
  (assoc (double_coalg_map X) (id₁ (F (pr1 X)))
     (#v F v) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, z ·v #v F v)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v)
  (id_h_square (double_coalg_map X)
   ⋆v (lax_double_functor_id_h F (pr1 X)
       ⋆v #s F (id_h_square v))) = ?b

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
v: double_coalg_ver X Y
lax_double_functor_id_h F (pr1 X)
⋆v #s F (id_h_square v) = ?t2

      apply (lax_double_functor_id_h_mor' F).
    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
v: double_coalg_ver X Y
transportf_square
  (assoc (double_coalg_map X) (id₁ (F (pr1 X)))
     (#v F v) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, z ·v #v F v)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v)
  (assoc (double_coalg_map X) (id₁ (F (pr1 X)))
     (#v F v) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, z ·v #v F v)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v)
  (id_h_square (double_coalg_map X)
   ⋆v transportf_square
        (id_v_right (#v F v) @ ! id_v_left (#v F v))
        (id_v_right (#v F v) @ ! id_v_left (#v F v))
        (id_h_square (#v F v)
         ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F Y)) =
transportf_square
  (maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, v ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Y)))
  (maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, v ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Y)))
  (id_h_square v
   ⋆v (id_h_square (double_coalg_map Y)
       ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F (pr1 Y)))

     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)

  (assoc (double_coalg_map X) (id₁ (F (pr1 X)))

     (id_right (double_coalg_map X)) @

  (assoc (double_coalg_map X) (id₁ (F (pr1 X)))

   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, z ·v #v F v)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v)
  (transportf_square
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : F (pr1 X) -->v F Y,
         double_coalg_map X ·v z)
        (id_v_right (#v F v) @ ! id_v_left (#v F v)))
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : F (pr1 X) -->v F Y,

        (id_v_right (#v F v) @ ! id_v_left (#v F v)))
     (id_h_square (double_coalg_map X)
      ⋆v (id_h_square (#v F v)
          ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F Y))) =
transportf_square
  (maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, v ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Y)))
  (maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, v ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Y)))
  (id_h_square v
   ⋆v (id_h_square (double_coalg_map Y)
       ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F (pr1 Y)))

      apply (square_assoc_v (C := C)).
    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
v: double_coalg_ver X Y
transportf_square
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : F (pr1 X) -->v F Y,
      double_coalg_map X ·v z)
     (id_v_right (#v F v) @ ! id_v_left (#v F v)) @
   assoc (double_coalg_map X) (id₁ (F (pr1 X)))
     (#v F v) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, z ·v #v F v)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v)
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : F (pr1 X) -->v F Y,
      double_coalg_map X ·v z)
     (id_v_right (#v F v) @ ! id_v_left (#v F v)) @
   assoc (double_coalg_map X) (id₁ (F (pr1 X)))
     (#v F v) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, z ·v #v F v)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v)
  (transportb_square
     (assoc (double_coalg_map X) (#v F v)
        (identity_v (F Y)))
     (assoc (double_coalg_map X) (#v F v)
        (identity_v (F Y)))
     (id_h_square (double_coalg_map X)
      ⋆v id_h_square (#v F v)
      ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F Y)) =
transportf_square
  (maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, v ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Y)))
  (maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, v ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Y)))
  (id_h_square v
   ⋆v (id_h_square (double_coalg_map Y)
       ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F (pr1 Y)))

      exact (id_h_square_eq (coalgebra_mor_commutes F v)).
    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
v: double_coalg_ver X Y
transportf_square
  (! assoc (double_coalg_map X) (#v F v)
       (identity_v (F Y)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : F (pr1 X) -->v F Y,
      double_coalg_map X ·v z)
     (id_v_right (#v F v) @ ! id_v_left (#v F v)) @
   assoc (double_coalg_map X) (id₁ (F (pr1 X)))
     (#v F v) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, z ·v #v F v)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v)
  (! assoc (double_coalg_map X) (#v F v)
       (identity_v (F Y)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : F (pr1 X) -->v F Y,
      double_coalg_map X ·v z)
     (id_v_right (#v F v) @ ! id_v_left (#v F v)) @
   assoc (double_coalg_map X) (id₁ (F (pr1 X)))
     (#v F v) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, z ·v #v F v)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v)
  (transportf_square (! coalgebra_mor_commutes F v)
     (! coalgebra_mor_commutes F v)
     (id_h_square (pr1 v · coalg_map F Y))
   ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F Y) =
transportf_square
  (maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, v ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Y)))
  (maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, v ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Y)))
  (id_h_square v
   ⋆v (id_h_square (double_coalg_map Y)
       ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F (pr1 Y)))

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
v: double_coalg_ver X Y
transportf_square
  (! assoc (double_coalg_map X) (#v F v)
       (identity_v (F Y)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : F (pr1 X) -->v F Y,
      double_coalg_map X ·v z)
     (id_v_right (#v F v) @ ! id_v_left (#v F v)) @
   assoc (double_coalg_map X) (id₁ (F (pr1 X)))
     (#v F v) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, z ·v #v F v)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v)
  (! assoc (double_coalg_map X) (#v F v)
       (identity_v (F Y)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : F (pr1 X) -->v F Y,
      double_coalg_map X ·v z)
     (id_v_right (#v F v) @ ! id_v_left (#v F v)) @
   assoc (double_coalg_map X) (id₁ (F (pr1 X)))
     (#v F v) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, z ·v #v F v)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v)
  (transportf_square
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : X -->v F Y, z ·v identity_v (F Y))
        (! coalgebra_mor_commutes F v))
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : X -->v F Y, z ·v identity_v (F Y))
        (! coalgebra_mor_commutes F v))
     (id_h_square (pr1 v · coalg_map F Y)
      ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F Y)) =
transportf_square
  (maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, v ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Y)))
  (maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, v ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Y)))
  (id_h_square v
   ⋆v (id_h_square (double_coalg_map Y)
       ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F (pr1 Y)))

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
v: double_coalg_ver X Y
transportf_square
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : X -->v F Y, z ·v identity_v (F Y))
     (! coalgebra_mor_commutes F v) @
   ! assoc (double_coalg_map X) (#v F v)
       (identity_v (F Y)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : F (pr1 X) -->v F Y,
      double_coalg_map X ·v z)
     (id_v_right (#v F v) @ ! id_v_left (#v F v)) @
   assoc (double_coalg_map X) (id₁ (F (pr1 X)))
     (#v F v) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, z ·v #v F v)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v)
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : X -->v F Y, z ·v identity_v (F Y))
     (! coalgebra_mor_commutes F v) @
   ! assoc (double_coalg_map X) (#v F v)
       (identity_v (F Y)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : F (pr1 X) -->v F Y,
      double_coalg_map X ·v z)
     (id_v_right (#v F v) @ ! id_v_left (#v F v)) @
   assoc (double_coalg_map X) (id₁ (F (pr1 X)))
     (#v F v) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, z ·v #v F v)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v)
  (id_h_square (pr1 v · coalg_map F Y)
   ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F Y) =
transportf_square
  (maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, v ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Y)))
  (maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, v ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Y)))
  (id_h_square v
   ⋆v (id_h_square (double_coalg_map Y)
       ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F (pr1 Y)))

  (maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, v ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Y)))

   ⋆v (id_h_square (double_coalg_map Y)

C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
v: double_coalg_ver X Y
?b =
transportf_square
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : X -->v F Y, z ·v identity_v (F Y))
     (! coalgebra_mor_commutes F v) @
   ! assoc (double_coalg_map X) (#v F v)
       (identity_v (F Y)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : F (pr1 X) -->v F Y,
      double_coalg_map X ·v z)
     (id_v_right (#v F v) @ ! id_v_left (#v F v)) @
   assoc (double_coalg_map X) (id₁ (F (pr1 X)))
     (#v F v) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, z ·v #v F v)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v)
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : X -->v F Y, z ·v identity_v (F Y))
     (! coalgebra_mor_commutes F v) @
   ! assoc (double_coalg_map X) (#v F v)
       (identity_v (F Y)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : F (pr1 X) -->v F Y,
      double_coalg_map X ·v z)
     (id_v_right (#v F v) @ ! id_v_left (#v F v)) @
   assoc (double_coalg_map X) (id₁ (F (pr1 X)))
     (#v F v) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, z ·v #v F v)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v)
  (id_h_square (pr1 v · coalg_map F Y)
   ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F Y)

transportf_square

  (maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, v ·v z)

F: lax_double_functor C C

     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)

id_h_square v
⋆v (id_h_square (double_coalg_map Y)
    ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F (pr1 Y)) = ?t2

      apply (square_assoc_v (C := C)).

  (maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, v ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Y)))
  (transportb_square
     (assoc v (double_coalg_map Y) (id₁ (F (pr1 Y))))
     (assoc v (double_coalg_map Y) (id₁ (F (pr1 Y))))
     (id_h_square v
      ⋆v id_h_square (double_coalg_map Y)
      ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F (pr1 Y))) =

     (id_v_right (#v F v) @ ! id_v_left (#v F v)) @
   assoc (double_coalg_map X) (id₁ (F (pr1 X)))
     (#v F v) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, z ·v #v F v)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v)
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : X -->v F Y, z ·v identity_v (F Y))
     (! coalgebra_mor_commutes F v) @
   ! assoc (double_coalg_map X) (#v F v)
       (identity_v (F Y)) @

     (λ z : F (pr1 X) -->v F Y,

     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)

  (maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, v ·v z)

     (! assoc v (double_coalg_map Y) (id₁ (F (pr1 Y))))
     (! assoc v (double_coalg_map Y) (id₁ (F (pr1 Y))))
     (id_h_square v

      ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F (pr1 Y))) =

  (maponpaths
     (λ z : X -->v F Y, z ·v identity_v (F Y))
     (! coalgebra_mor_commutes F v) @
   ! assoc (double_coalg_map X) (#v F v)
       (identity_v (F Y)) @

     (λ z : F (pr1 X) -->v F Y,
      double_coalg_map X ·v z)

   assoc (double_coalg_map X) (id₁ (F (pr1 X)))
     (#v F v) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, z ·v #v F v)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v)
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : X -->v F Y, z ·v identity_v (F Y))
     (! coalgebra_mor_commutes F v) @
   ! assoc (double_coalg_map X) (#v F v)
       (identity_v (F Y)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : F (pr1 X) -->v F Y,
      double_coalg_map X ·v z)
     (id_v_right (#v F v) @ ! id_v_left (#v F v)) @
   assoc (double_coalg_map X) (id₁ (F (pr1 X)))
     (#v F v) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, z ·v #v F v)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v)
