F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
v: double_coalg_ver X Y
transportf_square
  (! assoc v (double_coalg_map Y) (id₁ (F (pr1 Y))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, v ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Y)))
  (! assoc v (double_coalg_map Y) (id₁ (F (pr1 Y))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, v ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Y)))
  (id_h_square v ⋆v id_h_square (double_coalg_map Y)
   ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F (pr1 Y)) =
transportf_square
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : X -->v F Y, z ·v identity_v (F Y))
     (! coalgebra_mor_commutes F v) @
   ! assoc (double_coalg_map X) (#v F v)
       (identity_v (F Y)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : F (pr1 X) -->v F Y,
      double_coalg_map X ·v z)
     (id_v_right (#v F v) @ ! id_v_left (#v F v)) @
   assoc (double_coalg_map X) (id₁ (F (pr1 X)))
     (#v F v) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, z ·v #v F v)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v)
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : X -->v F Y, z ·v identity_v (F Y))
     (! coalgebra_mor_commutes F v) @
   ! assoc (double_coalg_map X) (#v F v)
       (identity_v (F Y)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : F (pr1 X) -->v F Y,
      double_coalg_map X ·v z)
     (id_v_right (#v F v) @ ! id_v_left (#v F v)) @
   assoc (double_coalg_map X) (id₁ (F (pr1 X)))
     (#v F v) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, z ·v #v F v)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v)
  (id_h_square (pr1 v · coalg_map F Y)
   ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F Y)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
v: double_coalg_ver X Y
transportf_square
  (! assoc v (double_coalg_map Y) (id₁ (F (pr1 Y))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, v ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Y)))
  (! assoc v (double_coalg_map Y) (id₁ (F (pr1 Y))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, v ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Y)))
  (id_h_square (v ·v double_coalg_map Y)
   ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F (pr1 Y)) =
transportf_square
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : X -->v F Y, z ·v identity_v (F Y))
     (! coalgebra_mor_commutes F v) @
   ! assoc (double_coalg_map X) (#v F v)
       (identity_v (F Y)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : F (pr1 X) -->v F Y,
      double_coalg_map X ·v z)
     (id_v_right (#v F v) @ ! id_v_left (#v F v)) @
   assoc (double_coalg_map X) (id₁ (F (pr1 X)))
     (#v F v) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, z ·v #v F v)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v)
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : X -->v F Y, z ·v identity_v (F Y))
     (! coalgebra_mor_commutes F v) @
   ! assoc (double_coalg_map X) (#v F v)
       (identity_v (F Y)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : F (pr1 X) -->v F Y,
      double_coalg_map X ·v z)
     (id_v_right (#v F v) @ ! id_v_left (#v F v)) @
   assoc (double_coalg_map X) (id₁ (F (pr1 X)))
     (#v F v) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, z ·v #v F v)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v)
  (id_h_square (pr1 v · coalg_map F Y)
   ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F Y)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
v: double_coalg_ver X Y
id_h_square (v ·v double_coalg_map Y)
⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F (pr1 Y) =
id_h_square (pr1 v · coalg_map F Y)
⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F Y

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

v: double_coalg_ver X Y
double_coalg_sqr v v (double_coalg_id_hor X)
  (double_coalg_id_hor Y)

F: lax_double_functor C C

  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
v: double_coalg_ver X Y
is_double_coalg_sqr (pr2 (double_coalg_id_hor X))
  (pr2 (double_coalg_id_hor Y)) v v ?s

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
v: double_coalg_ver X Y
square v v (double_coalg_id_hor X)
  (double_coalg_id_hor Y)
 exact (id_h_square _).
    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)

v: double_coalg_ver X Y
is_double_coalg_sqr (pr2 (double_coalg_id_hor X))
  (pr2 (double_coalg_id_hor Y)) v v (id_h_square v)
 exact (double_coalg_id_is_sqr v).
  Defined.

     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
hor_id_data double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat

  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
hor_id_data double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
∏ x : CoAlg_category F,
double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat x x
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
∏ (x y : CoAlg_category F)
(f : CoAlg_category F ⟦ x, y ⟧),
?I x -->[ f ][ f] ?I y

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
∏ x : CoAlg_category F,
double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat x x
 exact double_coalg_id_hor.
    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
∏ (x y : CoAlg_category F)
(f : CoAlg_category F ⟦ x, y ⟧),
double_coalg_id_hor x -->[ f
][ f] double_coalg_id_hor y
 exact (λ _ _ v, double_coalg_id_sqr v).
  Defined.

  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
hor_id_laws double_coalg_hor_id_data

  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
hor_id_laws double_coalg_hor_id_data

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
∏ x : CoAlg_category F,
double_id_mor double_coalg_hor_id_data (id₁ x) =
id_two_disp (double_id double_coalg_hor_id_data x)
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
∏ (x y z : CoAlg_category F)
(f : CoAlg_category F ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : CoAlg_category F ⟦ y, z ⟧),
double_id_mor double_coalg_hor_id_data (f · g) =
double_id_mor double_coalg_hor_id_data f ;;2 double_id_mor
                                               double_coalg_hor_id_data
                                               g

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
∏ x : CoAlg_category F,

id_two_disp (double_id double_coalg_hor_id_data x)
 
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
x: CoAlg_category F
double_id_mor double_coalg_hor_id_data (id₁ x) =
id_two_disp (double_id double_coalg_hor_id_data x)

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
x: CoAlg_category F
id_h_square (id₁ (pr1 x)) = id_two_disp (identity_h x)

      apply (id_h_square_id (C := C)).
    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
∏ (x y z : CoAlg_category F)
(f : CoAlg_category F ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : CoAlg_category F ⟦ y, z ⟧),
double_id_mor double_coalg_hor_id_data (f · g) =
double_id_mor double_coalg_hor_id_data f ;;2 double_id_mor
                                               double_coalg_hor_id_data
                                               g
 
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
x, y, z: CoAlg_category F
f: CoAlg_category F ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: CoAlg_category F ⟦ y, z ⟧
double_id_mor double_coalg_hor_id_data (f · g) =
double_id_mor double_coalg_hor_id_data f ;;2 double_id_mor
                                               double_coalg_hor_id_data
                                               g

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
x, y, z: CoAlg_category F
f: CoAlg_category F ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: CoAlg_category F ⟦ y, z ⟧
id_h_square (pr1 f · pr1 g) =
id_h_square f ;;2 id_h_square g

      apply (id_h_square_comp (C := C)).
  Qed.

  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
hor_id double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat

  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat

     (hor_mor C)): category
hor_id double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat

E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
hor_id_data double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
hor_id_laws ?I

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
hor_id_data double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat
 exact double_coalg_hor_id_data.
    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
hor_id_laws double_coalg_hor_id_data
 exact double_coalg_hor_id_laws.
  Defined.

  (** * 6. Horizontal composition *)
  Definition double_coalg_comp_hor_struct
             {X Y Z : double_coalg F}
             (h : double_coalg_hor X Y)
             (k : double_coalg_hor Y Z)
    : double_coalg_hor_struct X Z (h ·h k)
    := transportf_square
         (id_right _)
         (id_right _)
         (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k
          ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F _ _).

  Arguments double_coalg_comp_hor_struct {X Y Z} h k /.

  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y, Z: double_coalg F
h: double_coalg_hor X Y
k: double_coalg_hor Y Z
double_coalg_hor X Z

  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y, Z: double_coalg F
h: double_coalg_hor X Y
k: double_coalg_hor Y Z
double_coalg_hor X Z

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y, Z: double_coalg F
h: double_coalg_hor X Y
k: double_coalg_hor Y Z
X -->h Z
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y, Z: double_coalg F
h: double_coalg_hor X Y
k: double_coalg_hor Y Z
double_coalg_hor_struct X Z ?h

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y, Z: double_coalg F
h: double_coalg_hor X Y
k: double_coalg_hor Y Z
X -->h Z
 exact (h ·h k).
    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y, Z: double_coalg F
h: double_coalg_hor X Y
k: double_coalg_hor Y Z
double_coalg_hor_struct X Z (h ·h k)
 exact (double_coalg_comp_hor_struct h k).
  Defined.

  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂, Z₁, Z₂: double_coalg F
v₁: double_coalg_ver X₁ X₂
v₂: double_coalg_ver Y₁ Y₂
v₃: double_coalg_ver Z₁ Z₂
h₁: double_coalg_hor X₁ Y₁
h₂: double_coalg_hor Y₁ Z₁
k₁: double_coalg_hor X₂ Y₂
k₂: double_coalg_hor Y₂ Z₂
s₁: double_coalg_sqr v₁ v₂ h₁ k₁
s₂: double_coalg_sqr v₂ v₃ h₂ k₂
is_double_coalg_sqr
  (double_coalg_comp_hor_struct h₁ h₂)
  (double_coalg_comp_hor_struct k₁ k₂) v₁ v₃
  (s₁ ⋆h s₂)

  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂, Z₁, Z₂: double_coalg F
v₁: double_coalg_ver X₁ X₂
v₂: double_coalg_ver Y₁ Y₂
v₃: double_coalg_ver Z₁ Z₂
h₁: double_coalg_hor X₁ Y₁
h₂: double_coalg_hor Y₁ Z₁
k₁: double_coalg_hor X₂ Y₂
k₂: double_coalg_hor Y₂ Z₂
s₁: double_coalg_sqr v₁ v₂ h₁ k₁
s₂: double_coalg_sqr v₂ v₃ h₂ k₂
is_double_coalg_sqr
  (double_coalg_comp_hor_struct h₁ h₂)
  (double_coalg_comp_hor_struct k₁ k₂) v₁ v₃
  (s₁ ⋆h s₂)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂, Z₁, Z₂: double_coalg F
v₁: double_coalg_ver X₁ X₂
v₂: double_coalg_ver Y₁ Y₂
v₃: double_coalg_ver Z₁ Z₂
h₁: double_coalg_hor X₁ Y₁
h₂: double_coalg_hor Y₁ Z₁
k₁: double_coalg_hor X₂ Y₂
k₂: double_coalg_hor Y₂ Z₂
s₁: double_coalg_sqr v₁ v₂ h₁ k₁
s₂: double_coalg_sqr v₂ v₃ h₂ k₂
transportf_square (double_coalg_ver_comm v₁)
  (double_coalg_ver_comm v₃)
  (transportf_square (id_right (double_coalg_map X₁))
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Z₁))
     (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁
      ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂
      ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F h₁ h₂)
   ⋆v #s F (s₁ ⋆h s₂)) =
s₁ ⋆h s₂
⋆v transportf_square (id_right (double_coalg_map X₂))
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Z₂))
     (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₁
      ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₂
      ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F k₁ k₂)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂, Z₁, Z₂: double_coalg F
v₁: double_coalg_ver X₁ X₂
v₂: double_coalg_ver Y₁ Y₂
v₃: double_coalg_ver Z₁ Z₂
h₁: double_coalg_hor X₁ Y₁
h₂: double_coalg_hor Y₁ Z₁
k₁: double_coalg_hor X₂ Y₂
k₂: double_coalg_hor Y₂ Z₂
s₁: double_coalg_sqr v₁ v₂ h₁ k₁
s₂: double_coalg_sqr v₂ v₃ h₂ k₂
transportf_square (double_coalg_ver_comm v₁)
  (double_coalg_ver_comm v₃)
  (transportf_square
     (maponpaths (λ z : X₁ -->v F X₁, z ·v #v F v₁)
        (id_right (double_coalg_map X₁)))
     (maponpaths (λ z : Z₁ -->v F Z₁, z ·v #v F v₃)
        (id_right (double_coalg_map Z₁)))
     (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁
      ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂
      ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F h₁ h₂
      ⋆v #s F (s₁ ⋆h s₂))) =
s₁ ⋆h s₂
⋆v transportf_square (id_right (double_coalg_map X₂))
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Z₂))
     (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₁
      ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₂
      ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F k₁ k₂)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂, Z₁, Z₂: double_coalg F
v₁: double_coalg_ver X₁ X₂
v₂: double_coalg_ver Y₁ Y₂
v₃: double_coalg_ver Z₁ Z₂
h₁: double_coalg_hor X₁ Y₁
h₂: double_coalg_hor Y₁ Z₁
k₁: double_coalg_hor X₂ Y₂
k₂: double_coalg_hor Y₂ Z₂
s₁: double_coalg_sqr v₁ v₂ h₁ k₁
s₂: double_coalg_sqr v₂ v₃ h₂ k₂
transportf_square (double_coalg_ver_comm v₁)
  (double_coalg_ver_comm v₃)
  (transportf_square
     (maponpaths (λ z : X₁ -->v F X₁, z ·v #v F v₁)
        (id_right (double_coalg_map X₁)))
     (maponpaths (λ z : Z₁ -->v F Z₁, z ·v #v F v₃)
        (id_right (double_coalg_map Z₁)))
     (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁
      ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂
      ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F h₁ h₂
      ⋆v #s F (s₁ ⋆h s₂))) =
transportf_square
  (maponpaths (λ z : X₂ -->v F X₂, v₁ ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X₂)))
  (maponpaths (λ z : Z₂ -->v F Z₂, v₃ ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Z₂)))
  (s₁ ⋆h s₂
   ⋆v (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₁
       ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₂
       ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F k₁ k₂))

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂, Z₁, Z₂: double_coalg F
v₁: double_coalg_ver X₁ X₂
v₂: double_coalg_ver Y₁ Y₂
v₃: double_coalg_ver Z₁ Z₂
h₁: double_coalg_hor X₁ Y₁
h₂: double_coalg_hor Y₁ Z₁
k₁: double_coalg_hor X₂ Y₂
k₂: double_coalg_hor Y₂ Z₂
s₁: double_coalg_sqr v₁ v₂ h₁ k₁
s₂: double_coalg_sqr v₂ v₃ h₂ k₂
transportf_square
  (maponpaths (λ z : X₁ -->v F X₁, z ·v #v F v₁)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X₁)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v₁)
  (maponpaths (λ z : Z₁ -->v F Z₁, z ·v #v F v₃)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Z₁)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v₃)
  (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁
   ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂
   ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F h₁ h₂
   ⋆v #s F (s₁ ⋆h s₂)) =
transportf_square
  (maponpaths (λ z : X₂ -->v F X₂, v₁ ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X₂)))
  (maponpaths (λ z : Z₂ -->v F Z₂, v₃ ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Z₂)))
  (s₁ ⋆h s₂
   ⋆v (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₁
       ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₂
       ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F k₁ k₂))

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂, Z₁, Z₂: double_coalg F
v₁: double_coalg_ver X₁ X₂
v₂: double_coalg_ver Y₁ Y₂
v₃: double_coalg_ver Z₁ Z₂
h₁: double_coalg_hor X₁ Y₁
h₂: double_coalg_hor Y₁ Z₁
k₁: double_coalg_hor X₂ Y₂
k₂: double_coalg_hor Y₂ Z₂
s₁: double_coalg_sqr v₁ v₂ h₁ k₁
s₂: double_coalg_sqr v₂ v₃ h₂ k₂
transportf_square
  (maponpaths (λ z : X₁ -->v F X₁, z ·v #v F v₁)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X₁)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v₁)
  (maponpaths (λ z : Z₁ -->v F Z₁, z ·v #v F v₃)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Z₁)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v₃)
  (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁
   ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂
   ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F h₁ h₂
   ⋆v #s F (s₁ ⋆h s₂)) = ?b
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂, Z₁, Z₂: double_coalg F
v₁: double_coalg_ver X₁ X₂
v₂: double_coalg_ver Y₁ Y₂
v₃: double_coalg_ver Z₁ Z₂
h₁: double_coalg_hor X₁ Y₁
h₂: double_coalg_hor Y₁ Z₁
k₁: double_coalg_hor X₂ Y₂
k₂: double_coalg_hor Y₂ Z₂
s₁: double_coalg_sqr v₁ v₂ h₁ k₁
s₂: double_coalg_sqr v₂ v₃ h₂ k₂
?b =
transportf_square
  (maponpaths (λ z : X₂ -->v F X₂, v₁ ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X₂)))
  (maponpaths (λ z : Z₂ -->v F Z₂, v₃ ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Z₂)))
  (s₁ ⋆h s₂
   ⋆v (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₁
       ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₂
       ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F k₁ k₂))

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂, Z₁, Z₂: double_coalg F
v₁: double_coalg_ver X₁ X₂
v₂: double_coalg_ver Y₁ Y₂
v₃: double_coalg_ver Z₁ Z₂
h₁: double_coalg_hor X₁ Y₁
h₂: double_coalg_hor Y₁ Z₁
k₁: double_coalg_hor X₂ Y₂
k₂: double_coalg_hor Y₂ Z₂
s₁: double_coalg_sqr v₁ v₂ h₁ k₁
s₂: double_coalg_sqr v₂ v₃ h₂ k₂
transportf_square
  (maponpaths (λ z : X₁ -->v F X₁, z ·v #v F v₁)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X₁)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v₁)
  (maponpaths (λ z : Z₁ -->v F Z₁, z ·v #v F v₃)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Z₁)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v₃)
  (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁
   ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂
   ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F h₁ h₂
   ⋆v #s F (s₁ ⋆h s₂)) = ?b

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂, Z₁, Z₂: double_coalg F
v₁: double_coalg_ver X₁ X₂
v₂: double_coalg_ver Y₁ Y₂
v₃: double_coalg_ver Z₁ Z₂
h₁: double_coalg_hor X₁ Y₁
h₂: double_coalg_hor Y₁ Z₁
k₁: double_coalg_hor X₂ Y₂
k₂: double_coalg_hor Y₂ Z₂
s₁: double_coalg_sqr v₁ v₂ h₁ k₁
s₂: double_coalg_sqr v₂ v₃ h₂ k₂
sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁
⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂
⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F h₁ h₂
⋆v #s F (s₁ ⋆h s₂) = ?t2

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂, Z₁, Z₂: double_coalg F
v₁: double_coalg_ver X₁ X₂
v₂: double_coalg_ver Y₁ Y₂
v₃: double_coalg_ver Z₁ Z₂
h₁: double_coalg_hor X₁ Y₁
h₂: double_coalg_hor Y₁ Z₁
k₁: double_coalg_hor X₂ Y₂
k₂: double_coalg_hor Y₂ Z₂
s₁: double_coalg_sqr v₁ v₂ h₁ k₁
s₂: double_coalg_sqr v₂ v₃ h₂ k₂
?t2 =
sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁
⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂
⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F h₁ h₂
⋆v #s F (s₁ ⋆h s₂)

      apply (square_assoc_v' (C := C)).
    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂, Z₁, Z₂: double_coalg F
v₁: double_coalg_ver X₁ X₂
v₂: double_coalg_ver Y₁ Y₂
v₃: double_coalg_ver Z₁ Z₂
h₁: double_coalg_hor X₁ Y₁
h₂: double_coalg_hor Y₁ Z₁
k₁: double_coalg_hor X₂ Y₂
k₂: double_coalg_hor Y₂ Z₂
s₁: double_coalg_sqr v₁ v₂ h₁ k₁
s₂: double_coalg_sqr v₂ v₃ h₂ k₂
transportf_square
  (maponpaths (λ z : X₁ -->v F X₁, z ·v #v F v₁)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X₁)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v₁)
  (maponpaths (λ z : Z₁ -->v F Z₁, z ·v #v F v₃)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Z₁)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v₃)
  (transportf_square
     (assoc (double_coalg_map X₁) (id₁ (F X₁))
        (#v F v₁))
     (assoc (double_coalg_map Z₁) (id₁ (F Z₁))
        (#v F v₃))
     (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁
      ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂
      ⋆v (lax_double_functor_comp_h F h₁ h₂
          ⋆v #s F (s₁ ⋆h s₂)))) =
transportf_square
  (maponpaths (λ z : X₂ -->v F X₂, v₁ ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X₂)))
  (maponpaths (λ z : Z₂ -->v F Z₂, v₃ ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Z₂)))
  (s₁ ⋆h s₂
   ⋆v (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₁
       ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₂
       ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F k₁ k₂))

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂, Z₁, Z₂: double_coalg F
v₁: double_coalg_ver X₁ X₂
v₂: double_coalg_ver Y₁ Y₂
v₃: double_coalg_ver Z₁ Z₂
h₁: double_coalg_hor X₁ Y₁
h₂: double_coalg_hor Y₁ Z₁
k₁: double_coalg_hor X₂ Y₂
k₂: double_coalg_hor Y₂ Z₂
s₁: double_coalg_sqr v₁ v₂ h₁ k₁
s₂: double_coalg_sqr v₂ v₃ h₂ k₂
transportf_square
  (assoc (double_coalg_map X₁) (id₁ (F X₁)) (#v F v₁) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X₁ -->v F X₁, z ·v #v F v₁)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X₁)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v₁)
  (assoc (double_coalg_map Z₁) (id₁ (F Z₁)) (#v F v₃) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Z₁ -->v F Z₁, z ·v #v F v₃)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Z₁)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v₃)
  (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁
   ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂
   ⋆v (lax_double_functor_comp_h F h₁ h₂
       ⋆v #s F (s₁ ⋆h s₂))) =
transportf_square
  (maponpaths (λ z : X₂ -->v F X₂, v₁ ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X₂)))
  (maponpaths (λ z : Z₂ -->v F Z₂, v₃ ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Z₂)))
  (s₁ ⋆h s₂
   ⋆v (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₁
       ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₂
       ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F k₁ k₂))

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂, Z₁, Z₂: double_coalg F
v₁: double_coalg_ver X₁ X₂
v₂: double_coalg_ver Y₁ Y₂
v₃: double_coalg_ver Z₁ Z₂
h₁: double_coalg_hor X₁ Y₁
h₂: double_coalg_hor Y₁ Z₁
k₁: double_coalg_hor X₂ Y₂
k₂: double_coalg_hor Y₂ Z₂
s₁: double_coalg_sqr v₁ v₂ h₁ k₁
s₂: double_coalg_sqr v₂ v₃ h₂ k₂
transportf_square
  (assoc (double_coalg_map X₁) (id₁ (F X₁)) (#v F v₁) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X₁ -->v F X₁, z ·v #v F v₁)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X₁)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v₁)
  (assoc (double_coalg_map Z₁) (id₁ (F Z₁)) (#v F v₃) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Z₁ -->v F Z₁, z ·v #v F v₃)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Z₁)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v₃)
  (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁
   ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂
   ⋆v (lax_double_functor_comp_h F h₁ h₂
       ⋆v #s F (s₁ ⋆h s₂))) = ?b
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂, Z₁, Z₂: double_coalg F
v₁: double_coalg_ver X₁ X₂
v₂: double_coalg_ver Y₁ Y₂
v₃: double_coalg_ver Z₁ Z₂
h₁: double_coalg_hor X₁ Y₁
h₂: double_coalg_hor Y₁ Z₁
k₁: double_coalg_hor X₂ Y₂
k₂: double_coalg_hor Y₂ Z₂
s₁: double_coalg_sqr v₁ v₂ h₁ k₁
s₂: double_coalg_sqr v₂ v₃ h₂ k₂
?b =
transportf_square
  (maponpaths (λ z : X₂ -->v F X₂, v₁ ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X₂)))
  (maponpaths (λ z : Z₂ -->v F Z₂, v₃ ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Z₂)))
  (s₁ ⋆h s₂
   ⋆v (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₁
       ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₂
       ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F k₁ k₂))

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂, Z₁, Z₂: double_coalg F
v₁: double_coalg_ver X₁ X₂
v₂: double_coalg_ver Y₁ Y₂
v₃: double_coalg_ver Z₁ Z₂
h₁: double_coalg_hor X₁ Y₁
h₂: double_coalg_hor Y₁ Z₁
k₁: double_coalg_hor X₂ Y₂
k₂: double_coalg_hor Y₂ Z₂
s₁: double_coalg_sqr v₁ v₂ h₁ k₁
s₂: double_coalg_sqr v₂ v₃ h₂ k₂
transportf_square
  (assoc (double_coalg_map X₁) (id₁ (F X₁)) (#v F v₁) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X₁ -->v F X₁, z ·v #v F v₁)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X₁)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v₁)
  (assoc (double_coalg_map Z₁) (id₁ (F Z₁)) (#v F v₃) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Z₁ -->v F Z₁, z ·v #v F v₃)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Z₁)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v₃)
  (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁
   ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂
   ⋆v (lax_double_functor_comp_h F h₁ h₂
       ⋆v #s F (s₁ ⋆h s₂))) = ?b

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂, Z₁, Z₂: double_coalg F
v₁: double_coalg_ver X₁ X₂
v₂: double_coalg_ver Y₁ Y₂
v₃: double_coalg_ver Z₁ Z₂
h₁: double_coalg_hor X₁ Y₁
h₂: double_coalg_hor Y₁ Z₁
k₁: double_coalg_hor X₂ Y₂
k₂: double_coalg_hor Y₂ Z₂
s₁: double_coalg_sqr v₁ v₂ h₁ k₁
s₂: double_coalg_sqr v₂ v₃ h₂ k₂
lax_double_functor_comp_h F h₁ h₂ ⋆v #s F (s₁ ⋆h s₂) =
?t2

      exact (lax_double_functor_comp_h_mor' F s₁ s₂).
    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂, Z₁, Z₂: double_coalg F
v₁: double_coalg_ver X₁ X₂
v₂: double_coalg_ver Y₁ Y₂
v₃: double_coalg_ver Z₁ Z₂
h₁: double_coalg_hor X₁ Y₁
h₂: double_coalg_hor Y₁ Z₁
k₁: double_coalg_hor X₂ Y₂
k₂: double_coalg_hor Y₂ Z₂
s₁: double_coalg_sqr v₁ v₂ h₁ k₁
s₂: double_coalg_sqr v₂ v₃ h₂ k₂
transportf_square
  (assoc (double_coalg_map X₁) (id₁ (F X₁)) (#v F v₁) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X₁ -->v F X₁, z ·v #v F v₁)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X₁)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v₁)
  (assoc (double_coalg_map Z₁) (id₁ (F Z₁)) (#v F v₃) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Z₁ -->v F Z₁, z ·v #v F v₃)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Z₁)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v₃)
  (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁
   ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂
   ⋆v transportf_square
        (id_v_right (#v F v₁) @ ! id_v_left (#v F v₁))
        (id_v_right (#v F v₃) @ ! id_v_left (#v F v₃))
        (#s F s₁ ⋆h #s F s₂
         ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F k₁ k₂)) =
transportf_square
  (maponpaths (λ z : X₂ -->v F X₂, v₁ ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X₂)))
  (maponpaths (λ z : Z₂ -->v F Z₂, v₃ ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Z₂)))
  (s₁ ⋆h s₂
   ⋆v (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₁
       ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₂
       ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F k₁ k₂))

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂, Z₁, Z₂: double_coalg F
v₁: double_coalg_ver X₁ X₂
v₂: double_coalg_ver Y₁ Y₂
v₃: double_coalg_ver Z₁ Z₂
h₁: double_coalg_hor X₁ Y₁
h₂: double_coalg_hor Y₁ Z₁
k₁: double_coalg_hor X₂ Y₂
k₂: double_coalg_hor Y₂ Z₂
s₁: double_coalg_sqr v₁ v₂ h₁ k₁
s₂: double_coalg_sqr v₂ v₃ h₂ k₂
transportf_square
  (assoc (double_coalg_map X₁) (id₁ (F X₁)) (#v F v₁) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X₁ -->v F X₁, z ·v #v F v₁)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X₁)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v₁)
  (assoc (double_coalg_map Z₁) (id₁ (F Z₁)) (#v F v₃) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Z₁ -->v F Z₁, z ·v #v F v₃)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Z₁)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v₃)
  (transportf_square
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : F X₁ -->v F X₂,
         double_coalg_map X₁ ·v z)
        (id_v_right (#v F v₁) @ ! id_v_left (#v F v₁)))
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : F Z₁ -->v F Z₂,
         double_coalg_map Z₁ ·v z)
        (id_v_right (#v F v₃) @ ! id_v_left (#v F v₃)))
     (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁
      ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂
      ⋆v (#s F s₁ ⋆h #s F s₂
          ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F k₁ k₂))) =
transportf_square
  (maponpaths (λ z : X₂ -->v F X₂, v₁ ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X₂)))
  (maponpaths (λ z : Z₂ -->v F Z₂, v₃ ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Z₂)))
  (s₁ ⋆h s₂
   ⋆v (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₁
       ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₂
       ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F k₁ k₂))

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂, Z₁, Z₂: double_coalg F
v₁: double_coalg_ver X₁ X₂
v₂: double_coalg_ver Y₁ Y₂
v₃: double_coalg_ver Z₁ Z₂
h₁: double_coalg_hor X₁ Y₁
h₂: double_coalg_hor Y₁ Z₁
k₁: double_coalg_hor X₂ Y₂
k₂: double_coalg_hor Y₂ Z₂
s₁: double_coalg_sqr v₁ v₂ h₁ k₁
s₂: double_coalg_sqr v₂ v₃ h₂ k₂
transportf_square
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : F X₁ -->v F X₂, double_coalg_map X₁ ·v z)
     (id_v_right (#v F v₁) @ ! id_v_left (#v F v₁)) @
   assoc (double_coalg_map X₁) (id₁ (F X₁)) (#v F v₁) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X₁ -->v F X₁, z ·v #v F v₁)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X₁)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v₁)
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : F Z₁ -->v F Z₂, double_coalg_map Z₁ ·v z)
     (id_v_right (#v F v₃) @ ! id_v_left (#v F v₃)) @
   assoc (double_coalg_map Z₁) (id₁ (F Z₁)) (#v F v₃) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Z₁ -->v F Z₁, z ·v #v F v₃)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Z₁)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v₃)
  (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁
   ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂
   ⋆v (#s F s₁ ⋆h #s F s₂
       ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F k₁ k₂)) =
transportf_square
  (maponpaths (λ z : X₂ -->v F X₂, v₁ ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X₂)))
  (maponpaths (λ z : Z₂ -->v F Z₂, v₃ ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Z₂)))
  (s₁ ⋆h s₂
   ⋆v (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₁
       ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₂
       ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F k₁ k₂))

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂, Z₁, Z₂: double_coalg F
v₁: double_coalg_ver X₁ X₂
v₂: double_coalg_ver Y₁ Y₂
v₃: double_coalg_ver Z₁ Z₂
h₁: double_coalg_hor X₁ Y₁
h₂: double_coalg_hor Y₁ Z₁
k₁: double_coalg_hor X₂ Y₂
k₂: double_coalg_hor Y₂ Z₂
s₁: double_coalg_sqr v₁ v₂ h₁ k₁
s₂: double_coalg_sqr v₂ v₃ h₂ k₂
transportf_square
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : F X₁ -->v F X₂, double_coalg_map X₁ ·v z)
     (id_v_right (#v F v₁) @ ! id_v_left (#v F v₁)) @
   assoc (double_coalg_map X₁) (id₁ (F X₁)) (#v F v₁) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X₁ -->v F X₁, z ·v #v F v₁)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X₁)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v₁)
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : F Z₁ -->v F Z₂, double_coalg_map Z₁ ·v z)
     (id_v_right (#v F v₃) @ ! id_v_left (#v F v₃)) @
   assoc (double_coalg_map Z₁) (id₁ (F Z₁)) (#v F v₃) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Z₁ -->v F Z₁, z ·v #v F v₃)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Z₁)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v₃)
  (transportb_square
     (assoc (double_coalg_map X₁) (#v F v₁)
        (identity_v (F X₂)))
     (assoc (double_coalg_map Z₁) (#v F v₃)
        (identity_v (F Z₂)))
     (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁
      ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂
      ⋆v #s F s₁ ⋆h #s F s₂
      ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F k₁ k₂)) =
transportf_square
  (maponpaths (λ z : X₂ -->v F X₂, v₁ ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X₂)))
  (maponpaths (λ z : Z₂ -->v F Z₂, v₃ ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Z₂)))
  (s₁ ⋆h s₂
   ⋆v (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₁
       ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₂
       ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F k₁ k₂))

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂, Z₁, Z₂: double_coalg F
v₁: double_coalg_ver X₁ X₂
v₂: double_coalg_ver Y₁ Y₂
v₃: double_coalg_ver Z₁ Z₂
h₁: double_coalg_hor X₁ Y₁
h₂: double_coalg_hor Y₁ Z₁
k₁: double_coalg_hor X₂ Y₂
k₂: double_coalg_hor Y₂ Z₂
s₁: double_coalg_sqr v₁ v₂ h₁ k₁
s₂: double_coalg_sqr v₂ v₃ h₂ k₂
transportf_square
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : F X₁ -->v F X₂, double_coalg_map X₁ ·v z)
     (id_v_right (#v F v₁) @ ! id_v_left (#v F v₁)) @
   assoc (double_coalg_map X₁) (id₁ (F X₁)) (#v F v₁) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X₁ -->v F X₁, z ·v #v F v₁)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X₁)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v₁)
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : F Z₁ -->v F Z₂, double_coalg_map Z₁ ·v z)
     (id_v_right (#v F v₃) @ ! id_v_left (#v F v₃)) @
   assoc (double_coalg_map Z₁) (id₁ (F Z₁)) (#v F v₃) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Z₁ -->v F Z₁, z ·v #v F v₃)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Z₁)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v₃)
  (transportf_square
     (! assoc (double_coalg_map X₁) (#v F v₁)
          (identity_v (F X₂)))
     (! assoc (double_coalg_map Z₁) (#v F v₃)
          (identity_v (F Z₂)))
     (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁
      ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂
      ⋆v #s F s₁ ⋆h #s F s₂
      ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F k₁ k₂)) =
transportf_square
  (maponpaths (λ z : X₂ -->v F X₂, v₁ ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X₂)))
  (maponpaths (λ z : Z₂ -->v F Z₂, v₃ ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Z₂)))
  (s₁ ⋆h s₂
   ⋆v (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₁
       ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₂
       ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F k₁ k₂))

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂, Z₁, Z₂: double_coalg F
v₁: double_coalg_ver X₁ X₂
v₂: double_coalg_ver Y₁ Y₂
v₃: double_coalg_ver Z₁ Z₂
h₁: double_coalg_hor X₁ Y₁
h₂: double_coalg_hor Y₁ Z₁
k₁: double_coalg_hor X₂ Y₂
k₂: double_coalg_hor Y₂ Z₂
s₁: double_coalg_sqr v₁ v₂ h₁ k₁
s₂: double_coalg_sqr v₂ v₃ h₂ k₂
transportf_square
  (! assoc (double_coalg_map X₁) (#v F v₁)
       (identity_v (F X₂)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : F X₁ -->v F X₂, double_coalg_map X₁ ·v z)
     (id_v_right (#v F v₁) @ ! id_v_left (#v F v₁)) @
   assoc (double_coalg_map X₁) (id₁ (F X₁)) (#v F v₁) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X₁ -->v F X₁, z ·v #v F v₁)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X₁)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v₁)
  (! assoc (double_coalg_map Z₁) (#v F v₃)
       (identity_v (F Z₂)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : F Z₁ -->v F Z₂, double_coalg_map Z₁ ·v z)
     (id_v_right (#v F v₃) @ ! id_v_left (#v F v₃)) @
   assoc (double_coalg_map Z₁) (id₁ (F Z₁)) (#v F v₃) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Z₁ -->v F Z₁, z ·v #v F v₃)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Z₁)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v₃)
  (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁
   ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂ ⋆v #s F s₁ ⋆h #s F s₂
   ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F k₁ k₂) =
transportf_square
  (maponpaths (λ z : X₂ -->v F X₂, v₁ ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X₂)))
  (maponpaths (λ z : Z₂ -->v F Z₂, v₃ ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Z₂)))
  (s₁ ⋆h s₂
   ⋆v (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₁
       ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₂
       ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F k₁ k₂))

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂, Z₁, Z₂: double_coalg F
v₁: double_coalg_ver X₁ X₂
v₂: double_coalg_ver Y₁ Y₂
v₃: double_coalg_ver Z₁ Z₂
h₁: double_coalg_hor X₁ Y₁
h₂: double_coalg_hor Y₁ Z₁
k₁: double_coalg_hor X₂ Y₂
k₂: double_coalg_hor Y₂ Z₂
s₁: double_coalg_sqr v₁ v₂ h₁ k₁
s₂: double_coalg_sqr v₂ v₃ h₂ k₂
transportf_square
  (! assoc (double_coalg_map X₁) (#v F v₁)
       (identity_v (F X₂)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : F X₁ -->v F X₂, double_coalg_map X₁ ·v z)
     (id_v_right (#v F v₁) @ ! id_v_left (#v F v₁)) @
   assoc (double_coalg_map X₁) (id₁ (F X₁)) (#v F v₁) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X₁ -->v F X₁, z ·v #v F v₁)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X₁)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v₁)
  (! assoc (double_coalg_map Z₁) (#v F v₃)
       (identity_v (F Z₂)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : F Z₁ -->v F Z₂, double_coalg_map Z₁ ·v z)
     (id_v_right (#v F v₃) @ ! id_v_left (#v F v₃)) @
   assoc (double_coalg_map Z₁) (id₁ (F Z₁)) (#v F v₃) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Z₁ -->v F Z₁, z ·v #v F v₃)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Z₁)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v₃)
  (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁
   ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂ ⋆v #s F s₁ ⋆h #s F s₂
   ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F k₁ k₂) = ?b
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂, Z₁, Z₂: double_coalg F
v₁: double_coalg_ver X₁ X₂
v₂: double_coalg_ver Y₁ Y₂
v₃: double_coalg_ver Z₁ Z₂
h₁: double_coalg_hor X₁ Y₁
h₂: double_coalg_hor Y₁ Z₁
k₁: double_coalg_hor X₂ Y₂
k₂: double_coalg_hor Y₂ Z₂
s₁: double_coalg_sqr v₁ v₂ h₁ k₁
s₂: double_coalg_sqr v₂ v₃ h₂ k₂
?b =
transportf_square
  (maponpaths (λ z : X₂ -->v F X₂, v₁ ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X₂)))
  (maponpaths (λ z : Z₂ -->v F Z₂, v₃ ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Z₂)))
  (s₁ ⋆h s₂
   ⋆v (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₁
       ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₂
       ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F k₁ k₂))

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂, Z₁, Z₂: double_coalg F
v₁: double_coalg_ver X₁ X₂
v₂: double_coalg_ver Y₁ Y₂
v₃: double_coalg_ver Z₁ Z₂
h₁: double_coalg_hor X₁ Y₁
h₂: double_coalg_hor Y₁ Z₁
k₁: double_coalg_hor X₂ Y₂
k₂: double_coalg_hor Y₂ Z₂
s₁: double_coalg_sqr v₁ v₂ h₁ k₁
s₂: double_coalg_sqr v₂ v₃ h₂ k₂
transportf_square
  (! assoc (double_coalg_map X₁) (#v F v₁)
       (identity_v (F X₂)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : F X₁ -->v F X₂, double_coalg_map X₁ ·v z)
     (id_v_right (#v F v₁) @ ! id_v_left (#v F v₁)) @
   assoc (double_coalg_map X₁) (id₁ (F X₁)) (#v F v₁) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X₁ -->v F X₁, z ·v #v F v₁)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X₁)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v₁)
  (! assoc (double_coalg_map Z₁) (#v F v₃)
       (identity_v (F Z₂)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : F Z₁ -->v F Z₂, double_coalg_map Z₁ ·v z)
     (id_v_right (#v F v₃) @ ! id_v_left (#v F v₃)) @
   assoc (double_coalg_map Z₁) (id₁ (F Z₁)) (#v F v₃) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Z₁ -->v F Z₁, z ·v #v F v₃)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Z₁)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v₃)
  (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁
   ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂ ⋆v #s F s₁ ⋆h #s F s₂
   ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F k₁ k₂) = ?b

E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)

v₂: double_coalg_ver Y₁ Y₂

h₂: double_coalg_hor Y₁ Z₁

k₂: double_coalg_hor Y₂ Z₂
s₁: double_coalg_sqr v₁ v₂ h₁ k₁
s₂: double_coalg_sqr v₂ v₃ h₂ k₂
sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁
⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂ ⋆v #s F s₁ ⋆h #s F s₂
⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F k₁ k₂ = ?t2

E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category

v₂: double_coalg_ver Y₁ Y₂

h₂: double_coalg_hor Y₁ Z₁

sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁
⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂ ⋆v #s F s₁ ⋆h #s F s₂ =
?y'

transportb_square (double_coalg_ver_comm v₁)
  (double_coalg_ver_comm v₂)
  (s₁ ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₁)
⋆h (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂ ⋆v #s F s₂) = ?y'

C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂, Z₁, Z₂: double_coalg F
v₁: double_coalg_ver X₁ X₂
v₂: double_coalg_ver Y₁ Y₂
v₃: double_coalg_ver Z₁ Z₂
h₁: double_coalg_hor X₁ Y₁
h₂: double_coalg_hor Y₁ Z₁
k₁: double_coalg_hor X₂ Y₂
k₂: double_coalg_hor Y₂ Z₂
s₁: double_coalg_sqr v₁ v₂ h₁ k₁
s₂: double_coalg_sqr v₂ v₃ h₂ k₂
transportf_square
  (! assoc (double_coalg_map X₁) (#v F v₁)
       (identity_v (F X₂)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : F X₁ -->v F X₂, double_coalg_map X₁ ·v z)
     (id_v_right (#v F v₁) @ ! id_v_left (#v F v₁)) @
   assoc (double_coalg_map X₁) (id₁ (F X₁)) (#v F v₁) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X₁ -->v F X₁, z ·v #v F v₁)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X₁)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v₁)
  (! assoc (double_coalg_map Z₁) (#v F v₃)
       (identity_v (F Z₂)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : F Z₁ -->v F Z₂, double_coalg_map Z₁ ·v z)
     (id_v_right (#v F v₃) @ ! id_v_left (#v F v₃)) @
   assoc (double_coalg_map Z₁) (id₁ (F Z₁)) (#v F v₃) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Z₁ -->v F Z₁, z ·v #v F v₃)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Z₁)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v₃)
  (transportb_square (double_coalg_ver_comm v₁)
     (double_coalg_ver_comm v₂)
     (s₁ ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₁)
   ⋆h transportb_square (double_coalg_ver_comm v₂)
        (double_coalg_ver_comm v₃)
        (s₂ ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₂)
   ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F k₁ k₂) =
transportf_square
  (maponpaths (λ z : X₂ -->v F X₂, v₁ ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X₂)))
  (maponpaths (λ z : Z₂ -->v F Z₂, v₃ ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Z₂)))
  (s₁ ⋆h s₂
   ⋆v (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₁
       ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₂
       ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F k₁ k₂))

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂, Z₁, Z₂: double_coalg F
v₁: double_coalg_ver X₁ X₂
v₂: double_coalg_ver Y₁ Y₂
v₃: double_coalg_ver Z₁ Z₂
h₁: double_coalg_hor X₁ Y₁
h₂: double_coalg_hor Y₁ Z₁
k₁: double_coalg_hor X₂ Y₂
k₂: double_coalg_hor Y₂ Z₂
s₁: double_coalg_sqr v₁ v₂ h₁ k₁
s₂: double_coalg_sqr v₂ v₃ h₂ k₂
transportf_square
  (! assoc (double_coalg_map X₁) (#v F v₁)
       (identity_v (F X₂)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : F X₁ -->v F X₂, double_coalg_map X₁ ·v z)
     (id_v_right (#v F v₁) @ ! id_v_left (#v F v₁)) @
   assoc (double_coalg_map X₁) (id₁ (F X₁)) (#v F v₁) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X₁ -->v F X₁, z ·v #v F v₁)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X₁)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v₁)
  (! assoc (double_coalg_map Z₁) (#v F v₃)
       (identity_v (F Z₂)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : F Z₁ -->v F Z₂, double_coalg_map Z₁ ·v z)
     (id_v_right (#v F v₃) @ ! id_v_left (#v F v₃)) @
   assoc (double_coalg_map Z₁) (id₁ (F Z₁)) (#v F v₃) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Z₁ -->v F Z₁, z ·v #v F v₃)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Z₁)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v₃)
  (transportf_square (! double_coalg_ver_comm v₁)
     (! double_coalg_ver_comm v₂)
     (s₁ ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₁)
   ⋆h transportf_square (! double_coalg_ver_comm v₂)
        (! double_coalg_ver_comm v₃)
        (s₂ ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₂)
   ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F k₁ k₂) =
transportf_square
  (maponpaths (λ z : X₂ -->v F X₂, v₁ ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X₂)))
  (maponpaths (λ z : Z₂ -->v F Z₂, v₃ ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Z₂)))
  (s₁ ⋆h s₂
   ⋆v (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₁
       ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₂
       ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F k₁ k₂))

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂, Z₁, Z₂: double_coalg F
v₁: double_coalg_ver X₁ X₂
v₂: double_coalg_ver Y₁ Y₂
v₃: double_coalg_ver Z₁ Z₂
h₁: double_coalg_hor X₁ Y₁
h₂: double_coalg_hor Y₁ Z₁
k₁: double_coalg_hor X₂ Y₂
k₂: double_coalg_hor Y₂ Z₂
s₁: double_coalg_sqr v₁ v₂ h₁ k₁
s₂: double_coalg_sqr v₂ v₃ h₂ k₂
transportf_square
  (! assoc (double_coalg_map X₁) (#v F v₁)
       (identity_v (F X₂)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : F X₁ -->v F X₂, double_coalg_map X₁ ·v z)
     (id_v_right (#v F v₁) @ ! id_v_left (#v F v₁)) @
   assoc (double_coalg_map X₁) (id₁ (F X₁)) (#v F v₁) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X₁ -->v F X₁, z ·v #v F v₁)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X₁)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v₁)
  (! assoc (double_coalg_map Z₁) (#v F v₃)
       (identity_v (F Z₂)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : F Z₁ -->v F Z₂, double_coalg_map Z₁ ·v z)
     (id_v_right (#v F v₃) @ ! id_v_left (#v F v₃)) @
   assoc (double_coalg_map Z₁) (id₁ (F Z₁)) (#v F v₃) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Z₁ -->v F Z₁, z ·v #v F v₃)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Z₁)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v₃)
  (transportf_square (! double_coalg_ver_comm v₁)
     (idpath (double_coalg_map Z₁ ·v #v F v₃))
     ((s₁ ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₁)
      ⋆h transportf_square
           (! (! double_coalg_ver_comm v₂))
           (idpath (double_coalg_map Z₁ ·v #v F v₃))
           (transportf_square
              (! double_coalg_ver_comm v₂)
              (! double_coalg_ver_comm v₃)
              (s₂ ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₂)))
   ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F k₁ k₂) =
transportf_square
  (maponpaths (λ z : X₂ -->v F X₂, v₁ ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X₂)))
  (maponpaths (λ z : Z₂ -->v F Z₂, v₃ ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Z₂)))
  (s₁ ⋆h s₂
   ⋆v (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₁
       ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₂
       ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F k₁ k₂))

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂, Z₁, Z₂: double_coalg F
v₁: double_coalg_ver X₁ X₂
v₂: double_coalg_ver Y₁ Y₂
v₃: double_coalg_ver Z₁ Z₂
h₁: double_coalg_hor X₁ Y₁
h₂: double_coalg_hor Y₁ Z₁
k₁: double_coalg_hor X₂ Y₂
k₂: double_coalg_hor Y₂ Z₂
s₁: double_coalg_sqr v₁ v₂ h₁ k₁
s₂: double_coalg_sqr v₂ v₃ h₂ k₂
transportf_square
  (! assoc (double_coalg_map X₁) (#v F v₁)
       (identity_v (F X₂)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : F X₁ -->v F X₂, double_coalg_map X₁ ·v z)
     (id_v_right (#v F v₁) @ ! id_v_left (#v F v₁)) @
   assoc (double_coalg_map X₁) (id₁ (F X₁)) (#v F v₁) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X₁ -->v F X₁, z ·v #v F v₁)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X₁)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v₁)
  (! assoc (double_coalg_map Z₁) (#v F v₃)
       (identity_v (F Z₂)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : F Z₁ -->v F Z₂, double_coalg_map Z₁ ·v z)
     (id_v_right (#v F v₃) @ ! id_v_left (#v F v₃)) @
   assoc (double_coalg_map Z₁) (id₁ (F Z₁)) (#v F v₃) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Z₁ -->v F Z₁, z ·v #v F v₃)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Z₁)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v₃)
  (transportf_square
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : X₁ -->v F X₂, z ·v identity_v (F X₂))
        (! double_coalg_ver_comm v₁))
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : Z₁ -->v F Z₂, z ·v identity_v (F Z₂))
        (idpath (double_coalg_map Z₁ ·v #v F v₃)))
     ((s₁ ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₁)
      ⋆h transportf_square
           (! (! double_coalg_ver_comm v₂))
           (idpath (double_coalg_map Z₁ ·v #v F v₃))
           (transportf_square
              (! double_coalg_ver_comm v₂)
              (! double_coalg_ver_comm v₃)
              (s₂ ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₂))
      ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F k₁ k₂)) =
transportf_square
  (maponpaths (λ z : X₂ -->v F X₂, v₁ ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X₂)))
  (maponpaths (λ z : Z₂ -->v F Z₂, v₃ ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Z₂)))
  (s₁ ⋆h s₂
   ⋆v (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₁
       ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₂
       ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F k₁ k₂))

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂, Z₁, Z₂: double_coalg F
v₁: double_coalg_ver X₁ X₂
v₂: double_coalg_ver Y₁ Y₂
v₃: double_coalg_ver Z₁ Z₂
h₁: double_coalg_hor X₁ Y₁
h₂: double_coalg_hor Y₁ Z₁
k₁: double_coalg_hor X₂ Y₂
k₂: double_coalg_hor Y₂ Z₂
s₁: double_coalg_sqr v₁ v₂ h₁ k₁
s₂: double_coalg_sqr v₂ v₃ h₂ k₂
transportf_square
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : X₁ -->v F X₂, z ·v identity_v (F X₂))
     (! double_coalg_ver_comm v₁) @
   ! assoc (double_coalg_map X₁) (#v F v₁)
       (identity_v (F X₂)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : F X₁ -->v F X₂, double_coalg_map X₁ ·v z)
     (id_v_right (#v F v₁) @ ! id_v_left (#v F v₁)) @
   assoc (double_coalg_map X₁) (id₁ (F X₁)) (#v F v₁) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X₁ -->v F X₁, z ·v #v F v₁)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X₁)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v₁)
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : Z₁ -->v F Z₂, z ·v identity_v (F Z₂))
     (idpath (double_coalg_map Z₁ ·v #v F v₃)) @
   ! assoc (double_coalg_map Z₁) (#v F v₃)
       (identity_v (F Z₂)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : F Z₁ -->v F Z₂, double_coalg_map Z₁ ·v z)
     (id_v_right (#v F v₃) @ ! id_v_left (#v F v₃)) @
   assoc (double_coalg_map Z₁) (id₁ (F Z₁)) (#v F v₃) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Z₁ -->v F Z₁, z ·v #v F v₃)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Z₁)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v₃)
  ((s₁ ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₁)
   ⋆h transportf_square
        (! double_coalg_ver_comm v₂ @
         ! (! double_coalg_ver_comm v₂))
        (! double_coalg_ver_comm v₃ @
         idpath (double_coalg_map Z₁ ·v #v F v₃))
        (s₂ ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₂)
   ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F k₁ k₂) =
transportf_square
  (maponpaths (λ z : X₂ -->v F X₂, v₁ ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X₂)))
  (maponpaths (λ z : Z₂ -->v F Z₂, v₃ ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Z₂)))
  (s₁ ⋆h s₂
   ⋆v (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₁
       ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₂
       ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F k₁ k₂))

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂, Z₁, Z₂: double_coalg F
v₁: double_coalg_ver X₁ X₂
v₂: double_coalg_ver Y₁ Y₂
v₃: double_coalg_ver Z₁ Z₂
h₁: double_coalg_hor X₁ Y₁
h₂: double_coalg_hor Y₁ Z₁
k₁: double_coalg_hor X₂ Y₂
k₂: double_coalg_hor Y₂ Z₂
s₁: double_coalg_sqr v₁ v₂ h₁ k₁
s₂: double_coalg_sqr v₂ v₃ h₂ k₂
transportf_square
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : X₁ -->v F X₂, z ·v identity_v (F X₂))
     (! double_coalg_ver_comm v₁) @
   ! assoc (double_coalg_map X₁) (#v F v₁)
       (identity_v (F X₂)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : F X₁ -->v F X₂, double_coalg_map X₁ ·v z)
     (id_v_right (#v F v₁) @ ! id_v_left (#v F v₁)) @
   assoc (double_coalg_map X₁) (id₁ (F X₁)) (#v F v₁) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X₁ -->v F X₁, z ·v #v F v₁)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X₁)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v₁)
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : Z₁ -->v F Z₂, z ·v identity_v (F Z₂))
     (idpath (double_coalg_map Z₁ ·v #v F v₃)) @
   ! assoc (double_coalg_map Z₁) (#v F v₃)
       (identity_v (F Z₂)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : F Z₁ -->v F Z₂, double_coalg_map Z₁ ·v z)
     (id_v_right (#v F v₃) @ ! id_v_left (#v F v₃)) @
   assoc (double_coalg_map Z₁) (id₁ (F Z₁)) (#v F v₃) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Z₁ -->v F Z₁, z ·v #v F v₃)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Z₁)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v₃)
  ((s₁ ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₁)
   ⋆h transportf_square
        (idpath (v₂ ·v double_coalg_map Y₂))
        (! double_coalg_ver_comm v₃ @
         idpath (double_coalg_map Z₁ ·v #v F v₃))
        (s₂ ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₂)
   ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F k₁ k₂) =
transportf_square
  (maponpaths (λ z : X₂ -->v F X₂, v₁ ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X₂)))
  (maponpaths (λ z : Z₂ -->v F Z₂, v₃ ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Z₂)))
  (s₁ ⋆h s₂
   ⋆v (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₁
       ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₂
       ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F k₁ k₂))

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂, Z₁, Z₂: double_coalg F
v₁: double_coalg_ver X₁ X₂
v₂: double_coalg_ver Y₁ Y₂
v₃: double_coalg_ver Z₁ Z₂
h₁: double_coalg_hor X₁ Y₁
h₂: double_coalg_hor Y₁ Z₁
k₁: double_coalg_hor X₂ Y₂
k₂: double_coalg_hor Y₂ Z₂
s₁: double_coalg_sqr v₁ v₂ h₁ k₁
s₂: double_coalg_sqr v₂ v₃ h₂ k₂
transportf_square
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : X₁ -->v F X₂, z ·v identity_v (F X₂))
     (! double_coalg_ver_comm v₁) @
   ! assoc (double_coalg_map X₁) (#v F v₁)
       (identity_v (F X₂)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : F X₁ -->v F X₂, double_coalg_map X₁ ·v z)
     (id_v_right (#v F v₁) @ ! id_v_left (#v F v₁)) @
   assoc (double_coalg_map X₁) (id₁ (F X₁)) (#v F v₁) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X₁ -->v F X₁, z ·v #v F v₁)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X₁)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v₁)
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : Z₁ -->v F Z₂, z ·v identity_v (F Z₂))
     (idpath (double_coalg_map Z₁ ·v #v F v₃)) @
   ! assoc (double_coalg_map Z₁) (#v F v₃)
       (identity_v (F Z₂)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : F Z₁ -->v F Z₂, double_coalg_map Z₁ ·v z)
     (id_v_right (#v F v₃) @ ! id_v_left (#v F v₃)) @
   assoc (double_coalg_map Z₁) (id₁ (F Z₁)) (#v F v₃) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Z₁ -->v F Z₁, z ·v #v F v₃)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Z₁)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v₃)
  (transportf_square
     (idpath (v₁ ·v double_coalg_map X₂))
     (! double_coalg_ver_comm v₃ @
      idpath (double_coalg_map Z₁ ·v #v F v₃))
     (transportf_square
        (idpath (v₁ ·v double_coalg_map X₂))
        (! idpath (v₂ ·v double_coalg_map Y₂))
        (s₁ ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₁)
      ⋆h (s₂ ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₂))
   ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F k₁ k₂) =
transportf_square
  (maponpaths (λ z : X₂ -->v F X₂, v₁ ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X₂)))
  (maponpaths (λ z : Z₂ -->v F Z₂, v₃ ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Z₂)))
  (s₁ ⋆h s₂
   ⋆v (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₁
       ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₂
       ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F k₁ k₂))

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂, Z₁, Z₂: double_coalg F
v₁: double_coalg_ver X₁ X₂
v₂: double_coalg_ver Y₁ Y₂
v₃: double_coalg_ver Z₁ Z₂
h₁: double_coalg_hor X₁ Y₁
h₂: double_coalg_hor Y₁ Z₁
k₁: double_coalg_hor X₂ Y₂
k₂: double_coalg_hor Y₂ Z₂
s₁: double_coalg_sqr v₁ v₂ h₁ k₁
s₂: double_coalg_sqr v₂ v₃ h₂ k₂
transportf_square
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : X₁ -->v F X₂, z ·v identity_v (F X₂))
     (! double_coalg_ver_comm v₁) @
   ! assoc (double_coalg_map X₁) (#v F v₁)
       (identity_v (F X₂)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : F X₁ -->v F X₂, double_coalg_map X₁ ·v z)
     (id_v_right (#v F v₁) @ ! id_v_left (#v F v₁)) @
   assoc (double_coalg_map X₁) (id₁ (F X₁)) (#v F v₁) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X₁ -->v F X₁, z ·v #v F v₁)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X₁)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v₁)
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : Z₁ -->v F Z₂, z ·v identity_v (F Z₂))
     (idpath (double_coalg_map Z₁ ·v #v F v₃)) @
   ! assoc (double_coalg_map Z₁) (#v F v₃)
       (identity_v (F Z₂)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : F Z₁ -->v F Z₂, double_coalg_map Z₁ ·v z)
     (id_v_right (#v F v₃) @ ! id_v_left (#v F v₃)) @
   assoc (double_coalg_map Z₁) (id₁ (F Z₁)) (#v F v₃) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Z₁ -->v F Z₁, z ·v #v F v₃)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Z₁)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v₃)
  (transportf_square
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : X₁ -->v F X₂, z ·v identity_v (F X₂))
        (idpath (v₁ ·v double_coalg_map X₂)))
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : Z₁ -->v F Z₂, z ·v identity_v (F Z₂))
        (! double_coalg_ver_comm v₃ @
         idpath (double_coalg_map Z₁ ·v #v F v₃)))
     (transportf_square
        (idpath (v₁ ·v double_coalg_map X₂))
        (! idpath (v₂ ·v double_coalg_map Y₂))
        (s₁ ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₁)
      ⋆h (s₂ ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₂)
      ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F k₁ k₂)) =
transportf_square
  (maponpaths (λ z : X₂ -->v F X₂, v₁ ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X₂)))
  (maponpaths (λ z : Z₂ -->v F Z₂, v₃ ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Z₂)))
  (s₁ ⋆h s₂
   ⋆v (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₁
       ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₂
       ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F k₁ k₂))

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂, Z₁, Z₂: double_coalg F
v₁: double_coalg_ver X₁ X₂
v₂: double_coalg_ver Y₁ Y₂
v₃: double_coalg_ver Z₁ Z₂
h₁: double_coalg_hor X₁ Y₁
h₂: double_coalg_hor Y₁ Z₁
k₁: double_coalg_hor X₂ Y₂
k₂: double_coalg_hor Y₂ Z₂
s₁: double_coalg_sqr v₁ v₂ h₁ k₁
s₂: double_coalg_sqr v₂ v₃ h₂ k₂
transportf_square
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : X₁ -->v F X₂, z ·v identity_v (F X₂))
     (idpath (v₁ ·v double_coalg_map X₂)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : X₁ -->v F X₂, z ·v identity_v (F X₂))
     (! double_coalg_ver_comm v₁) @
   ! assoc (double_coalg_map X₁) (#v F v₁)
       (identity_v (F X₂)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : F X₁ -->v F X₂, double_coalg_map X₁ ·v z)
     (id_v_right (#v F v₁) @ ! id_v_left (#v F v₁)) @
   assoc (double_coalg_map X₁) (id₁ (F X₁)) (#v F v₁) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X₁ -->v F X₁, z ·v #v F v₁)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X₁)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v₁)
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : Z₁ -->v F Z₂, z ·v identity_v (F Z₂))
     (! double_coalg_ver_comm v₃ @
      idpath (double_coalg_map Z₁ ·v #v F v₃)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : Z₁ -->v F Z₂, z ·v identity_v (F Z₂))
     (idpath (double_coalg_map Z₁ ·v #v F v₃)) @
   ! assoc (double_coalg_map Z₁) (#v F v₃)
       (identity_v (F Z₂)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : F Z₁ -->v F Z₂, double_coalg_map Z₁ ·v z)
     (id_v_right (#v F v₃) @ ! id_v_left (#v F v₃)) @
   assoc (double_coalg_map Z₁) (id₁ (F Z₁)) (#v F v₃) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Z₁ -->v F Z₁, z ·v #v F v₃)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Z₁)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v₃)
  (transportf_square
     (idpath (v₁ ·v double_coalg_map X₂))
     (! idpath (v₂ ·v double_coalg_map Y₂))
     (s₁ ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₁)
   ⋆h (s₂ ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₂)
   ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F k₁ k₂) =
transportf_square
  (maponpaths (λ z : X₂ -->v F X₂, v₁ ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X₂)))
  (maponpaths (λ z : Z₂ -->v F Z₂, v₃ ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Z₂)))
  (s₁ ⋆h s₂
   ⋆v (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₁
       ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₂
       ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F k₁ k₂))

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂, Z₁, Z₂: double_coalg F
v₁: double_coalg_ver X₁ X₂
v₂: double_coalg_ver Y₁ Y₂
v₃: double_coalg_ver Z₁ Z₂
h₁: double_coalg_hor X₁ Y₁
h₂: double_coalg_hor Y₁ Z₁
k₁: double_coalg_hor X₂ Y₂
k₂: double_coalg_hor Y₂ Z₂
s₁: double_coalg_sqr v₁ v₂ h₁ k₁
s₂: double_coalg_sqr v₂ v₃ h₂ k₂
transportf_square
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : X₁ -->v F X₂, z ·v identity_v (F X₂))
     (! double_coalg_ver_comm v₁) @
   ! assoc (double_coalg_map X₁) (#v F v₁)
       (identity_v (F X₂)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : F X₁ -->v F X₂, double_coalg_map X₁ ·v z)
     (id_v_right (#v F v₁) @ ! id_v_left (#v F v₁)) @
   assoc (double_coalg_map X₁) (id₁ (F X₁)) (#v F v₁) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X₁ -->v F X₁, z ·v #v F v₁)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X₁)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v₁)
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : Z₁ -->v F Z₂, z ·v identity_v (F Z₂))
     (! double_coalg_ver_comm v₃ @
      idpath (double_coalg_map Z₁ ·v #v F v₃)) @
   ! assoc (double_coalg_map Z₁) (#v F v₃)
       (identity_v (F Z₂)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : F Z₁ -->v F Z₂, double_coalg_map Z₁ ·v z)
     (id_v_right (#v F v₃) @ ! id_v_left (#v F v₃)) @
   assoc (double_coalg_map Z₁) (id₁ (F Z₁)) (#v F v₃) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Z₁ -->v F Z₁, z ·v #v F v₃)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Z₁)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v₃)
  ((s₁ ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₁)
   ⋆h (s₂ ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₂)
   ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F k₁ k₂) =
transportf_square
  (maponpaths (λ z : X₂ -->v F X₂, v₁ ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X₂)))
  (maponpaths (λ z : Z₂ -->v F Z₂, v₃ ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Z₂)))
  (s₁ ⋆h s₂
   ⋆v (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₁
       ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₂
       ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F k₁ k₂))

F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category

v₁: double_coalg_ver X₁ X₂
v₂: double_coalg_ver Y₁ Y₂
v₃: double_coalg_ver Z₁ Z₂

h₂: double_coalg_hor Y₁ Z₁
k₁: double_coalg_hor X₂ Y₂
k₂: double_coalg_hor Y₂ Z₂

s₂: double_coalg_sqr v₂ v₃ h₂ k₂

  (maponpaths (λ z : X₂ -->v F X₂, v₁ ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X₂)))
  (maponpaths (λ z : Z₂ -->v F Z₂, v₃ ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Z₂)))
  (s₁ ⋆h s₂
   ⋆v (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₁
       ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₂
       ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F k₁ k₂)) =
transportf_square
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : X₁ -->v F X₂, z ·v identity_v (F X₂))
     (! double_coalg_ver_comm v₁) @
   ! assoc (double_coalg_map X₁) (#v F v₁)
       (identity_v (F X₂)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : F X₁ -->v F X₂, double_coalg_map X₁ ·v z)
     (id_v_right (#v F v₁) @ ! id_v_left (#v F v₁)) @
   assoc (double_coalg_map X₁) (id₁ (F X₁)) (#v F v₁) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X₁ -->v F X₁, z ·v #v F v₁)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X₁)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v₁)
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : Z₁ -->v F Z₂, z ·v identity_v (F Z₂))
     (! double_coalg_ver_comm v₃ @
      idpath (double_coalg_map Z₁ ·v #v F v₃)) @
   ! assoc (double_coalg_map Z₁) (#v F v₃)
       (identity_v (F Z₂)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : F Z₁ -->v F Z₂, double_coalg_map Z₁ ·v z)
     (id_v_right (#v F v₃) @ ! id_v_left (#v F v₃)) @
   assoc (double_coalg_map Z₁) (id₁ (F Z₁)) (#v F v₃) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Z₁ -->v F Z₁, z ·v #v F v₃)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Z₁)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v₃)
  ((s₁ ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₁)
   ⋆h (s₂ ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₂)
   ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F k₁ k₂)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂, Z₁, Z₂: double_coalg F
v₁: double_coalg_ver X₁ X₂
v₂: double_coalg_ver Y₁ Y₂
v₃: double_coalg_ver Z₁ Z₂
h₁: double_coalg_hor X₁ Y₁
h₂: double_coalg_hor Y₁ Z₁
k₁: double_coalg_hor X₂ Y₂
k₂: double_coalg_hor Y₂ Z₂
s₁: double_coalg_sqr v₁ v₂ h₁ k₁
s₂: double_coalg_sqr v₂ v₃ h₂ k₂
transportf_square
  (maponpaths (λ z : X₂ -->v F X₂, v₁ ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X₂)))
  (maponpaths (λ z : Z₂ -->v F Z₂, v₃ ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Z₂)))
  (s₁ ⋆h s₂
   ⋆v (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₁
       ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₂
       ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F k₁ k₂)) = ?b
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂, Z₁, Z₂: double_coalg F
v₁: double_coalg_ver X₁ X₂
v₂: double_coalg_ver Y₁ Y₂
v₃: double_coalg_ver Z₁ Z₂
h₁: double_coalg_hor X₁ Y₁
h₂: double_coalg_hor Y₁ Z₁
k₁: double_coalg_hor X₂ Y₂
k₂: double_coalg_hor Y₂ Z₂
s₁: double_coalg_sqr v₁ v₂ h₁ k₁
s₂: double_coalg_sqr v₂ v₃ h₂ k₂
?b =
transportf_square
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : X₁ -->v F X₂, z ·v identity_v (F X₂))
     (! double_coalg_ver_comm v₁) @
   ! assoc (double_coalg_map X₁) (#v F v₁)
       (identity_v (F X₂)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : F X₁ -->v F X₂, double_coalg_map X₁ ·v z)
     (id_v_right (#v F v₁) @ ! id_v_left (#v F v₁)) @
   assoc (double_coalg_map X₁) (id₁ (F X₁)) (#v F v₁) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X₁ -->v F X₁, z ·v #v F v₁)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X₁)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v₁)
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : Z₁ -->v F Z₂, z ·v identity_v (F Z₂))
     (! double_coalg_ver_comm v₃ @
      idpath (double_coalg_map Z₁ ·v #v F v₃)) @
   ! assoc (double_coalg_map Z₁) (#v F v₃)
       (identity_v (F Z₂)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : F Z₁ -->v F Z₂, double_coalg_map Z₁ ·v z)
     (id_v_right (#v F v₃) @ ! id_v_left (#v F v₃)) @
   assoc (double_coalg_map Z₁) (id₁ (F Z₁)) (#v F v₃) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Z₁ -->v F Z₁, z ·v #v F v₃)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Z₁)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v₃)
  ((s₁ ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₁)
   ⋆h (s₂ ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₂)
   ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F k₁ k₂)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂, Z₁, Z₂: double_coalg F
v₁: double_coalg_ver X₁ X₂
v₂: double_coalg_ver Y₁ Y₂
v₃: double_coalg_ver Z₁ Z₂
h₁: double_coalg_hor X₁ Y₁
h₂: double_coalg_hor Y₁ Z₁
k₁: double_coalg_hor X₂ Y₂
k₂: double_coalg_hor Y₂ Z₂
s₁: double_coalg_sqr v₁ v₂ h₁ k₁
s₂: double_coalg_sqr v₂ v₃ h₂ k₂
transportf_square
  (maponpaths (λ z : X₂ -->v F X₂, v₁ ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X₂)))
  (maponpaths (λ z : Z₂ -->v F Z₂, v₃ ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Z₂)))
  (s₁ ⋆h s₂
   ⋆v (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₁
       ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₂
       ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F k₁ k₂)) = ?b

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂, Z₁, Z₂: double_coalg F
v₁: double_coalg_ver X₁ X₂
v₂: double_coalg_ver Y₁ Y₂
v₃: double_coalg_ver Z₁ Z₂
h₁: double_coalg_hor X₁ Y₁
h₂: double_coalg_hor Y₁ Z₁
k₁: double_coalg_hor X₂ Y₂
k₂: double_coalg_hor Y₂ Z₂
s₁: double_coalg_sqr v₁ v₂ h₁ k₁
s₂: double_coalg_sqr v₂ v₃ h₂ k₂
s₁ ⋆h s₂
⋆v (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₁
    ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₂
    ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F k₁ k₂) = ?t2

      apply (square_assoc_v (C := C)).
    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂, Z₁, Z₂: double_coalg F
v₁: double_coalg_ver X₁ X₂
v₂: double_coalg_ver Y₁ Y₂
v₃: double_coalg_ver Z₁ Z₂
h₁: double_coalg_hor X₁ Y₁
h₂: double_coalg_hor Y₁ Z₁
k₁: double_coalg_hor X₂ Y₂
k₂: double_coalg_hor Y₂ Z₂
s₁: double_coalg_sqr v₁ v₂ h₁ k₁
s₂: double_coalg_sqr v₂ v₃ h₂ k₂
transportf_square
  (maponpaths (λ z : X₂ -->v F X₂, v₁ ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X₂)))
  (maponpaths (λ z : Z₂ -->v F Z₂, v₃ ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Z₂)))
  (transportb_square
     (assoc v₁ (double_coalg_map X₂) (id₁ (F X₂)))
     (assoc v₃ (double_coalg_map Z₂) (id₁ (F Z₂)))
     (s₁ ⋆h s₂
      ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₁
         ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₂
      ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F k₁ k₂)) =
transportf_square
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : X₁ -->v F X₂, z ·v identity_v (F X₂))
     (! double_coalg_ver_comm v₁) @
   ! assoc (double_coalg_map X₁) (#v F v₁)
       (identity_v (F X₂)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : F X₁ -->v F X₂, double_coalg_map X₁ ·v z)
     (id_v_right (#v F v₁) @ ! id_v_left (#v F v₁)) @
   assoc (double_coalg_map X₁) (id₁ (F X₁)) (#v F v₁) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X₁ -->v F X₁, z ·v #v F v₁)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X₁)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v₁)
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : Z₁ -->v F Z₂, z ·v identity_v (F Z₂))
     (! double_coalg_ver_comm v₃ @
      idpath (double_coalg_map Z₁ ·v #v F v₃)) @
   ! assoc (double_coalg_map Z₁) (#v F v₃)
       (identity_v (F Z₂)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : F Z₁ -->v F Z₂, double_coalg_map Z₁ ·v z)
     (id_v_right (#v F v₃) @ ! id_v_left (#v F v₃)) @
   assoc (double_coalg_map Z₁) (id₁ (F Z₁)) (#v F v₃) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Z₁ -->v F Z₁, z ·v #v F v₃)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Z₁)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v₃)
  ((s₁ ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₁)
   ⋆h (s₂ ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₂)
   ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F k₁ k₂)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂, Z₁, Z₂: double_coalg F
v₁: double_coalg_ver X₁ X₂
v₂: double_coalg_ver Y₁ Y₂
v₃: double_coalg_ver Z₁ Z₂
h₁: double_coalg_hor X₁ Y₁
h₂: double_coalg_hor Y₁ Z₁
k₁: double_coalg_hor X₂ Y₂
k₂: double_coalg_hor Y₂ Z₂
s₁: double_coalg_sqr v₁ v₂ h₁ k₁
s₂: double_coalg_sqr v₂ v₃ h₂ k₂
transportf_square
  (maponpaths (λ z : X₂ -->v F X₂, v₁ ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X₂)))
  (maponpaths (λ z : Z₂ -->v F Z₂, v₃ ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Z₂)))
  (transportf_square
     (! assoc v₁ (double_coalg_map X₂) (id₁ (F X₂)))
     (! assoc v₃ (double_coalg_map Z₂) (id₁ (F Z₂)))
     (s₁ ⋆h s₂
      ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₁
         ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₂
      ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F k₁ k₂)) =
transportf_square
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : X₁ -->v F X₂, z ·v identity_v (F X₂))
     (! double_coalg_ver_comm v₁) @
   ! assoc (double_coalg_map X₁) (#v F v₁)
       (identity_v (F X₂)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : F X₁ -->v F X₂, double_coalg_map X₁ ·v z)
     (id_v_right (#v F v₁) @ ! id_v_left (#v F v₁)) @
   assoc (double_coalg_map X₁) (id₁ (F X₁)) (#v F v₁) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X₁ -->v F X₁, z ·v #v F v₁)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X₁)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v₁)
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : Z₁ -->v F Z₂, z ·v identity_v (F Z₂))
     (! double_coalg_ver_comm v₃ @
      idpath (double_coalg_map Z₁ ·v #v F v₃)) @
   ! assoc (double_coalg_map Z₁) (#v F v₃)
       (identity_v (F Z₂)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : F Z₁ -->v F Z₂, double_coalg_map Z₁ ·v z)
     (id_v_right (#v F v₃) @ ! id_v_left (#v F v₃)) @
   assoc (double_coalg_map Z₁) (id₁ (F Z₁)) (#v F v₃) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Z₁ -->v F Z₁, z ·v #v F v₃)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Z₁)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v₃)
  ((s₁ ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₁)
   ⋆h (s₂ ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₂)
   ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F k₁ k₂)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂, Z₁, Z₂: double_coalg F
v₁: double_coalg_ver X₁ X₂
v₂: double_coalg_ver Y₁ Y₂
v₃: double_coalg_ver Z₁ Z₂
h₁: double_coalg_hor X₁ Y₁
h₂: double_coalg_hor Y₁ Z₁
k₁: double_coalg_hor X₂ Y₂
k₂: double_coalg_hor Y₂ Z₂
s₁: double_coalg_sqr v₁ v₂ h₁ k₁
s₂: double_coalg_sqr v₂ v₃ h₂ k₂
transportf_square
  (! assoc v₁ (double_coalg_map X₂) (id₁ (F X₂)) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X₂ -->v F X₂, v₁ ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X₂)))
  (! assoc v₃ (double_coalg_map Z₂) (id₁ (F Z₂)) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Z₂ -->v F Z₂, v₃ ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Z₂)))
  (s₁ ⋆h s₂
   ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₁
      ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₂
   ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F k₁ k₂) =
transportf_square
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : X₁ -->v F X₂, z ·v identity_v (F X₂))
     (! double_coalg_ver_comm v₁) @
   ! assoc (double_coalg_map X₁) (#v F v₁)
       (identity_v (F X₂)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : F X₁ -->v F X₂, double_coalg_map X₁ ·v z)
     (id_v_right (#v F v₁) @ ! id_v_left (#v F v₁)) @
   assoc (double_coalg_map X₁) (id₁ (F X₁)) (#v F v₁) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X₁ -->v F X₁, z ·v #v F v₁)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X₁)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v₁)
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : Z₁ -->v F Z₂, z ·v identity_v (F Z₂))
     (! double_coalg_ver_comm v₃ @
      idpath (double_coalg_map Z₁ ·v #v F v₃)) @
   ! assoc (double_coalg_map Z₁) (#v F v₃)
       (identity_v (F Z₂)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : F Z₁ -->v F Z₂, double_coalg_map Z₁ ·v z)
     (id_v_right (#v F v₃) @ ! id_v_left (#v F v₃)) @
   assoc (double_coalg_map Z₁) (id₁ (F Z₁)) (#v F v₃) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Z₁ -->v F Z₁, z ·v #v F v₃)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Z₁)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v₃)
  ((s₁ ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₁)
   ⋆h (s₂ ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₂)
   ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F k₁ k₂)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂, Z₁, Z₂: double_coalg F
v₁: double_coalg_ver X₁ X₂
v₂: double_coalg_ver Y₁ Y₂
v₃: double_coalg_ver Z₁ Z₂
h₁: double_coalg_hor X₁ Y₁
h₂: double_coalg_hor Y₁ Z₁
k₁: double_coalg_hor X₂ Y₂
k₂: double_coalg_hor Y₂ Z₂
s₁: double_coalg_sqr v₁ v₂ h₁ k₁
s₂: double_coalg_sqr v₂ v₃ h₂ k₂
transportf_square
  (! assoc v₁ (double_coalg_map X₂) (id₁ (F X₂)) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X₂ -->v F X₂, v₁ ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X₂)))
  (! assoc v₃ (double_coalg_map Z₂) (id₁ (F Z₂)) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Z₂ -->v F Z₂, v₃ ·v z)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Z₂)))
  ((s₁ ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₁)
   ⋆h (s₂ ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₂)
   ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F k₁ k₂) =
transportf_square
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : X₁ -->v F X₂, z ·v identity_v (F X₂))
     (! double_coalg_ver_comm v₁) @
   ! assoc (double_coalg_map X₁) (#v F v₁)
       (identity_v (F X₂)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : F X₁ -->v F X₂, double_coalg_map X₁ ·v z)
     (id_v_right (#v F v₁) @ ! id_v_left (#v F v₁)) @
   assoc (double_coalg_map X₁) (id₁ (F X₁)) (#v F v₁) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X₁ -->v F X₁, z ·v #v F v₁)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map X₁)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v₁)
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : Z₁ -->v F Z₂, z ·v identity_v (F Z₂))
     (! double_coalg_ver_comm v₃ @
      idpath (double_coalg_map Z₁ ·v #v F v₃)) @
   ! assoc (double_coalg_map Z₁) (#v F v₃)
       (identity_v (F Z₂)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : F Z₁ -->v F Z₂, double_coalg_map Z₁ ·v z)
     (id_v_right (#v F v₃) @ ! id_v_left (#v F v₃)) @
   assoc (double_coalg_map Z₁) (id₁ (F Z₁)) (#v F v₃) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Z₁ -->v F Z₁, z ·v #v F v₃)
     (id_right (double_coalg_map Z₁)) @
   double_coalg_ver_comm v₃)
  ((s₁ ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₁)
   ⋆h (s₂ ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₂)
   ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F k₁ k₂)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂, Z₁, Z₂: double_coalg F
v₁: double_coalg_ver X₁ X₂
v₂: double_coalg_ver Y₁ Y₂
v₃: double_coalg_ver Z₁ Z₂
h₁: double_coalg_hor X₁ Y₁
h₂: double_coalg_hor Y₁ Z₁
k₁: double_coalg_hor X₂ Y₂
k₂: double_coalg_hor Y₂ Z₂
s₁: double_coalg_sqr v₁ v₂ h₁ k₁
s₂: double_coalg_sqr v₂ v₃ h₂ k₂
(s₁ ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₁)
⋆h (s₂ ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₂)
⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F k₁ k₂ =
(s₁ ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₁)
⋆h (s₂ ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k₂)
⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F k₁ k₂

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂, Z₁, Z₂: double_coalg F
v₁: double_coalg_ver X₁ X₂
v₂: double_coalg_ver Y₁ Y₂
v₃: double_coalg_ver Z₁ Z₂
h₁: double_coalg_hor X₁ Y₁
h₂: double_coalg_hor Y₁ Z₁
k₁: double_coalg_hor X₂ Y₂
k₂: double_coalg_hor Y₂ Z₂
s₁: double_coalg_sqr v₁ v₂ h₁ k₁
s₂: double_coalg_sqr v₂ v₃ h₂ k₂
double_coalg_sqr v₁ v₃ (double_coalg_comp_hor h₁ h₂)
  (double_coalg_comp_hor k₁ k₂)

  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂, Z₁, Z₂: double_coalg F
v₁: double_coalg_ver X₁ X₂
v₂: double_coalg_ver Y₁ Y₂
v₃: double_coalg_ver Z₁ Z₂
h₁: double_coalg_hor X₁ Y₁
h₂: double_coalg_hor Y₁ Z₁
k₁: double_coalg_hor X₂ Y₂
k₂: double_coalg_hor Y₂ Z₂

s₂: double_coalg_sqr v₂ v₃ h₂ k₂
