  (double_coalg_comp_hor k₁ k₂)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂, Z₁, Z₂: double_coalg F
v₁: double_coalg_ver X₁ X₂
v₂: double_coalg_ver Y₁ Y₂
v₃: double_coalg_ver Z₁ Z₂
h₁: double_coalg_hor X₁ Y₁
h₂: double_coalg_hor Y₁ Z₁
k₁: double_coalg_hor X₂ Y₂
k₂: double_coalg_hor Y₂ Z₂
s₁: double_coalg_sqr v₁ v₂ h₁ k₁
s₂: double_coalg_sqr v₂ v₃ h₂ k₂
square v₁ v₃ (double_coalg_comp_hor h₁ h₂)
  (double_coalg_comp_hor k₁ k₂)
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂, Z₁, Z₂: double_coalg F
v₁: double_coalg_ver X₁ X₂
v₂: double_coalg_ver Y₁ Y₂
v₃: double_coalg_ver Z₁ Z₂
h₁: double_coalg_hor X₁ Y₁
h₂: double_coalg_hor Y₁ Z₁
k₁: double_coalg_hor X₂ Y₂
k₂: double_coalg_hor Y₂ Z₂
s₁: double_coalg_sqr v₁ v₂ h₁ k₁
s₂: double_coalg_sqr v₂ v₃ h₂ k₂
is_double_coalg_sqr
  (pr2 (double_coalg_comp_hor h₁ h₂))
  (pr2 (double_coalg_comp_hor k₁ k₂)) v₁ v₃ ?s

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂, Z₁, Z₂: double_coalg F
v₁: double_coalg_ver X₁ X₂
v₂: double_coalg_ver Y₁ Y₂
v₃: double_coalg_ver Z₁ Z₂
h₁: double_coalg_hor X₁ Y₁
h₂: double_coalg_hor Y₁ Z₁
k₁: double_coalg_hor X₂ Y₂
k₂: double_coalg_hor Y₂ Z₂
s₁: double_coalg_sqr v₁ v₂ h₁ k₁
s₂: double_coalg_sqr v₂ v₃ h₂ k₂
square v₁ v₃ (double_coalg_comp_hor h₁ h₂)
  (double_coalg_comp_hor k₁ k₂)
 exact (s₁ ⋆h s₂).
    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂, Z₁, Z₂: double_coalg F
v₁: double_coalg_ver X₁ X₂
v₂: double_coalg_ver Y₁ Y₂
v₃: double_coalg_ver Z₁ Z₂
h₁: double_coalg_hor X₁ Y₁
h₂: double_coalg_hor Y₁ Z₁
k₁: double_coalg_hor X₂ Y₂
k₂: double_coalg_hor Y₂ Z₂
s₁: double_coalg_sqr v₁ v₂ h₁ k₁
s₂: double_coalg_sqr v₂ v₃ h₂ k₂
is_double_coalg_sqr
  (pr2 (double_coalg_comp_hor h₁ h₂))
  (pr2 (double_coalg_comp_hor k₁ k₂)) v₁ v₃ (s₁ ⋆h s₂)
 apply double_coalg_comp_hor_is_sqr.
  Defined.

  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
hor_comp_data double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat

  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
hor_comp_data double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
∏ x y z : CoAlg_category F,
double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat x y
→ double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat y z
  → double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat x z
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ z₁ z₂ : CoAlg_category F)
(v₁ : CoAlg_category F ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(v₂ : CoAlg_category F ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧)
(v₃ : CoAlg_category F ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧)
(h₁ : double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat x₁ y₁)
(h₂ : double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat y₁ z₁)
(k₁ : double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat x₂ y₂)
(k₂ : double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat y₂ z₂),
h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] k₁
→ h₂ -->[ v₂ ][ v₃] k₂
  → ?Cm x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ h₂ -->[ v₁
    ][ v₃] ?Cm x₂ y₂ z₂ k₁ k₂

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
∏ x y z : CoAlg_category F,
double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat x y
→ double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat y z
  → double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat x z
 exact (λ X Y Z h k, double_coalg_comp_hor h k).
    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ z₁ z₂ : CoAlg_category F)
(v₁ : CoAlg_category F ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(v₂ : CoAlg_category F ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧)
(v₃ : CoAlg_category F ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧)
(h₁ : double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat x₁ y₁)
(h₂ : double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat y₁ z₁)
(k₁ : double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat x₂ y₂)
(k₂ : double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat y₂ z₂),
h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] k₁
→ h₂ -->[ v₂ ][ v₃] k₂
  → (λ (X Y Z : CoAlg_category F)
     (h : double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat X Y)
     (k : double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat Y Z),
     double_coalg_comp_hor h k) x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ h₂ -->[ v₁
    ][ v₃] (λ (X Y Z : CoAlg_category F)
            (h : double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat X Y)
            (k : double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat Y Z),
            double_coalg_comp_hor h k) x₂ y₂ z₂ k₁ k₂
 exact (λ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ s₁ s₂,
             double_coalg_comp_hor_sqr s₁ s₂).
  Defined.

  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
hor_comp_laws double_coalg_hor_comp_data

  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
hor_comp_laws double_coalg_hor_comp_data

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
∏ (x y z : CoAlg_category F)
(h₁ : double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat x y)
(h₂ : double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat y z),
double_hor_comp_mor double_coalg_hor_comp_data
  (id_two_disp h₁) (id_two_disp h₂) =
id_two_disp
  (double_hor_comp double_coalg_hor_comp_data h₁ h₂)
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
∏ (x₁ x₂ x₃ y₁ y₂ y₃ z₁ z₂ z₃ : CoAlg_category F)
(v₁ : CoAlg_category F ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(v₁' : CoAlg_category F ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧)
(v₂ : CoAlg_category F ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧)
(v₂' : CoAlg_category F ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧)
(v₃ : CoAlg_category F ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧)
(v₃' : CoAlg_category F ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧)
(h₁ : double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat x₁ y₁)
(h₂ : double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat y₁ z₁)
(k₁ : double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat x₂ y₂)
(k₂ : double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat y₂ z₂)
(l₁ : double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat x₃ y₃)
(l₂ : double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat y₃ z₃)
(s₁ : h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] k₁)
(s₁' : k₁ -->[ v₁' ][ v₂'] l₁)
(s₂ : h₂ -->[ v₂ ][ v₃] k₂)
(s₂' : k₂ -->[ v₂' ][ v₃'] l₂),
double_hor_comp_mor double_coalg_hor_comp_data
  (s₁ ;;2 s₁') (s₂ ;;2 s₂') =
double_hor_comp_mor double_coalg_hor_comp_data s₁ s₂ ;;2 
double_hor_comp_mor double_coalg_hor_comp_data s₁' s₂'

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
∏ (x y z : CoAlg_category F)
(h₁ : double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat x y)
(h₂ : double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat y z),
double_hor_comp_mor double_coalg_hor_comp_data
  (id_two_disp h₁) (id_two_disp h₂) =
id_two_disp
  (double_hor_comp double_coalg_hor_comp_data h₁ h₂)
 
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
x, y, z: CoAlg_category F
h₁: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat x y
h₂: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat y z
double_hor_comp_mor double_coalg_hor_comp_data
  (id_two_disp h₁) (id_two_disp h₂) =
id_two_disp
  (double_hor_comp double_coalg_hor_comp_data h₁ h₂)

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
x, y, z: CoAlg_category F
h₁: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat x y
h₂: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat y z
id_two_disp (pr1 h₁) ⋆h id_two_disp (pr1 h₂) =
id_two_disp (h₁ ·h h₂)

      apply (comp_h_square_id (C := C)).
    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
∏ (x₁ x₂ x₃ y₁ y₂ y₃ z₁ z₂ z₃ : CoAlg_category F)
(v₁ : CoAlg_category F ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(v₁' : CoAlg_category F ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧)
(v₂ : CoAlg_category F ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧)
(v₂' : CoAlg_category F ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧)
(v₃ : CoAlg_category F ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧)
(v₃' : CoAlg_category F ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧)
(h₁ : double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat x₁ y₁)
(h₂ : double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat y₁ z₁)
(k₁ : double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat x₂ y₂)
(k₂ : double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat y₂ z₂)
(l₁ : double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat x₃ y₃)
(l₂ : double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat y₃ z₃)
(s₁ : h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] k₁)
(s₁' : k₁ -->[ v₁' ][ v₂'] l₁)
(s₂ : h₂ -->[ v₂ ][ v₃] k₂)
(s₂' : k₂ -->[ v₂' ][ v₃'] l₂),
double_hor_comp_mor double_coalg_hor_comp_data
  (s₁ ;;2 s₁') (s₂ ;;2 s₂') =
double_hor_comp_mor double_coalg_hor_comp_data s₁ s₂ ;;2 
double_hor_comp_mor double_coalg_hor_comp_data s₁' s₂'
 
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃, z₁, z₂, z₃: CoAlg_category F
v₁: CoAlg_category F ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₁': CoAlg_category F ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
v₂: CoAlg_category F ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₂': CoAlg_category F ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₃: CoAlg_category F ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₃': CoAlg_category F ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
h₁: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat x₁ y₁
h₂: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat y₁ z₁
k₁: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat x₂ y₂
k₂: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat y₂ z₂
l₁: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat x₃ y₃
l₂: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat y₃ z₃
s₁: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] k₁
s₁': k₁ -->[ v₁' ][ v₂'] l₁
s₂: h₂ -->[ v₂ ][ v₃] k₂
s₂': k₂ -->[ v₂' ][ v₃'] l₂
double_hor_comp_mor double_coalg_hor_comp_data
  (s₁ ;;2 s₁') (s₂ ;;2 s₂') =
double_hor_comp_mor double_coalg_hor_comp_data s₁ s₂ ;;2 
double_hor_comp_mor double_coalg_hor_comp_data s₁' s₂'

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃, z₁, z₂, z₃: CoAlg_category F
v₁: CoAlg_category F ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₁': CoAlg_category F ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
v₂: CoAlg_category F ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₂': CoAlg_category F ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₃: CoAlg_category F ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₃': CoAlg_category F ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
h₁: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat x₁ y₁
h₂: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat y₁ z₁
k₁: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat x₂ y₂
k₂: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat y₂ z₂
l₁: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat x₃ y₃
l₂: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat y₃ z₃
s₁: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] k₁
s₁': k₁ -->[ v₁' ][ v₂'] l₁
s₂: h₂ -->[ v₂ ][ v₃] k₂
s₂': k₂ -->[ v₂' ][ v₃'] l₂
(pr1 s₁ ;;2 pr1 s₁') ⋆h (pr1 s₂ ;;2 pr1 s₂') =
s₁ ⋆h s₂ ;;2 s₁' ⋆h s₂'

      apply (comp_h_square_comp (C := C)).
  Qed.

  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
hor_comp double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat

  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
hor_comp double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat

     (hor_mor C)): category

F: lax_double_functor C C

  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
hor_comp_laws ?Cm

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C

  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
hor_comp_data double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat
 exact double_coalg_hor_comp_data.
    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
hor_comp_laws double_coalg_hor_comp_data
 exact double_coalg_hor_comp_laws.
  Defined.

  (** * 7. Globular isomorphism squares *)
  Section IsoSquare.
    Context {X Y : double_coalg F}
            {h₁ : double_coalg_hor X Y}
            {h₂ : double_coalg_hor X Y}
            (s : double_coalg_sqr (identity _) (identity _) h₁ h₂)
            (s' : square (identity _) (identity _) h₂ h₁)
            (p : s ⋆v s'
                 =
                 transportb_square (id_left _) (id_left _) (id_v_square _))
            (q : s' ⋆v s
                 =
                 transportb_square (id_left _) (id_left _) (id_v_square _)).

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
is_double_coalg_sqr (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂)
  (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁) (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) s'

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
is_double_coalg_sqr (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂)
  (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁) (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) s'

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
transportf_square (id_disp (pr2 X)) (id_disp (pr2 Y))
  (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂ ⋆v #s F s') =
s' ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
transportf_square (id_disp (pr2 X)) (id_disp (pr2 Y))
  (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂ ⋆v #s F s') = ?b
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
?b = s' ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁

F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category

s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =

  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)

  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)

  (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂ ⋆v #s F s') = ?b

        
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂ ⋆v #s F s' = ?t2

        
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
?t2 = sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂ ⋆v #s F s'

        apply square_id_left_v'.
      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
transportf_square (id_disp (pr2 X)) (id_disp (pr2 Y))
  (transportf_square
     (id_left
        (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))))
     (id_left
        (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))))
     (id_v_square h₂
      ⋆v (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂ ⋆v #s F s'))) =
s' ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
transportf_square
  (id_left (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))) @
   id_disp (pr2 X))
  (id_left (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))) @
   id_disp (pr2 Y))
  (id_v_square h₂
   ⋆v (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂ ⋆v #s F s')) =
s' ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
transportf_square
  (id_left (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))) @
   id_disp (pr2 X))
  (id_left (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))) @
   id_disp (pr2 Y))
  (id_v_square h₂
   ⋆v (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂ ⋆v #s F s')) = ?b
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
?b = s' ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
transportf_square
  (id_left (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))) @
   id_disp (pr2 X))
  (id_left (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))) @
   id_disp (pr2 Y))
  (id_v_square h₂
   ⋆v (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂ ⋆v #s F s')) = ?b

        
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
id_v_square h₂
⋆v (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂ ⋆v #s F s') = ?t2

        
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
id_v_square h₂ = ?y'

        
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
id_v_square h₂ =
transportf_square (id_left (id₁ X)) (id_left (id₁ Y))
  (transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
     (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂))

        
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
id_v_square h₂ = id_v_square h₂

        apply idpath.
      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
transportf_square
  (id_left (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))) @
   id_disp (pr2 X))
  (id_left (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))) @
   id_disp (pr2 Y))
  (transportf_square (id_left (id₁ X))
     (id_left (id₁ Y)) (s' ⋆v s)
   ⋆v (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂ ⋆v #s F s')) =
s' ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
transportf_square
  (id_left (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))) @
   id_disp (pr2 X))
  (id_left (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))) @
   id_disp (pr2 Y))
  (transportf_square
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : X -->v X,
         z
         ·v (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))))
        (id_left (id₁ X)))
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : Y -->v Y,
         z
         ·v (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))))
        (id_left (id₁ Y)))
     (s' ⋆v s
      ⋆v (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂ ⋆v #s F s'))) =
s' ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
transportf_square
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : X -->v X,
      z ·v (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))))
     (id_left (id₁ X)) @
   id_left (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))) @
   id_disp (pr2 X))
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : Y -->v Y,
      z ·v (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))))
     (id_left (id₁ Y)) @
   id_left (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))) @
   id_disp (pr2 Y))
  (s' ⋆v s ⋆v (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂ ⋆v #s F s')) =
s' ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
transportf_square
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : X -->v X,
      z ·v (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))))
     (id_left (id₁ X)) @
   id_left (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))) @
   id_disp (pr2 X))
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : Y -->v Y,
      z ·v (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))))
     (id_left (id₁ Y)) @
   id_left (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))) @
   id_disp (pr2 Y))
  (s' ⋆v s ⋆v (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂ ⋆v #s F s')) =
?b

F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =

  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)

  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
?b = s' ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁

X, Y: double_coalg F

transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
transportf_square
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : X -->v X,
      z ·v (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))))
     (id_left (id₁ X)) @
   id_left (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))) @
   id_disp (pr2 X))
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : Y -->v Y,
      z ·v (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))))
     (id_left (id₁ Y)) @

E:= total_twosided_disp_category

X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y

s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁

  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)

  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)

C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
?t2 =
s' ⋆v s ⋆v (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂ ⋆v #s F s')

        apply (square_assoc_v' (C := C)).
      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
transportf_square
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : X -->v X,
      z ·v (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))))
     (id_left (id₁ X)) @
   id_left (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))) @
   id_disp (pr2 X))
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : Y -->v Y,
      z ·v (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))))
     (id_left (id₁ Y)) @
   id_left (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))) @
   id_disp (pr2 Y))
  (transportf_square
     (assoc (id₁ X) (id₁ X)
        (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))))
     (assoc (id₁ Y) (id₁ Y)
        (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))))
     (s'
      ⋆v (s ⋆v (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂ ⋆v #s F s')))) =
s' ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁

  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)

   id_left (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))) @

C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
transportf_square
  (assoc (id₁ X) (id₁ X)
     (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : X -->v X,
      z ·v (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))))
     (id_left (id₁ X)) @
   id_left (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))) @
   id_disp (pr2 X))
  (assoc (id₁ Y) (id₁ Y)
     (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : Y -->v Y,
      z ·v (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))))
     (id_left (id₁ Y)) @
   id_left (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))) @
   id_disp (pr2 Y))
  (s'
   ⋆v transportb_square
        (assoc (id₁ X) (double_coalg_map X)
           (#v F (id₁ (pr1 X))))
        (assoc (id₁ Y) (double_coalg_map Y)
           (#v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))))
        (s ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂ ⋆v #s F s')) =
s' ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
transportf_square
  (assoc (id₁ X) (id₁ X)
     (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : X -->v X,
      z ·v (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))))
     (id_left (id₁ X)) @
   id_left (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))) @
   id_disp (pr2 X))
  (assoc (id₁ Y) (id₁ Y)
     (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : Y -->v Y,
      z ·v (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))))
     (id_left (id₁ Y)) @
   id_left (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))) @
   id_disp (pr2 Y))
  (s'
   ⋆v transportf_square
        (! assoc (id₁ X) (double_coalg_map X)
             (#v F (id₁ (pr1 X))))
        (! assoc (id₁ Y) (double_coalg_map Y)
             (#v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))))
        (s ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂ ⋆v #s F s')) =
s' ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
transportf_square
  (assoc (id₁ X) (id₁ X)
     (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : X -->v X,
      z ·v (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))))
     (id_left (id₁ X)) @
   id_left (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))) @
   id_disp (pr2 X))
  (assoc (id₁ Y) (id₁ Y)
     (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : Y -->v Y,
      z ·v (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))))
     (id_left (id₁ Y)) @
   id_left (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))) @
   id_disp (pr2 Y))
  (transportf_square
     (maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
        (! assoc (id₁ X) (double_coalg_map X)
             (#v F (id₁ (pr1 X)))))
     (maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
        (! assoc (id₁ Y) (double_coalg_map Y)
             (#v F (id₁ (pr1 Y)))))
     (s'
      ⋆v (s ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂ ⋆v #s F s'))) =
s' ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
transportf_square
  (maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (! assoc (id₁ X) (double_coalg_map X)
          (#v F (id₁ (pr1 X)))) @
   assoc (id₁ X) (id₁ X)
     (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : X -->v X,
      z ·v (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))))
     (id_left (id₁ X)) @
   id_left (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))) @
   id_disp (pr2 X))
  (maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (! assoc (id₁ Y) (double_coalg_map Y)
          (#v F (id₁ (pr1 Y)))) @
   assoc (id₁ Y) (id₁ Y)
     (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : Y -->v Y,
      z ·v (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))))
     (id_left (id₁ Y)) @
   id_left (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))) @
   id_disp (pr2 Y))
  (s' ⋆v (s ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂ ⋆v #s F s')) =
s' ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
transportf_square
  (maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (! assoc (id₁ X) (double_coalg_map X)
          (#v F (id₁ (pr1 X)))) @
   assoc (id₁ X) (id₁ X)
     (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : X -->v X,
      z ·v (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))))
     (id_left (id₁ X)) @
   id_left (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))) @
   id_disp (pr2 X))
  (maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (! assoc (id₁ Y) (double_coalg_map Y)
          (#v F (id₁ (pr1 Y)))) @
   assoc (id₁ Y) (id₁ Y)
     (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : Y -->v Y,
      z ·v (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))))
     (id_left (id₁ Y)) @
   id_left (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))) @
   id_disp (pr2 Y))
  (s' ⋆v (s ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂ ⋆v #s F s')) =
?b
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
?b = s' ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
transportf_square
  (maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (! assoc (id₁ X) (double_coalg_map X)
          (#v F (id₁ (pr1 X)))) @
   assoc (id₁ X) (id₁ X)
     (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : X -->v X,
      z ·v (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))))
     (id_left (id₁ X)) @
   id_left (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))) @
   id_disp (pr2 X))
  (maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (! assoc (id₁ Y) (double_coalg_map Y)
          (#v F (id₁ (pr1 Y)))) @
   assoc (id₁ Y) (id₁ Y)
     (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : Y -->v Y,
      z ·v (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))))
     (id_left (id₁ Y)) @
   id_left (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))) @
   id_disp (pr2 Y))
  (s' ⋆v (s ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂ ⋆v #s F s')) =
?b

        
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
s ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂ ⋆v #s F s' = ?t2

        
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
s ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂ = ?y'

        exact (!(eq_of_double_coalg_sqr s)).
      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
transportf_square
  (maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (! assoc (id₁ X) (double_coalg_map X)
          (#v F (id₁ (pr1 X)))) @
   assoc (id₁ X) (id₁ X)
     (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : X -->v X,
      z ·v (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))))
     (id_left (id₁ X)) @
   id_left (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))) @
   id_disp (pr2 X))
  (maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (! assoc (id₁ Y) (double_coalg_map Y)
          (#v F (id₁ (pr1 Y)))) @
   assoc (id₁ Y) (id₁ Y)
     (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : Y -->v Y,
      z ·v (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))))
     (id_left (id₁ Y)) @
   id_left (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))) @
   id_disp (pr2 Y))
  (s'
   ⋆v (transportf_square
         (double_coalg_ver_comm (id₁ X))
         (double_coalg_ver_comm (id₁ Y))
         (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁ ⋆v #s F s)
       ⋆v #s F s')) = s' ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
transportf_square
  (maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (! assoc (id₁ X) (double_coalg_map X)
          (#v F (id₁ (pr1 X)))) @
   assoc (id₁ X) (id₁ X)
     (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : X -->v X,
      z ·v (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))))
     (id_left (id₁ X)) @
   id_left (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))) @
   id_disp (pr2 X))
  (maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (! assoc (id₁ Y) (double_coalg_map Y)
          (#v F (id₁ (pr1 Y)))) @
   assoc (id₁ Y) (id₁ Y)
     (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : Y -->v Y,
      z ·v (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))))
     (id_left (id₁ Y)) @
   id_left (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))) @
   id_disp (pr2 Y))
  (s'
   ⋆v transportf_square
        (maponpaths
           (λ z : X -->v F X, z ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X)))
           (double_coalg_ver_comm (id₁ X)))
        (maponpaths
           (λ z : Y -->v F Y, z ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y)))
           (double_coalg_ver_comm (id₁ Y)))
        (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁ ⋆v #s F s
         ⋆v #s F s')) =
s' ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
transportf_square
  (maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (! assoc (id₁ X) (double_coalg_map X)
          (#v F (id₁ (pr1 X)))) @
   assoc (id₁ X) (id₁ X)
     (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : X -->v X,
      z ·v (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))))
     (id_left (id₁ X)) @
   id_left (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))) @
   id_disp (pr2 X))
  (maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (! assoc (id₁ Y) (double_coalg_map Y)
          (#v F (id₁ (pr1 Y)))) @
   assoc (id₁ Y) (id₁ Y)
     (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : Y -->v Y,
      z ·v (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))))
     (id_left (id₁ Y)) @
   id_left (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))) @
   id_disp (pr2 Y))
  (transportf_square
     (maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
        (maponpaths
           (λ z : X -->v F X, z ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X)))
           (double_coalg_ver_comm (id₁ X))))
     (maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
        (maponpaths
           (λ z : Y -->v F Y, z ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y)))
           (double_coalg_ver_comm (id₁ Y))))
     (s'
      ⋆v (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁ ⋆v #s F s
          ⋆v #s F s'))) =
s' ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
transportf_square
  (maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : X -->v F X, z ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X)))
        (double_coalg_ver_comm (id₁ X))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (! assoc (id₁ X) (double_coalg_map X)
          (#v F (id₁ (pr1 X)))) @
   assoc (id₁ X) (id₁ X)
     (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : X -->v X,
      z ·v (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))))
     (id_left (id₁ X)) @
   id_left (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))) @
   id_disp (pr2 X))
  (maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : Y -->v F Y, z ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y)))
        (double_coalg_ver_comm (id₁ Y))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (! assoc (id₁ Y) (double_coalg_map Y)
          (#v F (id₁ (pr1 Y)))) @
   assoc (id₁ Y) (id₁ Y)
     (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : Y -->v Y,
      z ·v (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))))
     (id_left (id₁ Y)) @
   id_left (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))) @
   id_disp (pr2 Y))
  (s'
   ⋆v (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁ ⋆v #s F s ⋆v #s F s')) =
s' ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
transportf_square
  (maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : X -->v F X, z ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X)))
        (double_coalg_ver_comm (id₁ X))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (! assoc (id₁ X) (double_coalg_map X)
          (#v F (id₁ (pr1 X)))) @
   assoc (id₁ X) (id₁ X)
     (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : X -->v X,
      z ·v (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))))
     (id_left (id₁ X)) @
   id_left (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))) @
   id_disp (pr2 X))
  (maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : Y -->v F Y, z ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y)))
        (double_coalg_ver_comm (id₁ Y))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (! assoc (id₁ Y) (double_coalg_map Y)
          (#v F (id₁ (pr1 Y)))) @
   assoc (id₁ Y) (id₁ Y)
     (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : Y -->v Y,
      z ·v (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))))
     (id_left (id₁ Y)) @
   id_left (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))) @
   id_disp (pr2 Y))
  (s'
   ⋆v (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁ ⋆v #s F s ⋆v #s F s')) =
?b
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
?b = s' ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
transportf_square
  (maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : X -->v F X, z ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X)))
        (double_coalg_ver_comm (id₁ X))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (! assoc (id₁ X) (double_coalg_map X)
          (#v F (id₁ (pr1 X)))) @
   assoc (id₁ X) (id₁ X)
     (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : X -->v X,
      z ·v (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))))
     (id_left (id₁ X)) @
   id_left (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))) @
   id_disp (pr2 X))
  (maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : Y -->v F Y, z ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y)))
        (double_coalg_ver_comm (id₁ Y))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (! assoc (id₁ Y) (double_coalg_map Y)
          (#v F (id₁ (pr1 Y)))) @
   assoc (id₁ Y) (id₁ Y)
     (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : Y -->v Y,
      z ·v (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))))
     (id_left (id₁ Y)) @
   id_left (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))) @
   id_disp (pr2 Y))
  (s'
   ⋆v (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁ ⋆v #s F s ⋆v #s F s')) =
?b

        
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁ ⋆v #s F s ⋆v #s F s' = ?t2

        
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
?t2 = sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁ ⋆v #s F s ⋆v #s F s'

        apply square_assoc_v'.
      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
transportf_square
  (maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : X -->v F X, z ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X)))
        (double_coalg_ver_comm (id₁ X))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (! assoc (id₁ X) (double_coalg_map X)
          (#v F (id₁ (pr1 X)))) @
   assoc (id₁ X) (id₁ X)
     (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : X -->v X,
      z ·v (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))))
     (id_left (id₁ X)) @
   id_left (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))) @
   id_disp (pr2 X))
  (maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : Y -->v F Y, z ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y)))
        (double_coalg_ver_comm (id₁ Y))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (! assoc (id₁ Y) (double_coalg_map Y)
          (#v F (id₁ (pr1 Y)))) @
   assoc (id₁ Y) (id₁ Y)
     (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : Y -->v Y,
      z ·v (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))))
     (id_left (id₁ Y)) @
   id_left (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))) @
   id_disp (pr2 Y))
  (s'
   ⋆v transportf_square
        (assoc (double_coalg_map X) (#v F (id₁ X))
           (#v F (id₁ (pr1 X))))
        (assoc (double_coalg_map Y) (#v F (id₁ Y))
           (#v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))))
        (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁
         ⋆v (#s F s ⋆v #s F s'))) =
s' ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
transportf_square
  (maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : X -->v F X, z ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X)))
        (double_coalg_ver_comm (id₁ X))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (! assoc (id₁ X) (double_coalg_map X)
          (#v F (id₁ (pr1 X)))) @
   assoc (id₁ X) (id₁ X)
     (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : X -->v X,
      z ·v (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))))
     (id_left (id₁ X)) @
   id_left (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))) @
   id_disp (pr2 X))
  (maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : Y -->v F Y, z ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y)))
        (double_coalg_ver_comm (id₁ Y))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (! assoc (id₁ Y) (double_coalg_map Y)
          (#v F (id₁ (pr1 Y)))) @
   assoc (id₁ Y) (id₁ Y)
     (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : Y -->v Y,
      z ·v (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))))
     (id_left (id₁ Y)) @
   id_left (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))) @
   id_disp (pr2 Y))
  (transportf_square
     (maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
        (assoc (double_coalg_map X) (#v F (id₁ X))
           (#v F (id₁ (pr1 X)))))
     (maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
        (assoc (double_coalg_map Y) (#v F (id₁ Y))
           (#v F (id₁ (pr1 Y)))))
     (s'
      ⋆v (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁
          ⋆v (#s F s ⋆v #s F s')))) =
s' ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
transportf_square
  (maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (assoc (double_coalg_map X) (#v F (id₁ X))
        (#v F (id₁ (pr1 X)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : X -->v F X, z ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X)))
        (double_coalg_ver_comm (id₁ X))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (! assoc (id₁ X) (double_coalg_map X)
          (#v F (id₁ (pr1 X)))) @
   assoc (id₁ X) (id₁ X)
     (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : X -->v X,
      z ·v (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))))
     (id_left (id₁ X)) @
   id_left (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))) @
   id_disp (pr2 X))
  (maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (assoc (double_coalg_map Y) (#v F (id₁ Y))
        (#v F (id₁ (pr1 Y)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : Y -->v F Y, z ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y)))
        (double_coalg_ver_comm (id₁ Y))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (! assoc (id₁ Y) (double_coalg_map Y)
          (#v F (id₁ (pr1 Y)))) @
   assoc (id₁ Y) (id₁ Y)
     (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : Y -->v Y,
      z ·v (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))))
     (id_left (id₁ Y)) @
   id_left (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))) @
   id_disp (pr2 Y))
  (s'
   ⋆v (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁
       ⋆v (#s F s ⋆v #s F s'))) =
s' ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁

  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat

  (maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)

       ⋆v (#s F s ⋆v #s F s'))) = ?b

  (maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
