   id_disp (pr2 Y))
  (s'
   ⋆v (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁
       ⋆v (#s F s ⋆v #s F s'))) = ?b

        
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
#s F s ⋆v #s F s' = ?t2

        apply lax_double_functor_comp_v_square'.
      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
transportf_square
  (maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (assoc (double_coalg_map X) (#v F (id₁ X))
        (#v F (id₁ (pr1 X)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : X -->v F X, z ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X)))
        (double_coalg_ver_comm (id₁ X))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (! assoc (id₁ X) (double_coalg_map X)
          (#v F (id₁ (pr1 X)))) @
   assoc (id₁ X) (id₁ X)
     (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : X -->v X,
      z ·v (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))))
     (id_left (id₁ X)) @
   id_left (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))) @
   id_disp (pr2 X))
  (maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (assoc (double_coalg_map Y) (#v F (id₁ Y))
        (#v F (id₁ (pr1 Y)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : Y -->v F Y, z ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y)))
        (double_coalg_ver_comm (id₁ Y))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (! assoc (id₁ Y) (double_coalg_map Y)
          (#v F (id₁ (pr1 Y)))) @
   assoc (id₁ Y) (id₁ Y)
     (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : Y -->v Y,
      z ·v (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))))
     (id_left (id₁ Y)) @
   id_left (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))) @
   id_disp (pr2 Y))
  (s'
   ⋆v (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁
       ⋆v transportf_square
            (lax_double_functor_comp_v F (id₁ X)
               (id₁ (pr1 X)))
            (lax_double_functor_comp_v F (id₁ Y)
               (id₁ (pr1 Y))) (#s F (s ⋆v s')))) =
s' ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
transportf_square
  (maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (assoc (double_coalg_map X) (#v F (id₁ X))
        (#v F (id₁ (pr1 X)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : X -->v F X, z ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X)))
        (double_coalg_ver_comm (id₁ X))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (! assoc (id₁ X) (double_coalg_map X)
          (#v F (id₁ (pr1 X)))) @
   assoc (id₁ X) (id₁ X)
     (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : X -->v X,
      z ·v (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))))
     (id_left (id₁ X)) @
   id_left (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))) @
   id_disp (pr2 X))
  (maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (assoc (double_coalg_map Y) (#v F (id₁ Y))
        (#v F (id₁ (pr1 Y)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : Y -->v F Y, z ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y)))
        (double_coalg_ver_comm (id₁ Y))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (! assoc (id₁ Y) (double_coalg_map Y)
          (#v F (id₁ (pr1 Y)))) @
   assoc (id₁ Y) (id₁ Y)
     (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : Y -->v Y,
      z ·v (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))))
     (id_left (id₁ Y)) @
   id_left (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))) @
   id_disp (pr2 Y))
  (transportf_square
     (maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
        (maponpaths
           (λ z : F X -->v F X,
            double_coalg_map X ·v z)
           (lax_double_functor_comp_v F (id₁ X)
              (id₁ (pr1 X)))))
     (maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
        (maponpaths
           (λ z : F Y -->v F Y,
            double_coalg_map Y ·v z)
           (lax_double_functor_comp_v F (id₁ Y)
              (id₁ (pr1 Y)))))
     (s'
      ⋆v (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁ ⋆v #s F (s ⋆v s')))) =
s' ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
transportf_square
  (maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : F X -->v F X, double_coalg_map X ·v z)
        (lax_double_functor_comp_v F (id₁ X)
           (id₁ (pr1 X)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (assoc (double_coalg_map X) (#v F (id₁ X))
        (#v F (id₁ (pr1 X)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : X -->v F X, z ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X)))
        (double_coalg_ver_comm (id₁ X))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (! assoc (id₁ X) (double_coalg_map X)
          (#v F (id₁ (pr1 X)))) @
   assoc (id₁ X) (id₁ X)
     (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : X -->v X,
      z ·v (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))))
     (id_left (id₁ X)) @
   id_left (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))) @
   id_disp (pr2 X))
  (maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : F Y -->v F Y, double_coalg_map Y ·v z)
        (lax_double_functor_comp_v F (id₁ Y)
           (id₁ (pr1 Y)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (assoc (double_coalg_map Y) (#v F (id₁ Y))
        (#v F (id₁ (pr1 Y)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : Y -->v F Y, z ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y)))
        (double_coalg_ver_comm (id₁ Y))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (! assoc (id₁ Y) (double_coalg_map Y)
          (#v F (id₁ (pr1 Y)))) @
   assoc (id₁ Y) (id₁ Y)
     (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : Y -->v Y,
      z ·v (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))))
     (id_left (id₁ Y)) @
   id_left (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))) @
   id_disp (pr2 Y))
  (s'
   ⋆v (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁ ⋆v #s F (s ⋆v s'))) =
s' ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
transportf_square
  (maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : F X -->v F X, double_coalg_map X ·v z)
        (lax_double_functor_comp_v F (id₁ X)
           (id₁ (pr1 X)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (assoc (double_coalg_map X) (#v F (id₁ X))
        (#v F (id₁ (pr1 X)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : X -->v F X, z ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X)))
        (double_coalg_ver_comm (id₁ X))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (! assoc (id₁ X) (double_coalg_map X)
          (#v F (id₁ (pr1 X)))) @
   assoc (id₁ X) (id₁ X)
     (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : X -->v X,
      z ·v (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))))
     (id_left (id₁ X)) @
   id_left (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))) @
   id_disp (pr2 X))
  (maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : F Y -->v F Y, double_coalg_map Y ·v z)
        (lax_double_functor_comp_v F (id₁ Y)
           (id₁ (pr1 Y)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (assoc (double_coalg_map Y) (#v F (id₁ Y))
        (#v F (id₁ (pr1 Y)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : Y -->v F Y, z ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y)))
        (double_coalg_ver_comm (id₁ Y))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (! assoc (id₁ Y) (double_coalg_map Y)
          (#v F (id₁ (pr1 Y)))) @
   assoc (id₁ Y) (id₁ Y)
     (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : Y -->v Y,
      z ·v (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))))
     (id_left (id₁ Y)) @
   id_left (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))) @
   id_disp (pr2 Y))
  (s'
   ⋆v (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁ ⋆v #s F (s ⋆v s'))) =
?b
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
?b = s' ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
transportf_square
  (maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : F X -->v F X, double_coalg_map X ·v z)
        (lax_double_functor_comp_v F (id₁ X)
           (id₁ (pr1 X)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (assoc (double_coalg_map X) (#v F (id₁ X))
        (#v F (id₁ (pr1 X)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : X -->v F X, z ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X)))
        (double_coalg_ver_comm (id₁ X))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (! assoc (id₁ X) (double_coalg_map X)
          (#v F (id₁ (pr1 X)))) @
   assoc (id₁ X) (id₁ X)
     (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : X -->v X,
      z ·v (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))))
     (id_left (id₁ X)) @
   id_left (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))) @
   id_disp (pr2 X))
  (maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : F Y -->v F Y, double_coalg_map Y ·v z)
        (lax_double_functor_comp_v F (id₁ Y)
           (id₁ (pr1 Y)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (assoc (double_coalg_map Y) (#v F (id₁ Y))
        (#v F (id₁ (pr1 Y)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : Y -->v F Y, z ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y)))
        (double_coalg_ver_comm (id₁ Y))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (! assoc (id₁ Y) (double_coalg_map Y)
          (#v F (id₁ (pr1 Y)))) @
   assoc (id₁ Y) (id₁ Y)
     (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : Y -->v Y,
      z ·v (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))))
     (id_left (id₁ Y)) @
   id_left (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))) @
   id_disp (pr2 Y))
  (s'
   ⋆v (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁ ⋆v #s F (s ⋆v s'))) =
?b

        
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
s ⋆v s' = ?t2

        exact p.
      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
transportf_square
  (maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : F X -->v F X, double_coalg_map X ·v z)
        (lax_double_functor_comp_v F (id₁ X)
           (id₁ (pr1 X)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (assoc (double_coalg_map X) (#v F (id₁ X))
        (#v F (id₁ (pr1 X)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : X -->v F X, z ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X)))
        (double_coalg_ver_comm (id₁ X))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (! assoc (id₁ X) (double_coalg_map X)
          (#v F (id₁ (pr1 X)))) @
   assoc (id₁ X) (id₁ X)
     (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : X -->v X,
      z ·v (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))))
     (id_left (id₁ X)) @
   id_left (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))) @
   id_disp (pr2 X))
  (maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : F Y -->v F Y, double_coalg_map Y ·v z)
        (lax_double_functor_comp_v F (id₁ Y)
           (id₁ (pr1 Y)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (assoc (double_coalg_map Y) (#v F (id₁ Y))
        (#v F (id₁ (pr1 Y)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : Y -->v F Y, z ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y)))
        (double_coalg_ver_comm (id₁ Y))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (! assoc (id₁ Y) (double_coalg_map Y)
          (#v F (id₁ (pr1 Y)))) @
   assoc (id₁ Y) (id₁ Y)
     (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : Y -->v Y,
      z ·v (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))))
     (id_left (id₁ Y)) @
   id_left (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))) @
   id_disp (pr2 Y))
  (s'
   ⋆v (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁
       ⋆v #s F
          (transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
             (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)))) =
s' ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
transportf_square
  (maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : F X -->v F X, double_coalg_map X ·v z)
        (lax_double_functor_comp_v F (id₁ X)
           (id₁ (pr1 X)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (assoc (double_coalg_map X) (#v F (id₁ X))
        (#v F (id₁ (pr1 X)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : X -->v F X, z ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X)))
        (double_coalg_ver_comm (id₁ X))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (! assoc (id₁ X) (double_coalg_map X)
          (#v F (id₁ (pr1 X)))) @
   assoc (id₁ X) (id₁ X)
     (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : X -->v X,
      z ·v (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))))
     (id_left (id₁ X)) @
   id_left (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))) @
   id_disp (pr2 X))
  (maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : F Y -->v F Y, double_coalg_map Y ·v z)
        (lax_double_functor_comp_v F (id₁ Y)
           (id₁ (pr1 Y)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (assoc (double_coalg_map Y) (#v F (id₁ Y))
        (#v F (id₁ (pr1 Y)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : Y -->v F Y, z ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y)))
        (double_coalg_ver_comm (id₁ Y))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (! assoc (id₁ Y) (double_coalg_map Y)
          (#v F (id₁ (pr1 Y)))) @
   assoc (id₁ Y) (id₁ Y)
     (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : Y -->v Y,
      z ·v (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))))
     (id_left (id₁ Y)) @
   id_left (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))) @
   id_disp (pr2 Y))
  (s'
   ⋆v (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁
       ⋆v transportb_square
            (maponpaths (λ z : X -->v X, #v F z)
               (id_left (identity_v X)))
            (maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v Y, #v F z)
               (id_left (identity_v Y)))
            (#s F (id_v_square h₁)))) =
s' ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
transportf_square
  (maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : F X -->v F X, double_coalg_map X ·v z)
        (lax_double_functor_comp_v F (id₁ X)
           (id₁ (pr1 X)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (assoc (double_coalg_map X) (#v F (id₁ X))
        (#v F (id₁ (pr1 X)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : X -->v F X, z ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X)))
        (double_coalg_ver_comm (id₁ X))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (! assoc (id₁ X) (double_coalg_map X)
          (#v F (id₁ (pr1 X)))) @
   assoc (id₁ X) (id₁ X)
     (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : X -->v X,
      z ·v (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))))
     (id_left (id₁ X)) @
   id_left (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))) @
   id_disp (pr2 X))
  (maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : F Y -->v F Y, double_coalg_map Y ·v z)
        (lax_double_functor_comp_v F (id₁ Y)
           (id₁ (pr1 Y)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (assoc (double_coalg_map Y) (#v F (id₁ Y))
        (#v F (id₁ (pr1 Y)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : Y -->v F Y, z ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y)))
        (double_coalg_ver_comm (id₁ Y))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (! assoc (id₁ Y) (double_coalg_map Y)
          (#v F (id₁ (pr1 Y)))) @
   assoc (id₁ Y) (id₁ Y)
     (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : Y -->v Y,
      z ·v (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))))
     (id_left (id₁ Y)) @
   id_left (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))) @
   id_disp (pr2 Y))
  (s'
   ⋆v (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁
       ⋆v transportf_square
            (! maponpaths (λ z : X -->v X, #v F z)
                 (id_left (identity_v X)))
            (! maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v Y, #v F z)
                 (id_left (identity_v Y)))
            (#s F (id_v_square h₁)))) =
s' ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
transportf_square
  (maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : F X -->v F X, double_coalg_map X ·v z)
        (lax_double_functor_comp_v F (id₁ X)
           (id₁ (pr1 X)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (assoc (double_coalg_map X) (#v F (id₁ X))
        (#v F (id₁ (pr1 X)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : X -->v F X, z ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X)))
        (double_coalg_ver_comm (id₁ X))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (! assoc (id₁ X) (double_coalg_map X)
          (#v F (id₁ (pr1 X)))) @
   assoc (id₁ X) (id₁ X)
     (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : X -->v X,
      z ·v (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))))
     (id_left (id₁ X)) @
   id_left (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))) @
   id_disp (pr2 X))
  (maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : F Y -->v F Y, double_coalg_map Y ·v z)
        (lax_double_functor_comp_v F (id₁ Y)
           (id₁ (pr1 Y)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (assoc (double_coalg_map Y) (#v F (id₁ Y))
        (#v F (id₁ (pr1 Y)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : Y -->v F Y, z ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y)))
        (double_coalg_ver_comm (id₁ Y))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (! assoc (id₁ Y) (double_coalg_map Y)
          (#v F (id₁ (pr1 Y)))) @
   assoc (id₁ Y) (id₁ Y)
     (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : Y -->v Y,
      z ·v (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))))
     (id_left (id₁ Y)) @
   id_left (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))) @
   id_disp (pr2 Y))
  (transportf_square
     (maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
        (maponpaths
           (λ z : F X -->v F X,
            double_coalg_map X ·v z)
           (! maponpaths (λ z : X -->v X, #v F z)
                (id_left (identity_v X)))))
     (maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
        (maponpaths
           (λ z : F Y -->v F Y,
            double_coalg_map Y ·v z)
           (! maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v Y, #v F z)
                (id_left (identity_v Y)))))
     (s'
      ⋆v (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁
          ⋆v #s F (id_v_square h₁)))) =
s' ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
transportf_square
  (maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : F X -->v F X, double_coalg_map X ·v z)
        (! maponpaths (λ z : X -->v X, #v F z)
             (id_left (identity_v X)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : F X -->v F X, double_coalg_map X ·v z)
        (lax_double_functor_comp_v F (id₁ X)
           (id₁ (pr1 X)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (assoc (double_coalg_map X) (#v F (id₁ X))
        (#v F (id₁ (pr1 X)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : X -->v F X, z ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X)))
        (double_coalg_ver_comm (id₁ X))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (! assoc (id₁ X) (double_coalg_map X)
          (#v F (id₁ (pr1 X)))) @
   assoc (id₁ X) (id₁ X)
     (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : X -->v X,
      z ·v (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))))
     (id_left (id₁ X)) @
   id_left (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))) @
   id_disp (pr2 X))
  (maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : F Y -->v F Y, double_coalg_map Y ·v z)
        (! maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v Y, #v F z)
             (id_left (identity_v Y)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : F Y -->v F Y, double_coalg_map Y ·v z)
        (lax_double_functor_comp_v F (id₁ Y)
           (id₁ (pr1 Y)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (assoc (double_coalg_map Y) (#v F (id₁ Y))
        (#v F (id₁ (pr1 Y)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : Y -->v F Y, z ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y)))
        (double_coalg_ver_comm (id₁ Y))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (! assoc (id₁ Y) (double_coalg_map Y)
          (#v F (id₁ (pr1 Y)))) @
   assoc (id₁ Y) (id₁ Y)
     (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : Y -->v Y,
      z ·v (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))))
     (id_left (id₁ Y)) @
   id_left (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))) @
   id_disp (pr2 Y))
  (s'
   ⋆v (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁
       ⋆v #s F (id_v_square h₁))) =
s' ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
transportf_square
  (maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : F X -->v F X, double_coalg_map X ·v z)
        (! maponpaths (λ z : X -->v X, #v F z)
             (id_left (identity_v X)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : F X -->v F X, double_coalg_map X ·v z)
        (lax_double_functor_comp_v F (id₁ X)
           (id₁ (pr1 X)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (assoc (double_coalg_map X) (#v F (id₁ X))
        (#v F (id₁ (pr1 X)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : X -->v F X, z ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X)))
        (double_coalg_ver_comm (id₁ X))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (! assoc (id₁ X) (double_coalg_map X)
          (#v F (id₁ (pr1 X)))) @
   assoc (id₁ X) (id₁ X)
     (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : X -->v X,
      z ·v (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))))
     (id_left (id₁ X)) @
   id_left (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))) @
   id_disp (pr2 X))
  (maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : F Y -->v F Y, double_coalg_map Y ·v z)
        (! maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v Y, #v F z)
             (id_left (identity_v Y)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : F Y -->v F Y, double_coalg_map Y ·v z)
        (lax_double_functor_comp_v F (id₁ Y)
           (id₁ (pr1 Y)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (assoc (double_coalg_map Y) (#v F (id₁ Y))
        (#v F (id₁ (pr1 Y)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : Y -->v F Y, z ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y)))
        (double_coalg_ver_comm (id₁ Y))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (! assoc (id₁ Y) (double_coalg_map Y)
          (#v F (id₁ (pr1 Y)))) @
   assoc (id₁ Y) (id₁ Y)
     (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : Y -->v Y,
      z ·v (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))))
     (id_left (id₁ Y)) @
   id_left (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))) @
   id_disp (pr2 Y))
  (s'
   ⋆v (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁
       ⋆v #s F (id_v_square h₁))) = ?b
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
?b = s' ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
transportf_square
  (maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : F X -->v F X, double_coalg_map X ·v z)
        (! maponpaths (λ z : X -->v X, #v F z)
             (id_left (identity_v X)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : F X -->v F X, double_coalg_map X ·v z)
        (lax_double_functor_comp_v F (id₁ X)
           (id₁ (pr1 X)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (assoc (double_coalg_map X) (#v F (id₁ X))
        (#v F (id₁ (pr1 X)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : X -->v F X, z ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X)))
        (double_coalg_ver_comm (id₁ X))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (! assoc (id₁ X) (double_coalg_map X)
          (#v F (id₁ (pr1 X)))) @
   assoc (id₁ X) (id₁ X)
     (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : X -->v X,
      z ·v (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))))
     (id_left (id₁ X)) @
   id_left (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))) @
   id_disp (pr2 X))
  (maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : F Y -->v F Y, double_coalg_map Y ·v z)
        (! maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v Y, #v F z)
             (id_left (identity_v Y)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : F Y -->v F Y, double_coalg_map Y ·v z)
        (lax_double_functor_comp_v F (id₁ Y)
           (id₁ (pr1 Y)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (assoc (double_coalg_map Y) (#v F (id₁ Y))
        (#v F (id₁ (pr1 Y)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : Y -->v F Y, z ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y)))
        (double_coalg_ver_comm (id₁ Y))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (! assoc (id₁ Y) (double_coalg_map Y)
          (#v F (id₁ (pr1 Y)))) @
   assoc (id₁ Y) (id₁ Y)
     (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : Y -->v Y,
      z ·v (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))))
     (id_left (id₁ Y)) @
   id_left (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))) @
   id_disp (pr2 Y))
  (s'
   ⋆v (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁
       ⋆v #s F (id_v_square h₁))) = ?b

        
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
#s F (id_v_square h₁) = ?t2

        apply lax_double_functor_id_square.
      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
transportf_square
  (maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : F X -->v F X, double_coalg_map X ·v z)
        (! maponpaths (λ z : X -->v X, #v F z)
             (id_left (identity_v X)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : F X -->v F X, double_coalg_map X ·v z)
        (lax_double_functor_comp_v F (id₁ X)
           (id₁ (pr1 X)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (assoc (double_coalg_map X) (#v F (id₁ X))
        (#v F (id₁ (pr1 X)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : X -->v F X, z ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X)))
        (double_coalg_ver_comm (id₁ X))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (! assoc (id₁ X) (double_coalg_map X)
          (#v F (id₁ (pr1 X)))) @
   assoc (id₁ X) (id₁ X)
     (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : X -->v X,
      z ·v (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))))
     (id_left (id₁ X)) @
   id_left (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))) @
   id_disp (pr2 X))
  (maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : F Y -->v F Y, double_coalg_map Y ·v z)
        (! maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v Y, #v F z)
             (id_left (identity_v Y)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : F Y -->v F Y, double_coalg_map Y ·v z)
        (lax_double_functor_comp_v F (id₁ Y)
           (id₁ (pr1 Y)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (assoc (double_coalg_map Y) (#v F (id₁ Y))
        (#v F (id₁ (pr1 Y)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : Y -->v F Y, z ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y)))
        (double_coalg_ver_comm (id₁ Y))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (! assoc (id₁ Y) (double_coalg_map Y)
          (#v F (id₁ (pr1 Y)))) @
   assoc (id₁ Y) (id₁ Y)
     (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : Y -->v Y,
      z ·v (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))))
     (id_left (id₁ Y)) @
   id_left (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))) @
   id_disp (pr2 Y))
  (s'
   ⋆v (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁
       ⋆v transportb_square
            (lax_double_functor_id_v F X)
            (lax_double_functor_id_v F Y)
            (id_v_square (#h F h₁)))) =
s' ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
transportf_square
  (maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : F X -->v F X, double_coalg_map X ·v z)
        (! maponpaths (λ z : X -->v X, #v F z)
             (id_left (identity_v X)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : F X -->v F X, double_coalg_map X ·v z)
        (lax_double_functor_comp_v F (id₁ X)
           (id₁ (pr1 X)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (assoc (double_coalg_map X) (#v F (id₁ X))
        (#v F (id₁ (pr1 X)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : X -->v F X, z ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X)))
        (double_coalg_ver_comm (id₁ X))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (! assoc (id₁ X) (double_coalg_map X)
          (#v F (id₁ (pr1 X)))) @
   assoc (id₁ X) (id₁ X)
     (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : X -->v X,
      z ·v (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))))
     (id_left (id₁ X)) @
   id_left (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))) @
   id_disp (pr2 X))
  (maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : F Y -->v F Y, double_coalg_map Y ·v z)
        (! maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v Y, #v F z)
             (id_left (identity_v Y)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : F Y -->v F Y, double_coalg_map Y ·v z)
        (lax_double_functor_comp_v F (id₁ Y)
           (id₁ (pr1 Y)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (assoc (double_coalg_map Y) (#v F (id₁ Y))
        (#v F (id₁ (pr1 Y)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : Y -->v F Y, z ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y)))
        (double_coalg_ver_comm (id₁ Y))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (! assoc (id₁ Y) (double_coalg_map Y)
          (#v F (id₁ (pr1 Y)))) @
   assoc (id₁ Y) (id₁ Y)
     (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : Y -->v Y,
      z ·v (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))))
     (id_left (id₁ Y)) @
   id_left (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))) @
   id_disp (pr2 Y))
  (s'
   ⋆v (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁
       ⋆v transportf_square
            (! lax_double_functor_id_v F X)
            (! lax_double_functor_id_v F Y)
            (id_v_square (#h F h₁)))) =
s' ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
transportf_square
  (maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : F X -->v F X, double_coalg_map X ·v z)
        (! maponpaths (λ z : X -->v X, #v F z)
             (id_left (identity_v X)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : F X -->v F X, double_coalg_map X ·v z)
        (lax_double_functor_comp_v F (id₁ X)
           (id₁ (pr1 X)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (assoc (double_coalg_map X) (#v F (id₁ X))
        (#v F (id₁ (pr1 X)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : X -->v F X, z ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X)))
        (double_coalg_ver_comm (id₁ X))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (! assoc (id₁ X) (double_coalg_map X)
          (#v F (id₁ (pr1 X)))) @
   assoc (id₁ X) (id₁ X)
     (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : X -->v X,
      z ·v (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))))
     (id_left (id₁ X)) @
   id_left (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))) @
   id_disp (pr2 X))
  (maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : F Y -->v F Y, double_coalg_map Y ·v z)
        (! maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v Y, #v F z)
             (id_left (identity_v Y)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : F Y -->v F Y, double_coalg_map Y ·v z)
        (lax_double_functor_comp_v F (id₁ Y)
           (id₁ (pr1 Y)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (assoc (double_coalg_map Y) (#v F (id₁ Y))
        (#v F (id₁ (pr1 Y)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : Y -->v F Y, z ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y)))
        (double_coalg_ver_comm (id₁ Y))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (! assoc (id₁ Y) (double_coalg_map Y)
          (#v F (id₁ (pr1 Y)))) @
   assoc (id₁ Y) (id₁ Y)
     (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : Y -->v Y,
      z ·v (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))))
     (id_left (id₁ Y)) @
   id_left (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))) @
   id_disp (pr2 Y))
  (transportf_square
     (maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
        (maponpaths
           (λ z : F X -->v F X,
            double_coalg_map X ·v z)
           (! lax_double_functor_id_v F X)))
     (maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
        (maponpaths
           (λ z : F Y -->v F Y,
            double_coalg_map Y ·v z)
           (! lax_double_functor_id_v F Y)))
     (s'
      ⋆v (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁
          ⋆v id_v_square (#h F h₁)))) =
s' ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
transportf_square
  (maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : F X -->v F X, double_coalg_map X ·v z)
        (! lax_double_functor_id_v F X)) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : F X -->v F X, double_coalg_map X ·v z)
        (! maponpaths (λ z : X -->v X, #v F z)
             (id_left (identity_v X)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : F X -->v F X, double_coalg_map X ·v z)
        (lax_double_functor_comp_v F (id₁ X)
           (id₁ (pr1 X)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (assoc (double_coalg_map X) (#v F (id₁ X))
        (#v F (id₁ (pr1 X)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : X -->v F X, z ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X)))
        (double_coalg_ver_comm (id₁ X))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (! assoc (id₁ X) (double_coalg_map X)
          (#v F (id₁ (pr1 X)))) @
   assoc (id₁ X) (id₁ X)
     (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : X -->v X,
      z ·v (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))))
     (id_left (id₁ X)) @
   id_left (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))) @
   id_disp (pr2 X))
  (maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : F Y -->v F Y, double_coalg_map Y ·v z)
        (! lax_double_functor_id_v F Y)) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : F Y -->v F Y, double_coalg_map Y ·v z)
        (! maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v Y, #v F z)
             (id_left (identity_v Y)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : F Y -->v F Y, double_coalg_map Y ·v z)
        (lax_double_functor_comp_v F (id₁ Y)
           (id₁ (pr1 Y)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (assoc (double_coalg_map Y) (#v F (id₁ Y))
        (#v F (id₁ (pr1 Y)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : Y -->v F Y, z ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y)))
        (double_coalg_ver_comm (id₁ Y))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (! assoc (id₁ Y) (double_coalg_map Y)
          (#v F (id₁ (pr1 Y)))) @
   assoc (id₁ Y) (id₁ Y)
     (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : Y -->v Y,
      z ·v (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))))
     (id_left (id₁ Y)) @
   id_left (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))) @
   id_disp (pr2 Y))
  (s'
   ⋆v (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁
       ⋆v id_v_square (#h F h₁))) =
s' ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
transportf_square
  (maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : F X -->v F X, double_coalg_map X ·v z)
        (! lax_double_functor_id_v F X)) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : F X -->v F X, double_coalg_map X ·v z)
        (! maponpaths (λ z : X -->v X, #v F z)
             (id_left (identity_v X)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : F X -->v F X, double_coalg_map X ·v z)
        (lax_double_functor_comp_v F (id₁ X)
           (id₁ (pr1 X)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (assoc (double_coalg_map X) (#v F (id₁ X))
        (#v F (id₁ (pr1 X)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : X -->v F X, z ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X)))
        (double_coalg_ver_comm (id₁ X))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (! assoc (id₁ X) (double_coalg_map X)
          (#v F (id₁ (pr1 X)))) @
   assoc (id₁ X) (id₁ X)
     (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : X -->v X,
      z ·v (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))))
     (id_left (id₁ X)) @
   id_left (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))) @
   id_disp (pr2 X))
  (maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : F Y -->v F Y, double_coalg_map Y ·v z)
        (! lax_double_functor_id_v F Y)) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : F Y -->v F Y, double_coalg_map Y ·v z)
        (! maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v Y, #v F z)
             (id_left (identity_v Y)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : F Y -->v F Y, double_coalg_map Y ·v z)
        (lax_double_functor_comp_v F (id₁ Y)
           (id₁ (pr1 Y)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (assoc (double_coalg_map Y) (#v F (id₁ Y))
        (#v F (id₁ (pr1 Y)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : Y -->v F Y, z ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y)))
        (double_coalg_ver_comm (id₁ Y))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (! assoc (id₁ Y) (double_coalg_map Y)
          (#v F (id₁ (pr1 Y)))) @
   assoc (id₁ Y) (id₁ Y)
     (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : Y -->v Y,
      z ·v (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))))
     (id_left (id₁ Y)) @
   id_left (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))) @
   id_disp (pr2 Y))
  (s'
   ⋆v transportb_square
        (id_right (double_coalg_map X))
        (id_right (double_coalg_map Y))
        (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁)) =
s' ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
transportf_square
  (maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : F X -->v F X, double_coalg_map X ·v z)
        (! lax_double_functor_id_v F X)) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : F X -->v F X, double_coalg_map X ·v z)
        (! maponpaths (λ z : X -->v X, #v F z)
             (id_left (identity_v X)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : F X -->v F X, double_coalg_map X ·v z)
        (lax_double_functor_comp_v F (id₁ X)
           (id₁ (pr1 X)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (assoc (double_coalg_map X) (#v F (id₁ X))
        (#v F (id₁ (pr1 X)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : X -->v F X, z ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X)))
        (double_coalg_ver_comm (id₁ X))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (! assoc (id₁ X) (double_coalg_map X)
          (#v F (id₁ (pr1 X)))) @
   assoc (id₁ X) (id₁ X)
     (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : X -->v X,
      z ·v (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))))
     (id_left (id₁ X)) @
   id_left (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))) @
   id_disp (pr2 X))
  (maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : F Y -->v F Y, double_coalg_map Y ·v z)
        (! lax_double_functor_id_v F Y)) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : F Y -->v F Y, double_coalg_map Y ·v z)
        (! maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v Y, #v F z)
             (id_left (identity_v Y)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : F Y -->v F Y, double_coalg_map Y ·v z)
        (lax_double_functor_comp_v F (id₁ Y)
           (id₁ (pr1 Y)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (assoc (double_coalg_map Y) (#v F (id₁ Y))
        (#v F (id₁ (pr1 Y)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : Y -->v F Y, z ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y)))
        (double_coalg_ver_comm (id₁ Y))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (! assoc (id₁ Y) (double_coalg_map Y)
          (#v F (id₁ (pr1 Y)))) @
   assoc (id₁ Y) (id₁ Y)
     (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : Y -->v Y,
      z ·v (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))))
     (id_left (id₁ Y)) @
   id_left (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))) @
   id_disp (pr2 Y))
  (s'
   ⋆v transportf_square
        (! id_right (double_coalg_map X))
        (! id_right (double_coalg_map Y))
        (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁)) =
s' ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
transportf_square
  (maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : F X -->v F X, double_coalg_map X ·v z)
        (! lax_double_functor_id_v F X)) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : F X -->v F X, double_coalg_map X ·v z)
        (! maponpaths (λ z : X -->v X, #v F z)
             (id_left (identity_v X)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : F X -->v F X, double_coalg_map X ·v z)
        (lax_double_functor_comp_v F (id₁ X)
           (id₁ (pr1 X)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (assoc (double_coalg_map X) (#v F (id₁ X))
        (#v F (id₁ (pr1 X)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : X -->v F X, z ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X)))
        (double_coalg_ver_comm (id₁ X))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (! assoc (id₁ X) (double_coalg_map X)
          (#v F (id₁ (pr1 X)))) @
   assoc (id₁ X) (id₁ X)
     (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : X -->v X,
      z ·v (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))))
     (id_left (id₁ X)) @
   id_left (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))) @
   id_disp (pr2 X))
  (maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : F Y -->v F Y, double_coalg_map Y ·v z)
        (! lax_double_functor_id_v F Y)) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : F Y -->v F Y, double_coalg_map Y ·v z)
        (! maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v Y, #v F z)
             (id_left (identity_v Y)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : F Y -->v F Y, double_coalg_map Y ·v z)
        (lax_double_functor_comp_v F (id₁ Y)
           (id₁ (pr1 Y)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (assoc (double_coalg_map Y) (#v F (id₁ Y))
        (#v F (id₁ (pr1 Y)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : Y -->v F Y, z ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y)))
        (double_coalg_ver_comm (id₁ Y))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (! assoc (id₁ Y) (double_coalg_map Y)
          (#v F (id₁ (pr1 Y)))) @
   assoc (id₁ Y) (id₁ Y)
     (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : Y -->v Y,
      z ·v (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))))
     (id_left (id₁ Y)) @
   id_left (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))) @
   id_disp (pr2 Y))
  (transportf_square
     (maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
        (! id_right (double_coalg_map X)))
     (maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
        (! id_right (double_coalg_map Y)))
     (s' ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁)) =
s' ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
transportf_square
  (maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (! id_right (double_coalg_map X)) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : F X -->v F X, double_coalg_map X ·v z)
        (! lax_double_functor_id_v F X)) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : F X -->v F X, double_coalg_map X ·v z)
        (! maponpaths (λ z : X -->v X, #v F z)
             (id_left (identity_v X)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : F X -->v F X, double_coalg_map X ·v z)
        (lax_double_functor_comp_v F (id₁ X)
           (id₁ (pr1 X)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (assoc (double_coalg_map X) (#v F (id₁ X))
        (#v F (id₁ (pr1 X)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : X -->v F X, z ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X)))
        (double_coalg_ver_comm (id₁ X))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : X -->v F X, id₁ X ·v z)
     (! assoc (id₁ X) (double_coalg_map X)
          (#v F (id₁ (pr1 X)))) @
   assoc (id₁ X) (id₁ X)
     (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : X -->v X,
      z ·v (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))))
     (id_left (id₁ X)) @
   id_left (double_coalg_map X ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 X))) @
   id_disp (pr2 X))
  (maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (! id_right (double_coalg_map Y)) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : F Y -->v F Y, double_coalg_map Y ·v z)
        (! lax_double_functor_id_v F Y)) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : F Y -->v F Y, double_coalg_map Y ·v z)
        (! maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v Y, #v F z)
             (id_left (identity_v Y)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : F Y -->v F Y, double_coalg_map Y ·v z)
        (lax_double_functor_comp_v F (id₁ Y)
           (id₁ (pr1 Y)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (assoc (double_coalg_map Y) (#v F (id₁ Y))
        (#v F (id₁ (pr1 Y)))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : Y -->v F Y, z ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y)))
        (double_coalg_ver_comm (id₁ Y))) @
   maponpaths (λ z : Y -->v F Y, id₁ Y ·v z)
     (! assoc (id₁ Y) (double_coalg_map Y)
          (#v F (id₁ (pr1 Y)))) @
   assoc (id₁ Y) (id₁ Y)
     (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : Y -->v Y,
      z ·v (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))))
     (id_left (id₁ Y)) @
   id_left (double_coalg_map Y ·v #v F (id₁ (pr1 Y))) @
   id_disp (pr2 Y)) (s' ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁) =
s' ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁

      apply transportf_square_id.
    Qed.

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
is_double_coalg_sqr (pr2 h₂) (pr2 h₁) (id₁ X) (id₁ Y)
  ?s

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
 exact s'.
      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
is_double_coalg_sqr (pr2 h₂) (pr2 h₁) (id₁ X) (id₁ Y)
  s'
 exact is_double_coalg_sqr_inv_sqr.
    Defined.

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
s ;;2 double_coalg_inv_sqr = trb₂ id_two_disp h₁

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)

  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)

C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =

  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =

  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
s ;;2 double_coalg_inv_sqr = trb₂ id_two_disp h₁

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
pr1 s ;;2 s' =
trb₂ (id_two_disp (pr1 h₁),, id_disp (pr2 h₁))

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
trb₂ (id_two_disp (pr1 h₁),, id_disp (pr2 h₁)) =
pr1 s ;;2 s'

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
trb₂ (id_two_disp (pr1 h₁),, id_disp (pr2 h₁)) = ?b
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
?b = pr1 s ;;2 s'

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
trb₂ (id_two_disp (pr1 h₁),, id_disp (pr2 h₁)) = ?b

        exact (transportf_double_coalg_sqr (!id_left _) (!id_left _) (id_two_disp _)).
      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
transportf_square
  (maponpaths double_coalg_ver_to_mor
     (! id_left (id₁ X)))
  (maponpaths double_coalg_ver_to_mor
     (! id_left (id₁ Y))) (id_two_disp h₁) =
pr1 s ;;2 s'

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
transportf_square
  (maponpaths double_coalg_ver_to_mor
     (! id_left (id₁ X)))
  (maponpaths double_coalg_ver_to_mor
     (! id_left (id₁ Y))) (id_two_disp h₁) =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =

  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
id_two_disp h₁ = id_v_square h₁

      apply idpath.
    Qed.

     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)

s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁

id_two_disp h₂ = id_v_square h₂

C: univalent_double_cat

  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category

s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =

  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =

  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
is_iso_twosided_disp (identity_is_z_iso X)
  (identity_is_z_iso Y) s

C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y

s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =

  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
h₂ -->[ inv_from_z_iso (id₁ X,, identity_is_z_iso X)
][ inv_from_z_iso (id₁ Y,, identity_is_z_iso Y)] h₁
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C

  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category

s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =

  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
s ;;2 ?pr1 = trb₂ id_two_disp h₁
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
(λ _ : s ;;2 ?pr1 = trb₂ id_two_disp h₁,
 ?pr1 ;;2 s = trb₂ id_two_disp h₂) ?pr10

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
h₂ -->[ inv_from_z_iso (id₁ X,, identity_is_z_iso X)
][ inv_from_z_iso (id₁ Y,, identity_is_z_iso Y)] h₁
 exact double_coalg_inv_sqr.
      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
s ;;2 double_coalg_inv_sqr = trb₂ id_two_disp h₁
 exact double_coalg_inv_sqr_left.
      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h₁, h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₁ h₂
s': square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h₂ h₁
p: s ⋆v s' =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₁)
q: s' ⋆v s =
transportb_square (id_left (identity_v X))
  (id_left (identity_v Y)) (id_v_square h₂)
(λ _ : s ;;2 double_coalg_inv_sqr =
       trb₂ id_two_disp h₁,
 double_coalg_inv_sqr ;;2 s = trb₂ id_two_disp h₂)
  double_coalg_inv_sqr_left
 exact double_coalg_inv_sqr_right.
    Defined.
  End IsoSquare.

  Import TransportSquare.

  (** * 8. The left unitor *)
  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h: double_coalg_hor X Y
is_double_coalg_sqr
  (double_coalg_comp_hor_struct
     (double_coalg_id_hor X) h)
  (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h) (id₁ X) (id₁ Y)
  (lunitor_h h)

  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h: double_coalg_hor X Y
is_double_coalg_sqr
  (double_coalg_comp_hor_struct
     (double_coalg_id_hor X) h)
  (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h) (id₁ X) (id₁ Y)
  (lunitor_h h)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h: double_coalg_hor X Y
trfs (trfs (trfs id_h_square (double_coalg_map X)
                 ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F (pr1 X))
           ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h
           ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F
                (identity_h X) h)
     ⋆v #s F (lunitor_h h) =
lunitor_h h ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h: double_coalg_hor X Y
trfs (trfs (trfs id_h_square (double_coalg_map X)
                 ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F (pr1 X))
           ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h
           ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F
                (identity_h X) h ⋆v #s F (lunitor_h h)) =
lunitor_h h ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h

     ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h
     ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F (identity_h X) h

            ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F (pr1 X))
           ⋆h (trfs sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h))
     ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F (identity_h X) h
     ⋆v #s F (lunitor_h h) =

F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h: double_coalg_hor X Y
trfs (id_h_square (double_coalg_map X)
      ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F (pr1 X))
     ⋆h (trfs sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h)
     ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F (identity_h X) h
     ⋆v #s F (lunitor_h h) =

C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h: double_coalg_hor X Y
trfs (id_h_square (double_coalg_map X)
      ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F (pr1 X))
     ⋆h (trfs sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h)
     ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F (identity_h X) h
     ⋆v #s F (lunitor_h h) =
trfs id_h_square (double_coalg_map X)
     ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h
     ⋆v lunitor_h (#h F h)

      ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F (pr1 X))
     ⋆h (trfs sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h)

     ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h
     ⋆v lunitor_h (#h F h) = ?b

F: lax_double_functor C C

  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h: double_coalg_hor X Y
?b =

      ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F (pr1 X))
     ⋆h (trfs sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h)
     ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F (identity_h X) h

h: double_coalg_hor X Y

C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h: double_coalg_hor X Y
lunitor_h (#h F h) = ?t2

      exact (lax_double_functor_lunitor_h F h).
    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h: double_coalg_hor X Y
trfs id_h_square (double_coalg_map X)
     ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h
     ⋆v (trfs lax_double_functor_id_h F X
              ⋆h id_v_square (#h F h)
              ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F
                   (identity_h X) h
              ⋆v #s F (lunitor_h h)) =
trfs (id_h_square (double_coalg_map X)
      ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F (pr1 X))
     ⋆h (trfs sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h)
     ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F (identity_h X) h
     ⋆v #s F (lunitor_h h)

h: double_coalg_hor X Y
trfs (trfs id_h_square (double_coalg_map X)
           ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h
           ⋆v (lax_double_functor_id_h F X
               ⋆h id_v_square (#h F h)
               ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F
                    (identity_h X) h
               ⋆v #s F (lunitor_h h))) =
trfs (id_h_square (double_coalg_map X)
      ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F (pr1 X))
     ⋆h (trfs sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h)
     ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F (identity_h X) h
     ⋆v #s F (lunitor_h h)

     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category

h: double_coalg_hor X Y

⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h
⋆v (lax_double_functor_id_h F X
    ⋆h id_v_square (#h F h)
    ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F (identity_h X) h
    ⋆v #s F (lunitor_h h)) = ?t2

      apply square_assoc_v.
