E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h: double_coalg_hor X Y
trfs id_h_square (double_coalg_map X)
     ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h
     ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F X
        ⋆h id_v_square (#h F h)
     ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F (identity_h X) h
     ⋆v #s F (lunitor_h h) = ?b
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h: double_coalg_hor X Y
?b =
trfs (id_h_square (double_coalg_map X)
      ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F (pr1 X))
     ⋆h (trfs sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h)
     ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F (identity_h X) h
     ⋆v #s F (lunitor_h h)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h: double_coalg_hor X Y
trfs id_h_square (double_coalg_map X)
     ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h
     ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F X
        ⋆h id_v_square (#h F h)
     ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F (identity_h X) h
     ⋆v #s F (lunitor_h h) = ?b

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h: double_coalg_hor X Y
id_h_square (double_coalg_map X)
⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h
⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F X ⋆h id_v_square (#h F h)
⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F (identity_h X) h
⋆v #s F (lunitor_h h) = ?t2

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h: double_coalg_hor X Y
id_h_square (double_coalg_map X)
⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h
⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F X ⋆h id_v_square (#h F h) =
?y'

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h: double_coalg_hor X Y
?y' =
id_h_square (double_coalg_map X)
⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h
⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F X ⋆h id_v_square (#h F h)

      apply comp_h_square_comp.
    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h: double_coalg_hor X Y
trfs (id_h_square (double_coalg_map X)
      ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F X)
     ⋆h (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h
         ⋆v id_v_square (#h F h))
     ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F (identity_h X) h
     ⋆v #s F (lunitor_h h) =
trfs (id_h_square (double_coalg_map X)
      ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F (pr1 X))
     ⋆h (trfs sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h)
     ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F (identity_h X) h
     ⋆v #s F (lunitor_h h)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h: double_coalg_hor X Y
trfs (id_h_square (double_coalg_map X)
      ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F X)
     ⋆h (trbs sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h)
     ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F (identity_h X) h
     ⋆v #s F (lunitor_h h) =
trfs (id_h_square (double_coalg_map X)
      ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F (pr1 X))
     ⋆h (trfs sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h)
     ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F (identity_h X) h
     ⋆v #s F (lunitor_h h)

     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)

X, Y: double_coalg F
h: double_coalg_hor X Y
trfs (id_h_square (double_coalg_map X)
      ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F X)
     ⋆h (trfs sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h)
     ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F (identity_h X) h
     ⋆v #s F (lunitor_h h) =
trfs (id_h_square (double_coalg_map X)
      ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F (pr1 X))
     ⋆h (trfs sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h)
     ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F (identity_h X) h
     ⋆v #s F (lunitor_h h)

F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h: double_coalg_hor X Y
trfs (trfs (trfs id_h_square (double_coalg_map X)
                 ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F X)
           ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h)
     ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F (identity_h X) h
     ⋆v #s F (lunitor_h h) =
trfs (id_h_square (double_coalg_map X)
      ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F (pr1 X))
     ⋆h (trfs sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h)
     ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F (identity_h X) h
     ⋆v #s F (lunitor_h h)

F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h: double_coalg_hor X Y
trfs (trfs (trfs id_h_square (double_coalg_map X)
                 ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F X)
           ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h
           ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F
                (identity_h X) h ⋆v #s F (lunitor_h h)) =
trfs (id_h_square (double_coalg_map X)
      ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F (pr1 X))
     ⋆h (trfs sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h)
     ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F (identity_h X) h
     ⋆v #s F (lunitor_h h)

  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h: double_coalg_hor X Y
trfs (trfs id_h_square (double_coalg_map X)
           ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F X)
     ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h
     ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F (identity_h X) h
     ⋆v #s F (lunitor_h h) =

      ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F (pr1 X))
     ⋆h (trfs sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h)
     ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F (identity_h X) h
     ⋆v #s F (lunitor_h h)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h: double_coalg_hor X Y
(trfs id_h_square (double_coalg_map X)
      ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F X)
⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h
⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F (identity_h X) h
⋆v #s F (lunitor_h h) =
(id_h_square (double_coalg_map X)
 ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F (pr1 X))
⋆h (trfs sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h)
⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F (identity_h X) h
⋆v #s F (lunitor_h h)

F: lax_double_functor C C

  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h: double_coalg_hor X Y
(trfs id_h_square (double_coalg_map X)
      ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F X)
⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h =
(id_h_square (double_coalg_map X)
 ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F (pr1 X))
⋆h (trfs sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h)

F: lax_double_functor C C

  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat

     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h: double_coalg_hor X Y
(trfs id_h_square (double_coalg_map X)
      ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F X)
⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h =
trfs (trfs id_h_square (double_coalg_map X)
           ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F (pr1 X))
     ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h

  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h: double_coalg_hor X Y
(trfs id_h_square (double_coalg_map X)
      ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F X)
⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h =
(trfs id_h_square (double_coalg_map X)
      ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F (pr1 X))
⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h: double_coalg_hor X Y
trfs id_h_square (double_coalg_map X)
     ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F X =
trfs id_h_square (double_coalg_map X)
     ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F (pr1 X)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h: double_coalg_hor X Y
id_h_square (double_coalg_map X)
⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F X =
id_h_square (double_coalg_map X)
⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F (pr1 X)

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h: double_coalg_hor X Y
double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y)
  (double_coalg_comp_hor (double_coalg_id_hor X) h) h

  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h: double_coalg_hor X Y
double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y)
  (double_coalg_comp_hor (double_coalg_id_hor X) h) h

F: lax_double_functor C C

     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category

h: double_coalg_hor X Y
square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y)
  (double_coalg_comp_hor (double_coalg_id_hor X) h) h
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h: double_coalg_hor X Y
is_double_coalg_sqr
  (pr2
     (double_coalg_comp_hor (double_coalg_id_hor X) h))
  (pr2 h) (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) ?s

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h: double_coalg_hor X Y
square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y)
  (double_coalg_comp_hor (double_coalg_id_hor X) h) h
 exact (lunitor_h h).
    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h: double_coalg_hor X Y
is_double_coalg_sqr
  (pr2
     (double_coalg_comp_hor (double_coalg_id_hor X) h))
  (pr2 h) (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) (lunitor_h h)
 exact (is_double_coalg_sqr_lunitor h).
  Defined.

  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
double_lunitor_data double_coalg_hor_id
  double_coalg_hor_comp

  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
double_lunitor_data double_coalg_hor_id
  double_coalg_hor_comp

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: CoAlg_category F
h: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat X Y
iso_twosided_disp (identity_z_iso X)
  (identity_z_iso Y)
  (double_hor_comp double_coalg_hor_comp
     (double_id double_coalg_hor_id X) h) h

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: CoAlg_category F
h: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat X Y
double_hor_comp double_coalg_hor_comp
  (double_id double_coalg_hor_id X) h -->[
identity_z_iso X ][ identity_z_iso Y] h
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: CoAlg_category F
h: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat X Y
(λ fg : double_hor_comp double_coalg_hor_comp
          (double_id double_coalg_hor_id X) h -->[
        identity_z_iso X ][ identity_z_iso Y] h,
 is_iso_twosided_disp (pr2 (identity_z_iso X))
   (pr2 (identity_z_iso Y)) fg) ?pr1

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: CoAlg_category F
h: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat X Y
double_hor_comp double_coalg_hor_comp
  (double_id double_coalg_hor_id X) h -->[
identity_z_iso X ][ identity_z_iso Y] h
 exact (double_coalg_lunitor_sqr h).
    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: CoAlg_category F
h: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat X Y
(λ fg : double_hor_comp double_coalg_hor_comp
          (double_id double_coalg_hor_id X) h -->[
        identity_z_iso X ][ identity_z_iso Y] h,
 is_iso_twosided_disp (pr2 (identity_z_iso X))
   (pr2 (identity_z_iso Y)) fg)
  (double_coalg_lunitor_sqr h)
 
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: CoAlg_category F
h: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat X Y
square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h
  (double_hor_comp double_coalg_hor_comp
     (double_id double_coalg_hor_id X) h)
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: CoAlg_category F
h: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat X Y
double_coalg_lunitor_sqr h ⋆v ?s' =
trbs id_v_square
       (double_hor_comp double_coalg_hor_comp
          (double_id double_coalg_hor_id X) h)
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: CoAlg_category F
h: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat X Y
?s' ⋆v double_coalg_lunitor_sqr h = trbs id_v_square h

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: CoAlg_category F
h: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat X Y
square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h
  (double_hor_comp double_coalg_hor_comp
     (double_id double_coalg_hor_id X) h)
 exact (linvunitor_h _).
      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: CoAlg_category F
h: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat X Y
double_coalg_lunitor_sqr h ⋆v linvunitor_h h =
trbs id_v_square
       (double_hor_comp double_coalg_hor_comp
          (double_id double_coalg_hor_id X) h)
 exact (lunitor_linvunitor_h _).
      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: CoAlg_category F
h: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat X Y
linvunitor_h h ⋆v double_coalg_lunitor_sqr h =
trbs id_v_square h
 exact (linvunitor_lunitor_h _).
  Defined.

  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
double_lunitor_laws double_coalg_lunitor_data

  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
double_lunitor_laws double_coalg_lunitor_data

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: CoAlg_category F
h₁: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat x₁ y₁
h₂: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat x₂ y₂
v₁: CoAlg_category F ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: CoAlg_category F ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
trb₂ (double_coalg_lunitor_data x₁ y₁ h₁ ;;2 τ) =
double_hor_comp_mor double_coalg_hor_comp
  (double_id_mor double_coalg_hor_id v₁) τ ;;2 double_coalg_lunitor_data
                                                 x₂ y₂
                                                 h₂

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: CoAlg_category F
h₁: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat x₁ y₁
h₂: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat x₂ y₂
v₁: CoAlg_category F ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: CoAlg_category F ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
trb₂ (double_coalg_lunitor_data x₁ y₁ h₁ ;;2 τ) =
double_hor_comp_mor double_coalg_hor_comp
  (double_id_mor double_coalg_hor_id v₁) τ ;;2 double_coalg_lunitor_data
                                                 x₂ y₂
                                                 h₂

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: CoAlg_category F
h₁: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat x₁ y₁
h₂: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat x₂ y₂
v₁: CoAlg_category F ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: CoAlg_category F ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
trb₂ (double_coalg_lunitor_data x₁ y₁ h₁ ;;2 τ) =
trbs lunitor_h h₁ ⋆v τ

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: CoAlg_category F
h₁: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat x₁ y₁
h₂: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat x₂ y₂
v₁: CoAlg_category F ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: CoAlg_category F ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
trb₂ (double_coalg_lunitor_data x₁ y₁ h₁ ;;2 τ) = ?b
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: CoAlg_category F
h₁: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat x₁ y₁
h₂: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat x₂ y₂
v₁: CoAlg_category F ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: CoAlg_category F ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
?b = trbs lunitor_h h₁ ⋆v τ

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: CoAlg_category F
h₁: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat x₁ y₁
h₂: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat x₂ y₂
v₁: CoAlg_category F ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: CoAlg_category F ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
trb₂ (double_coalg_lunitor_data x₁ y₁ h₁ ;;2 τ) = ?b

      exact (transportb_double_coalg_sqr
               (id_right _ @ !(id_left _))
               (id_right _ @ !(id_left _))
               (double_coalg_lunitor_sqr _ ;;2 _)).
    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: CoAlg_category F
h₁: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat x₁ y₁
h₂: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat x₂ y₂
v₁: CoAlg_category F ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: CoAlg_category F ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
trbs (double_coalg_lunitor_sqr h₁ ;;2 τ) =
trbs lunitor_h h₁ ⋆v τ

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: CoAlg_category F
h₁: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat x₁ y₁
h₂: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat x₂ y₂
v₁: CoAlg_category F ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: CoAlg_category F ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
double_coalg_lunitor_sqr h₁ ;;2 τ = lunitor_h h₁ ⋆v τ

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
double_cat_lunitor double_coalg_hor_id
  double_coalg_hor_comp

  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
double_cat_lunitor double_coalg_hor_id
  double_coalg_hor_comp

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
double_lunitor_data double_coalg_hor_id
  double_coalg_hor_comp
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
double_lunitor_laws ?l

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
double_lunitor_data double_coalg_hor_id
  double_coalg_hor_comp
 exact double_coalg_lunitor_data.
    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
double_lunitor_laws double_coalg_lunitor_data
 exact double_coalg_lunitor_laws.
  Defined.

  (** * 9. The right unitor *)
  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h: double_coalg_hor X Y
is_double_coalg_sqr
  (double_coalg_comp_hor_struct h
     (double_coalg_id_hor Y))
  (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h) (id₁ X) (id₁ Y)
  (runitor_h h)

  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h: double_coalg_hor X Y
is_double_coalg_sqr
  (double_coalg_comp_hor_struct h
     (double_coalg_id_hor Y))
  (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h) (id₁ X) (id₁ Y)
  (runitor_h h)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h: double_coalg_hor X Y
trfs (trfs sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h
           ⋆h (trfs id_h_square (double_coalg_map Y)
                    ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F
                         (pr1 Y))
           ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F h
                (identity_h Y)) ⋆v #s F (runitor_h h) =
runitor_h h ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h: double_coalg_hor X Y
trfs (trfs sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h
           ⋆h (trfs id_h_square (double_coalg_map Y)
                    ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F
                         (pr1 Y))
           ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F h
                (identity_h Y) ⋆v #s F (runitor_h h)) =
runitor_h h ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h: double_coalg_hor X Y
trfs sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h
     ⋆h (trfs id_h_square (double_coalg_map Y)
              ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F (pr1 Y))
     ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F h (identity_h Y)
     ⋆v #s F (runitor_h h) =
runitor_h h ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h: double_coalg_hor X Y
trfs (trfs (trfs sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h)
           ⋆h (id_h_square (double_coalg_map Y)
               ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F (pr1 Y)))
     ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F h (identity_h Y)
     ⋆v #s F (runitor_h h) =
runitor_h h ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h: double_coalg_hor X Y
trfs (trfs (trfs sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h)
           ⋆h (id_h_square (double_coalg_map Y)
               ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F (pr1 Y))
           ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F h
                (identity_h Y) ⋆v #s F (runitor_h h)) =
runitor_h h ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h: double_coalg_hor X Y
trfs (trfs sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h)
     ⋆h (id_h_square (double_coalg_map Y)
         ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F (pr1 Y))
     ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F h (identity_h Y)
     ⋆v #s F (runitor_h h) =
runitor_h h ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h: double_coalg_hor X Y
trfs (trfs sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h)
     ⋆h (id_h_square (double_coalg_map Y)
         ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F (pr1 Y))
     ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F h (identity_h Y)
     ⋆v #s F (runitor_h h) =
trfs sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h
     ⋆h id_h_square (double_coalg_map Y)
     ⋆v runitor_h (#h F h)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h: double_coalg_hor X Y
trfs sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h
     ⋆h id_h_square (double_coalg_map Y)
     ⋆v runitor_h (#h F h) =
trfs (trfs sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h)
     ⋆h (id_h_square (double_coalg_map Y)
         ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F (pr1 Y))
     ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F h (identity_h Y)
     ⋆v #s F (runitor_h h)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h: double_coalg_hor X Y
trfs sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h
     ⋆h id_h_square (double_coalg_map Y)
     ⋆v runitor_h (#h F h) = ?b
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h: double_coalg_hor X Y
?b =
trfs (trfs sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h)
     ⋆h (id_h_square (double_coalg_map Y)
         ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F (pr1 Y))
     ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F h (identity_h Y)
     ⋆v #s F (runitor_h h)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h: double_coalg_hor X Y
trfs sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h
     ⋆h id_h_square (double_coalg_map Y)
     ⋆v runitor_h (#h F h) = ?b

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h: double_coalg_hor X Y
runitor_h (#h F h) = ?t2

      exact (lax_double_functor_runitor_h F h).
    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h: double_coalg_hor X Y
trfs sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h
     ⋆h id_h_square (double_coalg_map Y)
     ⋆v (trfs id_v_square (#h F h)
              ⋆h lax_double_functor_id_h F Y
              ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F h
                   (identity_h Y)
              ⋆v #s F (runitor_h h)) =
trfs (trfs sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h)
     ⋆h (id_h_square (double_coalg_map Y)
         ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F (pr1 Y))
     ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F h (identity_h Y)
     ⋆v #s F (runitor_h h)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h: double_coalg_hor X Y
trfs (trfs sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h
           ⋆h id_h_square (double_coalg_map Y)
           ⋆v (id_v_square (#h F h)
               ⋆h lax_double_functor_id_h F Y
               ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F h
                    (identity_h Y)
               ⋆v #s F (runitor_h h))) =
trfs (trfs sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h)
     ⋆h (id_h_square (double_coalg_map Y)
         ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F (pr1 Y))
     ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F h (identity_h Y)
     ⋆v #s F (runitor_h h)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C

  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h: double_coalg_hor X Y
trfs sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h
     ⋆h id_h_square (double_coalg_map Y)
     ⋆v (id_v_square (#h F h)
         ⋆h lax_double_functor_id_h F Y
         ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F h
              (identity_h Y) ⋆v #s F (runitor_h h)) =
trfs (trfs sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h)
     ⋆h (id_h_square (double_coalg_map Y)
         ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F (pr1 Y))
     ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F h (identity_h Y)
     ⋆v #s F (runitor_h h)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h: double_coalg_hor X Y
trfs sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h
     ⋆h id_h_square (double_coalg_map Y)
     ⋆v (id_v_square (#h F h)
         ⋆h lax_double_functor_id_h F Y
         ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F h
              (identity_h Y) ⋆v #s F (runitor_h h)) =
?b
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h: double_coalg_hor X Y
?b =
trfs (trfs sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h)
     ⋆h (id_h_square (double_coalg_map Y)
         ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F (pr1 Y))
     ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F h (identity_h Y)
     ⋆v #s F (runitor_h h)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h: double_coalg_hor X Y
trfs sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h
     ⋆h id_h_square (double_coalg_map Y)
     ⋆v (id_v_square (#h F h)
         ⋆h lax_double_functor_id_h F Y
         ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F h
              (identity_h Y) ⋆v #s F (runitor_h h)) =
?b

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h: double_coalg_hor X Y
sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h
⋆h id_h_square (double_coalg_map Y)
⋆v (id_v_square (#h F h)
    ⋆h lax_double_functor_id_h F Y
    ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F h (identity_h Y)
    ⋆v #s F (runitor_h h)) = ?t2

      apply square_assoc_v.
    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h: double_coalg_hor X Y
trfs (trbs sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h
           ⋆h id_h_square (double_coalg_map Y)
           ⋆v (id_v_square (#h F h)
               ⋆h lax_double_functor_id_h F Y
               ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F h
                    (identity_h Y))
           ⋆v #s F (runitor_h h)) =
trfs (trfs sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h)
     ⋆h (id_h_square (double_coalg_map Y)
         ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F (pr1 Y))
     ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F h (identity_h Y)
     ⋆v #s F (runitor_h h)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h: double_coalg_hor X Y
trfs (trfs sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h
           ⋆h id_h_square (double_coalg_map Y)
           ⋆v (id_v_square (#h F h)
               ⋆h lax_double_functor_id_h F Y
               ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F h
                    (identity_h Y))
           ⋆v #s F (runitor_h h)) =
trfs (trfs sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h)
     ⋆h (id_h_square (double_coalg_map Y)
         ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F (pr1 Y))
     ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F h (identity_h Y)
     ⋆v #s F (runitor_h h)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h: double_coalg_hor X Y
trfs sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h
     ⋆h id_h_square (double_coalg_map Y)
     ⋆v (id_v_square (#h F h)
         ⋆h lax_double_functor_id_h F Y
         ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F h
              (identity_h Y)) ⋆v #s F (runitor_h h) =
trfs (trfs sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h)
     ⋆h (id_h_square (double_coalg_map Y)
         ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F (pr1 Y))
     ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F h (identity_h Y)
     ⋆v #s F (runitor_h h)

         ⋆h lax_double_functor_id_h F Y
         ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F h
              (identity_h Y)) ⋆v #s F (runitor_h h) =
?b

    ⋆h lax_double_functor_id_h F Y
    ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F h (identity_h Y)) =

      apply square_assoc_v.

(trfs sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h)
⋆h (id_h_square (double_coalg_map Y)
    ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F Y) =

     (hor_mor C)): category

C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h: double_coalg_hor X Y
sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h = sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C

  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h: double_coalg_hor X Y
double_coalg_sqr (id₁ X) (id₁ Y)
  (double_coalg_comp_hor h (double_coalg_id_hor Y)) h

  (double_coalg_comp_hor h (double_coalg_id_hor Y)) h

C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h: double_coalg_hor X Y
is_double_coalg_sqr
  (pr2
     (double_coalg_comp_hor h (double_coalg_id_hor Y)))
  (pr2 h) (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) ?s

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C

     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h: double_coalg_hor X Y
square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y)
  (double_coalg_comp_hor h (double_coalg_id_hor Y)) h
 exact (runitor_h h).

is_double_coalg_sqr
  (pr2
     (double_coalg_comp_hor h (double_coalg_id_hor Y)))
  (pr2 h) (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) (runitor_h h)
 exact (is_double_coalg_sqr_runitor h).
  Defined.

  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
double_runitor_data double_coalg_hor_id
  double_coalg_hor_comp

  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
double_runitor_data double_coalg_hor_id
  double_coalg_hor_comp

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: CoAlg_category F
h: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat X Y
iso_twosided_disp (identity_z_iso X)
  (identity_z_iso Y)
  (double_hor_comp double_coalg_hor_comp h
     (double_id double_coalg_hor_id Y)) h

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: CoAlg_category F
h: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat X Y
double_hor_comp double_coalg_hor_comp h
  (double_id double_coalg_hor_id Y) -->[
identity_z_iso X ][ identity_z_iso Y] h
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: CoAlg_category F
h: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat X Y
(λ fg : double_hor_comp double_coalg_hor_comp h
          (double_id double_coalg_hor_id Y) -->[
        identity_z_iso X ][ identity_z_iso Y] h,
 is_iso_twosided_disp (pr2 (identity_z_iso X))
   (pr2 (identity_z_iso Y)) fg) ?pr1

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: CoAlg_category F
h: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat X Y
double_hor_comp double_coalg_hor_comp h
  (double_id double_coalg_hor_id Y) -->[
identity_z_iso X ][ identity_z_iso Y] h
 exact (double_coalg_runitor_sqr h).
    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: CoAlg_category F
h: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat X Y
(λ fg : double_hor_comp double_coalg_hor_comp h
          (double_id double_coalg_hor_id Y) -->[
        identity_z_iso X ][ identity_z_iso Y] h,
 is_iso_twosided_disp (pr2 (identity_z_iso X))
   (pr2 (identity_z_iso Y)) fg)
  (double_coalg_runitor_sqr h)
 
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: CoAlg_category F
h: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat X Y
square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h
  (double_hor_comp double_coalg_hor_comp h
     (double_id double_coalg_hor_id Y))
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: CoAlg_category F
h: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat X Y
double_coalg_runitor_sqr h ⋆v ?s' =
trbs id_v_square
       (double_hor_comp double_coalg_hor_comp h
          (double_id double_coalg_hor_id Y))
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: CoAlg_category F
h: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat X Y
?s' ⋆v double_coalg_runitor_sqr h = trbs id_v_square h

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: CoAlg_category F
h: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat X Y
square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) h
  (double_hor_comp double_coalg_hor_comp h
     (double_id double_coalg_hor_id Y))
 exact (rinvunitor_h _).
      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: CoAlg_category F
h: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat X Y
double_coalg_runitor_sqr h ⋆v rinvunitor_h h =
trbs id_v_square
       (double_hor_comp double_coalg_hor_comp h
          (double_id double_coalg_hor_id Y))
 exact (runitor_rinvunitor_h _).
      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: CoAlg_category F
h: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat X Y
rinvunitor_h h ⋆v double_coalg_runitor_sqr h =
trbs id_v_square h
 exact (rinvunitor_runitor_h _).
  Defined.

  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
double_runitor_laws double_coalg_runitor_data

  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
double_runitor_laws double_coalg_runitor_data

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: CoAlg_category F
h₁: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat x₁ y₁
h₂: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat x₂ y₂
v₁: CoAlg_category F ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: CoAlg_category F ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
trb₂ (double_coalg_runitor_data x₁ y₁ h₁ ;;2 τ) =
double_hor_comp_mor double_coalg_hor_comp τ
  (double_id_mor double_coalg_hor_id v₂) ;;2 double_coalg_runitor_data
                                               x₂ y₂
                                               h₂

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: CoAlg_category F
h₁: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat x₁ y₁
h₂: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat x₂ y₂
v₁: CoAlg_category F ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: CoAlg_category F ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
trb₂ (double_coalg_runitor_data x₁ y₁ h₁ ;;2 τ) =
double_hor_comp_mor double_coalg_hor_comp τ
  (double_id_mor double_coalg_hor_id v₂) ;;2 double_coalg_runitor_data
                                               x₂ y₂
                                               h₂

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: CoAlg_category F
h₁: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat x₁ y₁
h₂: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat x₂ y₂
v₁: CoAlg_category F ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: CoAlg_category F ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
trb₂ (double_coalg_runitor_data x₁ y₁ h₁ ;;2 τ) =
trbs runitor_h h₁ ⋆v τ

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: CoAlg_category F
h₁: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat x₁ y₁
h₂: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat x₂ y₂
v₁: CoAlg_category F ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: CoAlg_category F ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
trb₂ (double_coalg_runitor_data x₁ y₁ h₁ ;;2 τ) = ?b
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: CoAlg_category F
h₁: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat x₁ y₁
h₂: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat x₂ y₂
v₁: CoAlg_category F ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: CoAlg_category F ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
?b = trbs runitor_h h₁ ⋆v τ

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: CoAlg_category F
h₁: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat x₁ y₁
h₂: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat x₂ y₂
v₁: CoAlg_category F ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: CoAlg_category F ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
trb₂ (double_coalg_runitor_data x₁ y₁ h₁ ;;2 τ) = ?b

      exact (transportb_double_coalg_sqr
               (id_right _ @ !(id_left _))
               (id_right _ @ !(id_left _))
               (double_coalg_runitor_sqr _ ;;2 _)).
    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: CoAlg_category F
h₁: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat x₁ y₁
h₂: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat x₂ y₂
v₁: CoAlg_category F ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: CoAlg_category F ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
trbs (double_coalg_runitor_sqr h₁ ;;2 τ) =
trbs runitor_h h₁ ⋆v τ

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: CoAlg_category F
h₁: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat x₁ y₁
h₂: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat x₂ y₂
v₁: CoAlg_category F ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: CoAlg_category F ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
double_coalg_runitor_sqr h₁ ;;2 τ = runitor_h h₁ ⋆v τ

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
double_cat_runitor double_coalg_hor_id
  double_coalg_hor_comp

  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
double_cat_runitor double_coalg_hor_id
  double_coalg_hor_comp

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
double_runitor_data double_coalg_hor_id
  double_coalg_hor_comp
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
double_runitor_laws ?l

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
double_runitor_data double_coalg_hor_id
  double_coalg_hor_comp
 exact double_coalg_runitor_data.
    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
double_runitor_laws double_coalg_runitor_data
 exact double_coalg_runitor_laws.
  Defined.

  (** * 10. The associator *)
  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
W, X, Y, Z: double_coalg F
h₁: double_coalg_hor W X
h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
h₃: double_coalg_hor Y Z
is_double_coalg_sqr
  (double_coalg_comp_hor_struct h₁
     (double_coalg_comp_hor h₂ h₃))
  (double_coalg_comp_hor_struct
     (double_coalg_comp_hor h₁ h₂) h₃) (id₁ W) (id₁ Z)
  (lassociator_h h₁ h₂ h₃)

  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
W, X, Y, Z: double_coalg F
h₁: double_coalg_hor W X
h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
h₃: double_coalg_hor Y Z
is_double_coalg_sqr
  (double_coalg_comp_hor_struct h₁
     (double_coalg_comp_hor h₂ h₃))
  (double_coalg_comp_hor_struct
     (double_coalg_comp_hor h₁ h₂) h₃) (id₁ W) (id₁ Z)
  (lassociator_h h₁ h₂ h₃)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
W, X, Y, Z: double_coalg F
h₁: double_coalg_hor W X
h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
h₃: double_coalg_hor Y Z
trfs (trfs sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁
           ⋆h (trfs sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂
                    ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₃
                    ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F h₂
                         h₃)
           ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F h₁
                (h₂ ·h h₃))
     ⋆v #s F (lassociator_h h₁ h₂ h₃) =
lassociator_h h₁ h₂ h₃
⋆v (trfs (trfs sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁
               ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂
               ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F h₁ h₂)
         ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₃
         ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F (h₁ ·h h₂) h₃)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
W, X, Y, Z: double_coalg F
h₁: double_coalg_hor W X
h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
h₃: double_coalg_hor Y Z
trfs (trfs sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁
           ⋆h (trfs sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂
                    ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₃
                    ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F h₂
                         h₃)
           ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F h₁
                (h₂ ·h h₃)
           ⋆v #s F (lassociator_h h₁ h₂ h₃)) =
lassociator_h h₁ h₂ h₃
⋆v (trfs (trfs sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁
               ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂
               ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F h₁ h₂)
         ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₃
         ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F (h₁ ·h h₂) h₃)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
W, X, Y, Z: double_coalg F
h₁: double_coalg_hor W X
h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
h₃: double_coalg_hor Y Z
trfs (trfs sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁
           ⋆h (trfs sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂
                    ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₃
                    ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F h₂
                         h₃)
           ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F h₁
                (h₂ ·h h₃)
           ⋆v #s F (lassociator_h h₁ h₂ h₃)) =
trfs lassociator_h h₁ h₂ h₃
     ⋆v ((trfs sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁
               ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂
               ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F h₁ h₂)
         ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₃
         ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F (h₁ ·h h₂) h₃)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
W, X, Y, Z: double_coalg F
h₁: double_coalg_hor W X
h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
h₃: double_coalg_hor Y Z
trfs sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁
     ⋆h (trfs sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂
              ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₃
              ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F h₂ h₃)
     ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F h₁ (h₂ ·h h₃)
     ⋆v #s F (lassociator_h h₁ h₂ h₃) =
trfs lassociator_h h₁ h₂ h₃
     ⋆v ((trfs sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁
               ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂
               ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F h₁ h₂)
         ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₃
         ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F (h₁ ·h h₂) h₃)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
W, X, Y, Z: double_coalg F
h₁: double_coalg_hor W X
h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
h₃: double_coalg_hor Y Z
trfs (trfs (trfs sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁)
           ⋆h (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂
               ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₃
               ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F h₂ h₃))
     ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F h₁ (h₂ ·h h₃)
     ⋆v #s F (lassociator_h h₁ h₂ h₃) =
trfs lassociator_h h₁ h₂ h₃
     ⋆v ((trfs sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁
               ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂
               ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F h₁ h₂)
         ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₃
         ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F (h₁ ·h h₂) h₃)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
W, X, Y, Z: double_coalg F
h₁: double_coalg_hor W X
h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
h₃: double_coalg_hor Y Z
trfs (trfs (trfs sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁)
           ⋆h (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂
               ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₃
               ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F h₂ h₃)
           ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F h₁
                (h₂ ·h h₃)
           ⋆v #s F (lassociator_h h₁ h₂ h₃)) =
trfs lassociator_h h₁ h₂ h₃
     ⋆v ((trfs sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁
               ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂
               ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F h₁ h₂)
         ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₃
         ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F (h₁ ·h h₂) h₃)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
W, X, Y, Z: double_coalg F
h₁: double_coalg_hor W X
h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
h₃: double_coalg_hor Y Z
trfs (trfs sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁)
     ⋆h (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂
         ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₃
         ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F h₂ h₃)
     ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F h₁ (h₂ ·h h₃)
     ⋆v #s F (lassociator_h h₁ h₂ h₃) =
trfs lassociator_h h₁ h₂ h₃
     ⋆v ((trfs sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁
               ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂
               ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F h₁ h₂)
         ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₃
         ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F (h₁ ·h h₂) h₃)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
W, X, Y, Z: double_coalg F
h₁: double_coalg_hor W X
h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
h₃: double_coalg_hor Y Z
trfs (trfs sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁)
     ⋆h (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂
         ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₃
         ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F h₂ h₃)
     ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F h₁ (h₂ ·h h₃)
     ⋆v #s F (lassociator_h h₁ h₂ h₃) = ?b
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
W, X, Y, Z: double_coalg F
h₁: double_coalg_hor W X
h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
h₃: double_coalg_hor Y Z
?b =
trfs lassociator_h h₁ h₂ h₃
     ⋆v ((trfs sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁
               ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂
               ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F h₁ h₂)
         ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₃
         ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F (h₁ ·h h₂) h₃)

F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
W, X, Y, Z: double_coalg F
h₁: double_coalg_hor W X
h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
h₃: double_coalg_hor Y Z
trfs (trfs sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁)
     ⋆h (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂
         ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₃
         ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F h₂ h₃)
     ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F h₁ (h₂ ·h h₃)
     ⋆v #s F (lassociator_h h₁ h₂ h₃) = ?b

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
W, X, Y, Z: double_coalg F
h₁: double_coalg_hor W X
h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
h₃: double_coalg_hor Y Z
(trfs sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁)
⋆h (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂
    ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₃
    ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F h₂ h₃)
⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F h₁ (h₂ ·h h₃)
⋆v #s F (lassociator_h h₁ h₂ h₃) = ?t2

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
W, X, Y, Z: double_coalg F
h₁: double_coalg_hor W X
h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
h₃: double_coalg_hor Y Z
(trfs sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁)
⋆h (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂
    ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₃
    ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F h₂ h₃) = ?y'

      use hcomp_vcomp_r_id_r.
    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
W, X, Y, Z: double_coalg F
h₁: double_coalg_hor W X
h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
h₃: double_coalg_hor Y Z
trfs (trfs (trfs sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁)
           ⋆h (trfs sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂
                    ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₃)
           ⋆v id_v_square (#h F h₁)
              ⋆h lax_double_functor_comp_h F h₂ h₃)
     ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F h₁ (h₂ ·h h₃)
     ⋆v #s F (lassociator_h h₁ h₂ h₃) =
trfs lassociator_h h₁ h₂ h₃
     ⋆v ((trfs sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁
               ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂
               ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F h₁ h₂)
         ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₃
         ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F (h₁ ·h h₂) h₃)

           ⋆v #s F (lassociator_h h₁ h₂ h₃)) =

C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
W, X, Y, Z: double_coalg F
h₁: double_coalg_hor W X
h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
h₃: double_coalg_hor Y Z
trfs sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁
     ⋆h (trfs (trfs sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂
                    ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₃)) =
?y'

F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)

h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
h₃: double_coalg_hor Y Z

⋆h (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂
    ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₃) = ?y'

      apply idpath.

F: lax_double_functor C C

     ⋆h (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂
         ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₃)
     ⋆v id_v_square (#h F h₁)
        ⋆h lax_double_functor_comp_h F h₂ h₃
     ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F h₁ (h₂ ·h h₃)
     ⋆v #s F (lassociator_h h₁ h₂ h₃) =

         ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₃
         ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F (h₁ ·h h₂) h₃)

     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
W, X, Y, Z: double_coalg F
h₁: double_coalg_hor W X
h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
h₃: double_coalg_hor Y Z
?t2 =
sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁
⋆h (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂
    ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₃)
⋆v id_v_square (#h F h₁)
   ⋆h lax_double_functor_comp_h F h₂ h₃
⋆v (lax_double_functor_comp_h F h₁ (h₂ ·h h₃)
    ⋆v #s F (lassociator_h h₁ h₂ h₃))

      apply square_assoc_v'.

  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat

           ⋆h (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂
               ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₃)
           ⋆v (id_v_square (#h F h₁)
               ⋆h lax_double_functor_comp_h F h₂ h₃
               ⋆v (lax_double_functor_comp_h F h₁
                     (h₂ ·h h₃)
                   ⋆v #s F (lassociator_h h₁ h₂ h₃)))) =
trfs lassociator_h h₁ h₂ h₃
     ⋆v ((trfs sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁
               ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂
               ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F h₁ h₂)
         ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₃
         ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F (h₁ ·h h₂) h₃)

     ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F (h₁ ·h h₂) h₃ =
trfs lassociator_h h₁ h₂ h₃
     ⋆v ((trfs sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁
               ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂
               ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F h₁ h₂)
         ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₃
         ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F (h₁ ·h h₂) h₃)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
W, X, Y, Z: double_coalg F
h₁: double_coalg_hor W X
h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
h₃: double_coalg_hor Y Z

           ⋆h (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂
               ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₃)
           ⋆v lassociator_h (#h F h₁) (#h F h₂)
                (#h F h₃)
           ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F h₁ h₂
              ⋆h id_v_square (#h F h₃))
     ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F (h₁ ·h h₂) h₃ =
trfs lassociator_h h₁ h₂ h₃
     ⋆v ((trfs sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁
               ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂
               ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F h₁ h₂)
         ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₃
         ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F (h₁ ·h h₂) h₃)

     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
W, X, Y, Z: double_coalg F
h₁: double_coalg_hor W X
h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
h₃: double_coalg_hor Y Z
trfs (trfs lassociator_h h₁ h₂ h₃
           ⋆v (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁
               ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂
               ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₃
               ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F h₁ h₂
                  ⋆h id_v_square (#h F h₃)
               ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F
                    (h₁ ·h h₂) h₃)) =
trfs lassociator_h h₁ h₂ h₃
     ⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁
        ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂
        ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₃
     ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F h₁ h₂
        ⋆h id_v_square (#h F h₃)
     ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F (h₁ ·h h₂) h₃

    ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F h₁ h₂
       ⋆h id_v_square (#h F h₃)) = ?y'

      apply square_assoc_v.

C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
W, X, Y, Z: double_coalg F
h₁: double_coalg_hor W X
h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
h₃: double_coalg_hor Y Z
lassociator_h h₁ h₂ h₃
⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁
   ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂
   ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₃
⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F h₁ h₂
   ⋆h id_v_square (#h F h₃)
⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F (h₁ ·h h₂) h₃ =
lassociator_h h₁ h₂ h₃
⋆v sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₁
   ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₂
   ⋆h sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h₃
⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F h₁ h₂
   ⋆h id_v_square (#h F h₃)
⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F (h₁ ·h h₂) h₃

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
W, X, Y, Z: double_coalg F
h₁: double_coalg_hor W X
h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
h₃: double_coalg_hor Y Z
double_coalg_sqr (id₁ W) (id₁ Z)
  (double_coalg_comp_hor h₁
     (double_coalg_comp_hor h₂ h₃))
  (double_coalg_comp_hor (double_coalg_comp_hor h₁ h₂)
     h₃)

h₁: double_coalg_hor W X

h₃: double_coalg_hor Y Z
double_coalg_sqr (id₁ W) (id₁ Z)
  (double_coalg_comp_hor h₁
     (double_coalg_comp_hor h₂ h₃))
  (double_coalg_comp_hor (double_coalg_comp_hor h₁ h₂)
     h₃)

  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
