W, X, Y, Z: double_coalg F
h₁: double_coalg_hor W X
h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
h₃: double_coalg_hor Y Z
square (id₁ W) (id₁ Z)
  (double_coalg_comp_hor h₁
     (double_coalg_comp_hor h₂ h₃))
  (double_coalg_comp_hor (double_coalg_comp_hor h₁ h₂)
     h₃)
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
W, X, Y, Z: double_coalg F
h₁: double_coalg_hor W X
h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
h₃: double_coalg_hor Y Z
is_double_coalg_sqr
  (pr2
     (double_coalg_comp_hor h₁
        (double_coalg_comp_hor h₂ h₃)))
  (pr2
     (double_coalg_comp_hor
        (double_coalg_comp_hor h₁ h₂) h₃)) (id₁ W)
  (id₁ Z) ?s

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
W, X, Y, Z: double_coalg F
h₁: double_coalg_hor W X
h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
h₃: double_coalg_hor Y Z
square (id₁ W) (id₁ Z)
  (double_coalg_comp_hor h₁
     (double_coalg_comp_hor h₂ h₃))
  (double_coalg_comp_hor (double_coalg_comp_hor h₁ h₂)
     h₃)
 exact (lassociator_h h₁ h₂ h₃).
    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
W, X, Y, Z: double_coalg F
h₁: double_coalg_hor W X
h₂: double_coalg_hor X Y
h₃: double_coalg_hor Y Z
is_double_coalg_sqr
  (pr2
     (double_coalg_comp_hor h₁
        (double_coalg_comp_hor h₂ h₃)))
  (pr2
     (double_coalg_comp_hor
        (double_coalg_comp_hor h₁ h₂) h₃)) (id₁ W)
  (id₁ Z) (lassociator_h h₁ h₂ h₃)
 apply is_double_coalg_sqr_lassociator.
  Defined.

  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
double_associator_data double_coalg_hor_comp

  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
double_associator_data double_coalg_hor_comp

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
W, X, Y, Z: CoAlg_category F
h₁: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat W X
h₂: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat X Y
h₃: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat Y Z
iso_twosided_disp (identity_z_iso W)
  (identity_z_iso Z)
  (double_hor_comp double_coalg_hor_comp h₁
     (double_hor_comp double_coalg_hor_comp h₂ h₃))
  (double_hor_comp double_coalg_hor_comp
     (double_hor_comp double_coalg_hor_comp h₁ h₂) h₃)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
W, X, Y, Z: CoAlg_category F
h₁: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat W X
h₂: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat X Y
h₃: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat Y Z
double_hor_comp double_coalg_hor_comp h₁
  (double_hor_comp double_coalg_hor_comp h₂ h₃) -->[
identity_z_iso W
][ identity_z_iso Z] double_hor_comp
                       double_coalg_hor_comp
                       (double_hor_comp
                          double_coalg_hor_comp h₁ h₂)
                       h₃
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
W, X, Y, Z: CoAlg_category F
h₁: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat W X
h₂: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat X Y
h₃: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat Y Z
(λ fg : double_hor_comp double_coalg_hor_comp h₁
          (double_hor_comp double_coalg_hor_comp h₂ h₃) -->[
        identity_z_iso W
        ][ identity_z_iso Z] double_hor_comp
                               double_coalg_hor_comp
                               (double_hor_comp
                                  double_coalg_hor_comp
                                  h₁ h₂) h₃,
 is_iso_twosided_disp (pr2 (identity_z_iso W))
   (pr2 (identity_z_iso Z)) fg) ?pr1

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
W, X, Y, Z: CoAlg_category F
h₁: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat W X
h₂: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat X Y
h₃: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat Y Z
double_hor_comp double_coalg_hor_comp h₁
  (double_hor_comp double_coalg_hor_comp h₂ h₃) -->[
identity_z_iso W
][ identity_z_iso Z] double_hor_comp
                       double_coalg_hor_comp
                       (double_hor_comp
                          double_coalg_hor_comp h₁ h₂)
                       h₃
 exact (double_coalg_lassociator_sqr h₁ h₂ h₃).
    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
W, X, Y, Z: CoAlg_category F
h₁: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat W X
h₂: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat X Y
h₃: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat Y Z
(λ fg : double_hor_comp double_coalg_hor_comp h₁
          (double_hor_comp double_coalg_hor_comp h₂ h₃) -->[
        identity_z_iso W
        ][ identity_z_iso Z] double_hor_comp
                               double_coalg_hor_comp
                               (double_hor_comp
                                  double_coalg_hor_comp
                                  h₁ h₂) h₃,
 is_iso_twosided_disp (pr2 (identity_z_iso W))
   (pr2 (identity_z_iso Z)) fg)
  (double_coalg_lassociator_sqr h₁ h₂ h₃)
 
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
W, X, Y, Z: CoAlg_category F
h₁: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat W X
h₂: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat X Y
h₃: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat Y Z
square (id₁ W) (id₁ Z)
  (double_hor_comp double_coalg_hor_comp
     (double_hor_comp double_coalg_hor_comp h₁ h₂) h₃)
  (double_hor_comp double_coalg_hor_comp h₁
     (double_hor_comp double_coalg_hor_comp h₂ h₃))
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
W, X, Y, Z: CoAlg_category F
h₁: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat W X
h₂: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat X Y
h₃: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat Y Z
double_coalg_lassociator_sqr h₁ h₂ h₃ ⋆v ?s' =
trbs id_v_square
       (double_hor_comp double_coalg_hor_comp h₁
          (double_hor_comp double_coalg_hor_comp h₂ h₃))
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
W, X, Y, Z: CoAlg_category F
h₁: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat W X
h₂: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat X Y
h₃: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat Y Z
?s' ⋆v double_coalg_lassociator_sqr h₁ h₂ h₃ =
trbs id_v_square
       (double_hor_comp double_coalg_hor_comp
          (double_hor_comp double_coalg_hor_comp h₁ h₂)
          h₃)

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
W, X, Y, Z: CoAlg_category F
h₁: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat W X
h₂: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat X Y
h₃: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat Y Z
square (id₁ W) (id₁ Z)
  (double_hor_comp double_coalg_hor_comp
     (double_hor_comp double_coalg_hor_comp h₁ h₂) h₃)
  (double_hor_comp double_coalg_hor_comp h₁
     (double_hor_comp double_coalg_hor_comp h₂ h₃))
 exact (rassociator_h _ _ _).
      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
W, X, Y, Z: CoAlg_category F
h₁: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat W X
h₂: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat X Y
h₃: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat Y Z
double_coalg_lassociator_sqr h₁ h₂ h₃
⋆v rassociator_h h₁ h₂ h₃ =
trbs id_v_square
       (double_hor_comp double_coalg_hor_comp h₁
          (double_hor_comp double_coalg_hor_comp h₂ h₃))
 exact (lassociator_rassociator_h _ _ _).
      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
W, X, Y, Z: CoAlg_category F
h₁: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat W X
h₂: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat X Y
h₃: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat Y Z
rassociator_h h₁ h₂ h₃
⋆v double_coalg_lassociator_sqr h₁ h₂ h₃ =
trbs id_v_square
       (double_hor_comp double_coalg_hor_comp
          (double_hor_comp double_coalg_hor_comp h₁ h₂)
          h₃)
 exact (rassociator_lassociator_h _ _ _).
  Defined.

  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
double_associator_laws double_coalg_associator_data

  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
double_associator_laws double_coalg_associator_data

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: CoAlg_category F
h₁: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat w₁ x₁
h₂: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat w₂ x₂
j₁: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat x₁ y₁
j₂: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat x₂ y₂
k₁: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat y₁ z₁
k₂: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat y₂ z₂
vw: CoAlg_category F ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
vx: CoAlg_category F ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: CoAlg_category F ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: CoAlg_category F ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: h₁ -->[ vw ][ vx] h₂
τ₂: j₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] j₂
τ₃: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trb₂ (double_coalg_associator_data w₁ x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ j₁
        k₁ ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor
                 double_coalg_hor_comp
                 (double_hor_comp_mor
                    double_coalg_hor_comp τ₁ τ₂) τ₃) =
double_hor_comp_mor double_coalg_hor_comp τ₁
  (double_hor_comp_mor double_coalg_hor_comp τ₂ τ₃) ;;2 
double_coalg_associator_data w₂ x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ j₂ k₂

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: CoAlg_category F
h₁: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat w₁ x₁
h₂: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat w₂ x₂
j₁: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat x₁ y₁
j₂: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat x₂ y₂
k₁: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat y₁ z₁
k₂: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat y₂ z₂
vw: CoAlg_category F ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
vx: CoAlg_category F ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: CoAlg_category F ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: CoAlg_category F ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: h₁ -->[ vw ][ vx] h₂
τ₂: j₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] j₂
τ₃: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trb₂ (double_coalg_associator_data w₁ x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ j₁
        k₁ ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor
                 double_coalg_hor_comp
                 (double_hor_comp_mor
                    double_coalg_hor_comp τ₁ τ₂) τ₃) =
double_hor_comp_mor double_coalg_hor_comp τ₁
  (double_hor_comp_mor double_coalg_hor_comp τ₂ τ₃) ;;2 
double_coalg_associator_data w₂ x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ j₂ k₂

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: CoAlg_category F
h₁: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat w₁ x₁
h₂: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat w₂ x₂
j₁: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat x₁ y₁
j₂: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat x₂ y₂
k₁: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat y₁ z₁
k₂: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat y₂ z₂
vw: CoAlg_category F ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
vx: CoAlg_category F ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: CoAlg_category F ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: CoAlg_category F ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: h₁ -->[ vw ][ vx] h₂
τ₂: j₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] j₂
τ₃: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trb₂ (double_coalg_associator_data w₁ x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ j₁
        k₁ ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor
                 double_coalg_hor_comp
                 (double_hor_comp_mor
                    double_coalg_hor_comp τ₁ τ₂) τ₃) =
trbs lassociator_h h₁ j₁ k₁ ⋆v τ₁ ⋆h τ₂ ⋆h τ₃

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: CoAlg_category F
h₁: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat w₁ x₁
h₂: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat w₂ x₂
j₁: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat x₁ y₁
j₂: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat x₂ y₂
k₁: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat y₁ z₁
k₂: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat y₂ z₂
vw: CoAlg_category F ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
vx: CoAlg_category F ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: CoAlg_category F ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: CoAlg_category F ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: h₁ -->[ vw ][ vx] h₂
τ₂: j₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] j₂
τ₃: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trb₂ (double_coalg_associator_data w₁ x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ j₁
        k₁ ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor
                 double_coalg_hor_comp
                 (double_hor_comp_mor
                    double_coalg_hor_comp τ₁ τ₂) τ₃) =
?b
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: CoAlg_category F
h₁: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat w₁ x₁
h₂: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat w₂ x₂
j₁: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat x₁ y₁
j₂: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat x₂ y₂
k₁: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat y₁ z₁
k₂: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat y₂ z₂
vw: CoAlg_category F ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
vx: CoAlg_category F ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: CoAlg_category F ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: CoAlg_category F ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: h₁ -->[ vw ][ vx] h₂
τ₂: j₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] j₂
τ₃: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
?b = trbs lassociator_h h₁ j₁ k₁ ⋆v τ₁ ⋆h τ₂ ⋆h τ₃

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: CoAlg_category F
h₁: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat w₁ x₁
h₂: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat w₂ x₂
j₁: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat x₁ y₁
j₂: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat x₂ y₂
k₁: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat y₁ z₁
k₂: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat y₂ z₂
vw: CoAlg_category F ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
vx: CoAlg_category F ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: CoAlg_category F ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: CoAlg_category F ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: h₁ -->[ vw ][ vx] h₂
τ₂: j₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] j₂
τ₃: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trb₂ (double_coalg_associator_data w₁ x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ j₁
        k₁ ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor
                 double_coalg_hor_comp
                 (double_hor_comp_mor
                    double_coalg_hor_comp τ₁ τ₂) τ₃) =
?b

      exact (transportb_double_coalg_sqr
               (id_right _ @ !(id_left _))
               (id_right _ @ !(id_left _))
               (double_coalg_lassociator_sqr _ _ _
                ;;2
                double_coalg_comp_hor_sqr (double_coalg_comp_hor_sqr _ _) _)).
    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: CoAlg_category F
h₁: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat w₁ x₁
h₂: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat w₂ x₂
j₁: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat x₁ y₁
j₂: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat x₂ y₂
k₁: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat y₁ z₁
k₂: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat y₂ z₂
vw: CoAlg_category F ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
vx: CoAlg_category F ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: CoAlg_category F ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: CoAlg_category F ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: h₁ -->[ vw ][ vx] h₂
τ₂: j₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] j₂
τ₃: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trbs (double_coalg_lassociator_sqr h₁ j₁ k₁ ;;2 double_coalg_comp_hor_sqr
                                                 (double_coalg_comp_hor_sqr
                                                 τ₁ τ₂)
                                                 τ₃) =
trbs lassociator_h h₁ j₁ k₁ ⋆v τ₁ ⋆h τ₂ ⋆h τ₃

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: CoAlg_category F
h₁: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat w₁ x₁
h₂: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat w₂ x₂
j₁: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat x₁ y₁
j₂: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat x₂ y₂
k₁: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat y₁ z₁
k₂: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat y₂ z₂
vw: CoAlg_category F ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
vx: CoAlg_category F ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: CoAlg_category F ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: CoAlg_category F ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: h₁ -->[ vw ][ vx] h₂
τ₂: j₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] j₂
τ₃: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
double_coalg_lassociator_sqr h₁ j₁ k₁ ;;2 double_coalg_comp_hor_sqr
                                            (double_coalg_comp_hor_sqr
                                               τ₁ τ₂)
                                            τ₃ =
lassociator_h h₁ j₁ k₁ ⋆v τ₁ ⋆h τ₂ ⋆h τ₃

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
double_cat_associator double_coalg_hor_comp

  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
double_cat_associator double_coalg_hor_comp

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
double_associator_data double_coalg_hor_comp
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
double_associator_laws ?a

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
double_associator_data double_coalg_hor_comp
 exact double_coalg_associator_data.
    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
double_associator_laws double_coalg_associator_data
 exact double_coalg_associator_laws.
  Defined.

  (** * 11. The coherences *)
  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
triangle_law double_coalg_lunitor double_coalg_runitor
  double_coalg_associator

  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
triangle_law double_coalg_lunitor double_coalg_runitor
  double_coalg_associator

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y, Z: CoAlg_category F
h: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat X Y
k: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat Y Z
double_associator double_coalg_associator h
  (double_id double_coalg_hor_id Y) k ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor
                                            double_coalg_hor_comp
                                            (double_runitor
                                               double_coalg_runitor
                                               h)
                                            (id_two_disp
                                               k) =
trb₂ double_hor_comp_mor double_coalg_hor_comp
       (id_two_disp h)
       (double_lunitor double_coalg_lunitor k)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y, Z: CoAlg_category F
h: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat X Y
k: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat Y Z
double_associator double_coalg_associator h
  (double_id double_coalg_hor_id Y) k ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor
                                            double_coalg_hor_comp
                                            (double_runitor
                                               double_coalg_runitor
                                               h)
                                            (id_two_disp
                                               k) =
trb₂ double_hor_comp_mor double_coalg_hor_comp
       (id_two_disp h)
       (double_lunitor double_coalg_lunitor k)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y, Z: CoAlg_category F
h: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat X Y
k: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat Y Z
trbs id_v_square h ⋆h lunitor_h k =
trb₂ double_hor_comp_mor double_coalg_hor_comp
       (id_two_disp h)
       (double_lunitor double_coalg_lunitor k)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y, Z: CoAlg_category F
h: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat X Y
k: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat Y Z
trb₂ double_hor_comp_mor double_coalg_hor_comp
       (id_two_disp h)
       (double_lunitor double_coalg_lunitor k) =
trbs id_v_square h ⋆h lunitor_h k

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y, Z: CoAlg_category F
h: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat X Y
k: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat Y Z
trb₂ double_hor_comp_mor double_coalg_hor_comp
       (id_two_disp h)
       (double_lunitor double_coalg_lunitor k) = ?b
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y, Z: CoAlg_category F
h: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat X Y
k: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat Y Z
?b = trbs id_v_square h ⋆h lunitor_h k

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y, Z: CoAlg_category F
h: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat X Y
k: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat Y Z
trb₂ double_hor_comp_mor double_coalg_hor_comp
       (id_two_disp h)
       (double_lunitor double_coalg_lunitor k) = ?b

      exact (transportb_double_coalg_sqr
               (id_left _) (id_left _)
               (double_coalg_comp_hor_sqr
                  (id_two_disp h)
                  (double_lunitor double_coalg_lunitor k))).
    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y, Z: CoAlg_category F
h: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat X Y
k: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat Y Z
trbs double_coalg_comp_hor_sqr (id_two_disp h)
       (double_lunitor double_coalg_lunitor k) =
trbs id_v_square h ⋆h lunitor_h k

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y, Z: CoAlg_category F
h: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat X Y
k: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat Y Z
double_coalg_comp_hor_sqr (id_two_disp h)
  (double_lunitor double_coalg_lunitor k) =
id_v_square h ⋆h lunitor_h k

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
pentagon_law double_coalg_associator

  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
pentagon_law double_coalg_associator

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
V, W, X, Y, Z: CoAlg_category F
h₁: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat V W
h₂: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat W X
h₃: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat X Y
h₄: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat Y Z
trb₂ (double_associator double_coalg_associator h₁ h₂
        (double_hor_comp double_coalg_hor_comp h₃ h₄) ;;2 
      double_associator double_coalg_associator
        (double_hor_comp double_coalg_hor_comp h₁ h₂)
        h₃ h₄) =
double_hor_comp_mor double_coalg_hor_comp
  (id_two_disp h₁)
  (double_associator double_coalg_associator h₂ h₃ h₄) ;;2 
double_associator double_coalg_associator h₁
  (double_hor_comp double_coalg_hor_comp h₂ h₃) h₄ ;;2 
double_hor_comp_mor double_coalg_hor_comp
  (double_associator double_coalg_associator h₁ h₂ h₃)
  (id_two_disp h₄)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
V, W, X, Y, Z: CoAlg_category F
h₁: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat V W
h₂: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat W X
h₃: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat X Y
h₄: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat Y Z
trb₂ (double_associator double_coalg_associator h₁ h₂
        (double_hor_comp double_coalg_hor_comp h₃ h₄) ;;2 
      double_associator double_coalg_associator
        (double_hor_comp double_coalg_hor_comp h₁ h₂)
        h₃ h₄) =
double_hor_comp_mor double_coalg_hor_comp
  (id_two_disp h₁)
  (double_associator double_coalg_associator h₂ h₃ h₄) ;;2 
double_associator double_coalg_associator h₁
  (double_hor_comp double_coalg_hor_comp h₂ h₃) h₄ ;;2 
double_hor_comp_mor double_coalg_hor_comp
  (double_associator double_coalg_associator h₁ h₂ h₃)
  (id_two_disp h₄)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
V, W, X, Y, Z: CoAlg_category F
h₁: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat V W
h₂: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat W X
h₃: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat X Y
h₄: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat Y Z
trb₂ (double_associator double_coalg_associator h₁ h₂
        (double_hor_comp double_coalg_hor_comp h₃ h₄) ;;2 
      double_associator double_coalg_associator
        (double_hor_comp double_coalg_hor_comp h₁ h₂)
        h₃ h₄) =
trbs lassociator_h h₁ h₂ (h₃ ·h h₄)
     ⋆v lassociator_h (h₁ ·h h₂) h₃ h₄

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
V, W, X, Y, Z: CoAlg_category F
h₁: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat V W
h₂: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat W X
h₃: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat X Y
h₄: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat Y Z
trb₂ (double_associator double_coalg_associator h₁ h₂
        (double_hor_comp double_coalg_hor_comp h₃ h₄) ;;2 
      double_associator double_coalg_associator
        (double_hor_comp double_coalg_hor_comp h₁ h₂)
        h₃ h₄) = ?b
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
V, W, X, Y, Z: CoAlg_category F
h₁: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat V W
h₂: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat W X
h₃: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat X Y
h₄: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat Y Z
?b =
trbs lassociator_h h₁ h₂ (h₃ ·h h₄)
     ⋆v lassociator_h (h₁ ·h h₂) h₃ h₄

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
V, W, X, Y, Z: CoAlg_category F
h₁: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat V W
h₂: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat W X
h₃: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat X Y
h₄: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat Y Z
trb₂ (double_associator double_coalg_associator h₁ h₂
        (double_hor_comp double_coalg_hor_comp h₃ h₄) ;;2 
      double_associator double_coalg_associator
        (double_hor_comp double_coalg_hor_comp h₁ h₂)
        h₃ h₄) = ?b

      exact (transportb_double_coalg_sqr
               (id_right _) (id_right _)
               (double_coalg_lassociator_sqr _ _ _
                ;;2
                double_coalg_lassociator_sqr _ _ _)).
    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
V, W, X, Y, Z: CoAlg_category F
h₁: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat V W
h₂: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat W X
h₃: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat X Y
h₄: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat Y Z
trbs (double_coalg_lassociator_sqr h₁ h₂
        (double_coalg_comp_hor h₃ h₄) ;;2 double_coalg_lassociator_sqr
                                            (double_coalg_comp_hor
                                               h₁ h₂)
                                            h₃ h₄) =
trbs lassociator_h h₁ h₂ (h₃ ·h h₄)
     ⋆v lassociator_h (h₁ ·h h₂) h₃ h₄

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
V, W, X, Y, Z: CoAlg_category F
h₁: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat V W
h₂: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat W X
h₃: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat X Y
h₄: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat Y Z
double_coalg_lassociator_sqr h₁ h₂
  (double_coalg_comp_hor h₃ h₄) ;;2 double_coalg_lassociator_sqr
                                      (double_coalg_comp_hor
                                         h₁ h₂) h₃ h₄ =
lassociator_h h₁ h₂ (h₃ ·h h₄)
⋆v lassociator_h (h₁ ·h h₂) h₃ h₄

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  (** * 12. The double category of coalgebras of a lax double functor *)
  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
double_cat

  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
double_cat

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
category
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
twosided_disp_cat ?C ?C
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
hor_id ?D
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
hor_comp ?D
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
double_cat_lunitor ?I ?Cm
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
double_cat_runitor ?I ?Cm
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
double_cat_associator ?Cm
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
triangle_law ?l ?r ?a
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
pentagon_law ?a

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
category
 exact (CoAlg_category F).
    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
twosided_disp_cat (CoAlg_category F)
  (CoAlg_category F)
 exact double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat.
    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
hor_id double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat
 exact double_coalg_hor_id.
    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
hor_comp double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat
 exact double_coalg_hor_comp.
    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
double_cat_lunitor double_coalg_hor_id
  double_coalg_hor_comp
 exact double_coalg_lunitor.
    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
double_cat_runitor double_coalg_hor_id
  double_coalg_hor_comp
 exact double_coalg_runitor.
    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
double_cat_associator double_coalg_hor_comp
 exact double_coalg_associator.
    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
triangle_law double_coalg_lunitor double_coalg_runitor
  double_coalg_associator
 exact double_coalg_triangle_law.
    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
pentagon_law double_coalg_associator
 exact double_coalg_pentagon_law.
  Defined.

  (** * 13. The univalence of the double category of coalgebra *)
  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h, k: double_coalg_hor X Y
h = k
≃ (∑ s : globular_iso_square h k,
   is_double_coalg_sqr (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h)
     (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k) (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) s)

  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h, k: double_coalg_hor X Y
h = k
≃ (∑ s : globular_iso_square h k,
   is_double_coalg_sqr (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h)
     (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k) (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) s)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h, k: double_coalg_hor X Y
pr1 h = pr1 k ≃ globular_iso_square h k
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h, k: double_coalg_hor X Y
∏ x : pr1 h = pr1 k,
(λ x0 : pr1 h = pr1 k,
 transportf
   (λ x1 : twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
             (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
             (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (hor_mor C) X Y,
    (λ x2 : twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
              (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
              (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (hor_mor C) X Y,
     double_coalg_disp_cat_on_twosided_disp_cat
       (X,, Y,, x2)) x1) x0 (pr2 h) = pr2 k) x
≃ (λ y : globular_iso_square h k,
   is_double_coalg_sqr (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h)
     (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k) (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) y)
    (?f x)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h, k: double_coalg_hor X Y
pr1 h = pr1 k ≃ globular_iso_square h k
 exact (make_weq
               _
               (is_univalent_twosided_disp_cat_hor_mor
                  C
                  _ _ _ _
                  (idpath _) (idpath _)
                  h k)).
    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h, k: double_coalg_hor X Y
∏ x : pr1 h = pr1 k,
(λ x0 : pr1 h = pr1 k,
 transportf
   (λ x1 : twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
             (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
             (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (hor_mor C) X Y,
    (λ x2 : twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
              (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
              (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (hor_mor C) X Y,
     double_coalg_disp_cat_on_twosided_disp_cat
       (X,, Y,, x2)) x1) x0 (pr2 h) = pr2 k) x
≃ (λ y : globular_iso_square h k,
   is_double_coalg_sqr (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h)
     (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k) (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) y)
    (make_weq
       (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath X) (idpath Y))
       (is_univalent_twosided_disp_cat_hor_mor C X X Y
          Y (idpath X) (idpath Y) h k) x)
 
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h, k: double_coalg_hor X Y
p: pr1 h = pr1 k
(λ x : pr1 h = pr1 k,
 transportf
   (λ x0 : twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
             (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
             (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (hor_mor C) X Y,
    (λ x1 : twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
              (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
              (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (hor_mor C) X Y,
     double_coalg_disp_cat_on_twosided_disp_cat
       (X,, Y,, x1)) x0) x (pr2 h) = pr2 k) p
≃ (λ y : globular_iso_square h k,
   is_double_coalg_sqr (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h)
     (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k) (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) y)
    (make_weq
       (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath X) (idpath Y))
       (is_univalent_twosided_disp_cat_hor_mor C X X Y
          Y (idpath X) (idpath Y) h k) p)

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h: twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
  (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
  (hor_mor C) X Y
Hh: double_coalg_disp_cat_on_twosided_disp_cat
  (X,, Y,, h)
k: double_coalg_hor X Y
p: pr1 (h,, Hh) = pr1 k
transportf
  (λ x : twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
           (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
           (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (hor_mor C) X Y,
   double_coalg_disp_cat_on_twosided_disp_cat
     (X,, Y,, x)) p (pr2 (h,, Hh)) = pr2 k
≃ is_double_coalg_sqr
    (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor (h,, Hh))
    (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k) (id₁ X) (id₁ Y)
    (make_weq
       (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath X) (idpath Y))
       (is_univalent_twosided_disp_cat_hor_mor C X X Y
          Y (idpath X) (idpath Y) (h,, Hh) k) p)

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h: twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
  (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
  (hor_mor C) X Y
Hh: double_coalg_disp_cat_on_twosided_disp_cat
  (X,, Y,, h)
k: twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
  (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
  (hor_mor C) X Y
Hk: double_coalg_disp_cat_on_twosided_disp_cat
  (X,, Y,, k)
p: pr1 (h,, Hh) = pr1 (k,, Hk)
transportf
  (λ x : twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
           (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
           (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (hor_mor C) X Y,
   double_coalg_disp_cat_on_twosided_disp_cat
     (X,, Y,, x)) p (pr2 (h,, Hh)) = pr2 (k,, Hk)
≃ is_double_coalg_sqr
    (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor (h,, Hh))
    (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor (k,, Hk)) (id₁ X) (id₁ Y)
    (make_weq
       (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath X) (idpath Y))
       (is_univalent_twosided_disp_cat_hor_mor C X X Y
          Y (idpath X) (idpath Y) (h,, Hh) (k,, Hk)) p)

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h: twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
  (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
  (hor_mor C) X Y
Hh: double_coalg_disp_cat_on_twosided_disp_cat
  (X,, Y,, h)
k: twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
  (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
  (hor_mor C) X Y
Hk: double_coalg_disp_cat_on_twosided_disp_cat
  (X,, Y,, k)
p: h = k
transportf
  (λ x : (pr121 (pr11 C)) (pr1 X) (pr1 Y),
   square (double_coalg_map X) (double_coalg_map Y) x
     (#h F x)) p Hh = Hk
≃ trfs Hh
       ⋆v #s F
          (paths_rect ((pr121 (pr11 C)) X Y) h
             (λ (xy₂ : (pr121 (pr11 C)) X Y)
              (_ : h = xy₂),
              iso_twosided_disp (identity_z_iso X)
                (identity_z_iso Y) h xy₂)
             (id_iso_twosided_disp h) k p) =
  paths_rect ((pr121 (pr11 C)) X Y) h
    (λ (xy₂ : (pr121 (pr11 C)) X Y) (_ : h = xy₂),
     iso_twosided_disp (identity_z_iso X)
       (identity_z_iso Y) h xy₂)
    (id_iso_twosided_disp h) k p ⋆v Hk

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h: twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
  (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
  (hor_mor C) X Y
Hh, Hk: double_coalg_disp_cat_on_twosided_disp_cat
  (X,, Y,, h)
Hh = Hk
≃ trfs Hh ⋆v #s F (id_two_disp h) =
  id_two_disp h ⋆v Hk

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h: twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
  (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
  (hor_mor C) X Y
Hh, Hk: double_coalg_disp_cat_on_twosided_disp_cat
  (X,, Y,, h)
Hh = Hk
→ trfs Hh ⋆v #s F (id_two_disp h) =
  id_two_disp h ⋆v Hk
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h: twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
  (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
  (hor_mor C) X Y
Hh, Hk: double_coalg_disp_cat_on_twosided_disp_cat
  (X,, Y,, h)
trfs Hh ⋆v #s F (id_two_disp h) = id_two_disp h ⋆v Hk
→ Hh = Hk
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h: twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
  (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
  (hor_mor C) X Y
Hh, Hk: double_coalg_disp_cat_on_twosided_disp_cat
  (X,, Y,, h)
isaprop (Hh = Hk)
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h: twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
  (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
  (hor_mor C) X Y
Hh, Hk: double_coalg_disp_cat_on_twosided_disp_cat
  (X,, Y,, h)
isaprop
  (trfs Hh ⋆v #s F (id_two_disp h) =
   id_two_disp h ⋆v Hk)

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h: twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
  (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
  (hor_mor C) X Y
Hh, Hk: double_coalg_disp_cat_on_twosided_disp_cat
  (X,, Y,, h)
Hh = Hk
→ trfs Hh ⋆v #s F (id_two_disp h) =
  id_two_disp h ⋆v Hk
 abstract
          (intro p ;
           induction p ; cbn ;
           etrans ;
           [ do 2 apply maponpaths ;
             apply lax_double_functor_id_square
           | ] ;
           unfold transportb_square ;
           rewrite transportf_square_postwhisker ;
           rewrite transportf_f_square ;
           rewrite square_id_right_v ;
           refine (_ @ !(square_id_left_v _)) ;
           unfold transportb_square ;
           rewrite transportf_f_square ;
           use transportf_square_eq ;
           apply idpath).
      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h: twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
  (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
  (hor_mor C) X Y
Hh, Hk: double_coalg_disp_cat_on_twosided_disp_cat
  (X,, Y,, h)
trfs Hh ⋆v #s F (id_two_disp h) = id_two_disp h ⋆v Hk
→ Hh = Hk
 abstract
          (intro p ;
           pose proof (p @ square_id_left_v _) as p' ;
           clear p ;
           pose proof (maponpaths
                         (λ z, transportf_square _ _ (_ ⋆v z))
                         (!(lax_double_functor_id_square _ _))
                       @ p')
             as p'' ;
           clear p' ;
           unfold transportb_square in p'' ;
           rewrite transportf_square_postwhisker in p'' ;
           rewrite transportf_f_square in p'' ;
           rewrite square_id_right_v in p'' ;
           unfold transportb_square in p'' ;
           rewrite transportf_f_square in p'' ;
           refine (!_ @ maponpaths (transportf_square (id_left _) (id_left _)) p'' @ _) ;
           unfold transportb_square ;
           rewrite transportf_f_square ;
           apply transportf_square_id).
      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h: twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
  (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
  (hor_mor C) X Y
Hh, Hk: double_coalg_disp_cat_on_twosided_disp_cat
  (X,, Y,, h)
isaprop (Hh = Hk)
 abstract
          (apply isaset_square).
      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h: twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
  (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
  (hor_mor C) X Y
Hh, Hk: double_coalg_disp_cat_on_twosided_disp_cat
  (X,, Y,, h)
isaprop
  (trfs Hh ⋆v #s F (id_two_disp h) =
   id_two_disp h ⋆v Hk)
 abstract
          (apply isaset_square).
  Defined.

  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h, k: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: globular_iso_square h k
H: is_double_coalg_sqr (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h)
  (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k) (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) s
iso_twosided_disp (identity_z_iso X)
  (identity_z_iso Y) h k

  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h, k: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: globular_iso_square h k
H: is_double_coalg_sqr (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h)
  (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k) (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) s
iso_twosided_disp (identity_z_iso X)
  (identity_z_iso Y) h k

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h, k: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: globular_iso_square h k
H: is_double_coalg_sqr (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h)
  (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k) (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) s
is_iso_twosided_disp (pr2 (identity_z_iso X))
  (pr2 (identity_z_iso Y)) (pr1 s,, H)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h, k: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: globular_iso_square h k
H: is_double_coalg_sqr (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h)
  (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k) (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) s
square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) k h
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h, k: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: globular_iso_square h k
H: is_double_coalg_sqr (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h)
  (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k) (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) s
(pr1 s,, H) ⋆v ?s' = trbs id_v_square h
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h, k: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: globular_iso_square h k
H: is_double_coalg_sqr (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h)
  (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k) (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) s
?s' ⋆v (pr1 s,, H) = trbs id_v_square k

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h, k: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: globular_iso_square h k
H: is_double_coalg_sqr (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h)
  (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k) (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) s
square (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) k h
 exact (pr12 s).
    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h, k: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: globular_iso_square h k
H: is_double_coalg_sqr (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h)
  (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k) (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) s
(pr1 s,, H) ⋆v pr12 s = trbs id_v_square h
 exact (pr122 s).
    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h, k: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: globular_iso_square h k
H: is_double_coalg_sqr (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h)
  (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k) (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) s
pr12 s ⋆v (pr1 s,, H) = trbs id_v_square k
 exact (pr222 s).
  Defined.

  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h, k: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: iso_twosided_disp (identity_z_iso X)
  (identity_z_iso Y) h k
∑ s : globular_iso_square h k,
is_double_coalg_sqr (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h)
  (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k) (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) s

  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h, k: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: iso_twosided_disp (identity_z_iso X)
  (identity_z_iso Y) h k
∑ s : globular_iso_square h k,
is_double_coalg_sqr (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h)
  (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k) (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) s

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h, k: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: iso_twosided_disp (identity_z_iso X)
  (identity_z_iso Y) h k
h -->[ identity_z_iso X ][ identity_z_iso Y] k
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h, k: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: iso_twosided_disp (identity_z_iso X)
  (identity_z_iso Y) h k
k -->[
inv_from_z_iso
  (pr1 (identity_z_iso X),, pr2 (identity_z_iso X))
][ inv_from_z_iso
     (pr1 (identity_z_iso Y),, pr2 (identity_z_iso Y))] h
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h, k: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: iso_twosided_disp (identity_z_iso X)
  (identity_z_iso Y) h k
?pr1 ;;2 ?pr10 = trb₂ id_two_disp h
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h, k: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: iso_twosided_disp (identity_z_iso X)
  (identity_z_iso Y) h k
(λ _ : ?pr1 ;;2 ?pr10 = trb₂ id_two_disp h,
 ?pr10 ;;2 ?pr1 = trb₂ id_two_disp k) ?pr11
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h, k: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: iso_twosided_disp (identity_z_iso X)
  (identity_z_iso Y) h k
(λ s : globular_iso_square h k,
 is_double_coalg_sqr (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h)
   (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k) (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) s)
  (?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr11,, ?pr2)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h, k: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: iso_twosided_disp (identity_z_iso X)
  (identity_z_iso Y) h k
h -->[ identity_z_iso X ][ identity_z_iso Y] k
 exact (pr11 s).
    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h, k: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: iso_twosided_disp (identity_z_iso X)
  (identity_z_iso Y) h k
k -->[
inv_from_z_iso
  (pr1 (identity_z_iso X),, pr2 (identity_z_iso X))
][ inv_from_z_iso
     (pr1 (identity_z_iso Y),, pr2 (identity_z_iso Y))] h
 exact (pr1 (pr12 s)).
    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h, k: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: iso_twosided_disp (identity_z_iso X)
  (identity_z_iso Y) h k
pr11 s ;;2 pr112 s = trb₂ id_two_disp h
 abstract
        (refine (maponpaths pr1 (pr122 s) @ _) ;
         refine (transportb_double_coalg_sqr (id_left _) (id_left _) _ @ _) ;
         use transportf_square_eq ;
         apply idpath).
    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h, k: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: iso_twosided_disp (identity_z_iso X)
  (identity_z_iso Y) h k
(λ _ : pr11 s ;;2 pr112 s = trb₂ id_two_disp h,
 pr112 s ;;2 pr11 s = trb₂ id_two_disp k)
  (from_double_coalg_twosided_iso_subproof X Y h k s)
 abstract
        (refine (maponpaths pr1 (pr222 s) @ _) ;
         refine (transportb_double_coalg_sqr (id_left _) (id_left _) _ @ _) ;
         use transportf_square_eq ;
         apply idpath).
    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h, k: double_coalg_hor X Y
s: iso_twosided_disp (identity_z_iso X)
  (identity_z_iso Y) h k
(λ s : globular_iso_square h k,
 is_double_coalg_sqr (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h)
   (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k) (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) s)
  (pr11 s,,
   pr112 s,,
   from_double_coalg_twosided_iso_subproof X Y h k s,,
   from_double_coalg_twosided_iso_subproof0 X Y h k s)
 exact (pr21 s).
  Defined.

  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h, k: double_coalg_hor X Y
(∑ s : globular_iso_square h k,
 is_double_coalg_sqr (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h)
   (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k) (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) s)
≃ iso_twosided_disp (identity_z_iso X)
    (identity_z_iso Y) h k

  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h, k: double_coalg_hor X Y
(∑ s : globular_iso_square h k,
 is_double_coalg_sqr (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h)
   (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k) (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) s)
≃ iso_twosided_disp (identity_z_iso X)
    (identity_z_iso Y) h k

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h, k: double_coalg_hor X Y
(∑ s : globular_iso_square h k,
 is_double_coalg_sqr (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h)
   (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k) (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) s)
→ iso_twosided_disp (identity_z_iso X)
    (identity_z_iso Y) h k
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h, k: double_coalg_hor X Y
iso_twosided_disp (identity_z_iso X)
  (identity_z_iso Y) h k
→ ∑ s : globular_iso_square h k,
  is_double_coalg_sqr (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h)
    (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k) (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) s
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h, k: double_coalg_hor X Y
∏
x : ∑ s : globular_iso_square h k,
    is_double_coalg_sqr (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h)
      (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k) (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) s,
?g (?f x) = x
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h, k: double_coalg_hor X Y
∏
y : iso_twosided_disp (identity_z_iso X)
      (identity_z_iso Y) h k, ?f (?g y) = y

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h, k: double_coalg_hor X Y
(∑ s : globular_iso_square h k,
 is_double_coalg_sqr (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h)
   (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k) (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) s)
→ iso_twosided_disp (identity_z_iso X)
    (identity_z_iso Y) h k
 exact (λ s, to_double_coalg_twosided_iso (pr1 s) (pr2 s)).
    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h, k: double_coalg_hor X Y
iso_twosided_disp (identity_z_iso X)
  (identity_z_iso Y) h k
→ ∑ s : globular_iso_square h k,
  is_double_coalg_sqr (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h)
    (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k) (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) s
 exact from_double_coalg_twosided_iso.
    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h, k: double_coalg_hor X Y
∏
x : ∑ s : globular_iso_square h k,
    is_double_coalg_sqr (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h)
      (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k) (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) s,
from_double_coalg_twosided_iso
  ((λ s : ∑ s : globular_iso_square h k,
          is_double_coalg_sqr
            (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h)
            (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k) (id₁ X)
            (id₁ Y) s,
    to_double_coalg_twosided_iso (pr1 s) (pr2 s)) x) =
x
 abstract
        (intro s ;
         use subtypePath ; [ intro ; apply isaset_square | ] ;
         use subtypePath ; [ intro ; apply isaprop_is_iso_twosided_disp | ] ;
         apply idpath).
    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: double_coalg F
h, k: double_coalg_hor X Y
∏
y : iso_twosided_disp (identity_z_iso X)
      (identity_z_iso Y) h k,
(λ s : ∑ s : globular_iso_square h k,
       is_double_coalg_sqr (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor h)
         (sqr_of_double_coalg_hor k) (id₁ X) (id₁ Y) s,
 to_double_coalg_twosided_iso (pr1 s) (pr2 s))
  (from_double_coalg_twosided_iso y) = y
 abstract
        (intro s ;
         use subtypePath ; [ intro ; apply isaprop_is_iso_twosided_disp | ] ;
         use eq_double_coalg_sqr ;
         apply idpath).
  Defined.

  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
is_univalent_twosided_disp_cat
  double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat

  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
is_univalent_twosided_disp_cat
  double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, X', Y, Y': CoAlg_category F
p: X = X'
q: Y = Y'
h: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat X Y
k: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat X' Y'
isweq (idtoiso_twosided_disp p q)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: CoAlg_category F
h, k: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat X Y
isweq (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath X) (idpath Y))

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: CoAlg_category F
h, k: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat X Y
h = k
≃ iso_twosided_disp (identity_z_iso X)
    (identity_z_iso Y) h k
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: CoAlg_category F
h, k: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat X Y
?w ~ idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath X) (idpath Y)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: CoAlg_category F
h, k: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat X Y
h = k
≃ iso_twosided_disp (identity_z_iso X)
    (identity_z_iso Y) h k
 exact (double_coalg_twosided_iso_weq h k ∘ double_coalg_hor_eq h k)%weq.
    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: CoAlg_category F
h, k: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat X Y
(double_coalg_twosided_iso_weq h k
 ∘ double_coalg_hor_eq h k)%weq ~
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath X) (idpath Y)
 
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: CoAlg_category F
h, k: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat X Y
p: h = k
(double_coalg_twosided_iso_weq h k
 ∘ double_coalg_hor_eq h k)%weq p =
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath X) (idpath Y) p

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: CoAlg_category F
h: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat X Y
(double_coalg_twosided_iso_weq h h
 ∘ double_coalg_hor_eq h h)%weq (idpath h) =
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath X) (idpath Y) (idpath h)

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: CoAlg_category F
h: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat X Y
isPredicate
  (is_iso_twosided_disp (pr2 (identity_z_iso X))
     (pr2 (identity_z_iso Y)))
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: CoAlg_category F
h: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat X Y
pr1
  ((double_coalg_twosided_iso_weq h h
    ∘ double_coalg_hor_eq h h)%weq (idpath h)) =
pr1
  (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath X) (idpath Y)
     (idpath h))

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: CoAlg_category F
h: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat X Y
isPredicate
  (is_iso_twosided_disp (pr2 (identity_z_iso X))
     (pr2 (identity_z_iso Y)))

        
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: CoAlg_category F
h: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat X Y
x: h -->[ identity_z_iso X ][ identity_z_iso Y] h
isaprop
  (is_iso_twosided_disp (pr2 (identity_z_iso X))
     (pr2 (identity_z_iso Y)) x)

        apply isaprop_is_iso_twosided_disp.
      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: CoAlg_category F
h: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat X Y
pr1
  ((double_coalg_twosided_iso_weq h h
    ∘ double_coalg_hor_eq h h)%weq (idpath h)) =
pr1
  (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath X) (idpath Y)
     (idpath h))

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
X, Y: CoAlg_category F
h: double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat X Y
pr1
  ((double_coalg_twosided_iso_weq h h
    ∘ double_coalg_hor_eq h h)%weq (idpath h)) =
pr1
  (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath X) (idpath Y)
     (idpath h))

      apply idpath.
  Qed.

  (** * 14. The univalent double category of coalgebras of a lax double functor *)
  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
univalent_double_cat

  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
univalent_double_cat

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
double_cat
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
is_univalent_double_cat ?C

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
double_cat
 exact double_cat_of_double_coalg.
    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
is_univalent_double_cat double_cat_of_double_coalg
 
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
is_univalent double_cat_of_double_coalg
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
is_univalent_twosided_disp_cat
  (hor_mor double_cat_of_double_coalg)

      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
is_univalent double_cat_of_double_coalg
 apply is_univalent_coalg_category.
      
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
is_univalent_twosided_disp_cat
  (hor_mor double_cat_of_double_coalg)
 exact is_univalent_double_coalg_twosided_disp_cat.
  Defined.

  (** * 15. Flatness of the double category of coalgebras *)
  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
H: is_flat_double_cat C
is_flat_double_cat double_cat_of_double_coalg

  
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
H: is_flat_double_cat C
is_flat_double_cat double_cat_of_double_coalg

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
H: is_flat_double_cat C
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: double_cat_of_double_coalg
v₁: x₁ -->v y₁
v₂: x₂ -->v y₂
h₁: x₁ -->h x₂
h₂: y₁ -->h y₂
s₁, s₂: square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂
s₁ = s₂

    
C: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C C
E:= total_twosided_disp_category
  (twosided_disp_cat_on_disp_cat
     (coalgebra_disp_cat F) (coalgebra_disp_cat F)
     (hor_mor C)): category
H: is_flat_double_cat C
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: double_cat_of_double_coalg
v₁: x₁ -->v y₁
v₂: x₂ -->v y₂
h₁: x₁ -->h x₂
h₂: y₁ -->h y₂
s₁, s₂: square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂
s₁ = s₂

    apply H.
  Qed.
End CoalegbraDoubleCat.

Arguments double_coalg_id_hor_struct {C F} X /.
Arguments double_coalg_comp_hor_struct {C F X Y Z} h k /.
